name: Rural Americans United
subject: ICYMI: Do nothing Dan and the MAGA dream
body:
Skinny Farm Bill, ACA and No Kings ever!
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* A Seat is a Seat
* Do nothing Dan and the MAGA dream
* No Kings! October 18th
* White woman problems with ACA: Angie Girard

---
|
## A Seat Is a Seat
I've written before about my dissatisfaction for the process of electing someone to office: the endless begging for money, the shallow promises, and the duplicity of a party's support for one race over another simply because one is "high profile" while another might be in your own backyard. I'll say it again, as I always do until my throat is raw: a seat is a seat. There is not one that is worth more than another. You either control Congress, or you don't. I've even broken down the numbers before. One Senate race--say, Senator Warnock's--could have funded and flipped enough House seats to give Democrats a supermajority. But we don't do that, do we? Here in Washington's Fourth Congressional District, this seat could have been won before--and could be again this cycle--for a mere $2 million. That's less than one percent of what was spent on Warnock's race.

### The Cost of Inaction
On October 18, No Kings Day, we will likely see more people turn out to protest the 47 administration than many of us have seen in our lifetimes. People are moved by the horrors that have befallen our democracy. When a president can announce on live television that he has ended free speech and declared anti-fascism a domestic terrorist agenda, the response will be outrage and action--but it will fall short when it comes to funding elections at home. This is not a criticism of those who cannot give financially. Many people already give their time, their voice, and their courage--often at great personal sacrifice. Their commitment is what sustains democracy. But there are others among us who can do more. Those with the means to contribute must recognize that their financial support is what turns passion into progress.

### What It Takes to Win
Eighty people--that's all it takes to launch one of the most effective campaigns ever run in Congressional District 4. And just 200 people could win it. Two hundred individuals willing to raise $1.1 million, the amount needed for a viable campaign starting in February. With so much at stake--literally our lives and our freedoms--why is it so hard to find 200 people willing to commit $6,000 each? That's a small price for free speech, the right to self-governance, and protection from unwarranted search, seizure, and imprisonment. For some, that amount is out of reach, and their contributions will come in the form of volunteering, organizing, and showing up. But for others, $6,000 is entirely possible--and now is the time to give it.
### Beyond Politics as Usual
I have strong opposition to the traditional model of electoral politics and the greed that defines it. But this is different. This is a moment when a relatively small amount of money--and a great deal of heart--could truly change the course of our nation and the lives of people right here at home. We can keep waving signs, sharing social posts, and attending rallies. All of that matters deeply. But real change requires investment, in both effort and resources. It requires each of us to act with urgency and purpose, in whatever way we are able. A seat is a seat. And this one--our seat--can and should be won. The question is not whether we can afford to fight for it, but whether we can afford not to.
My crystal ball: Congressional District 8 is a lock, 3 we will keep, 4 is flippable and 5 will take more time.

---
| |
---
| Do nothing Dan and the MAGA dream
The Farm Bill is critical to the success of people in rural Washington and the nation as a whole. About eighty percent of the Farm Bill is the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), more commonly referred to as food stamps. Congressional District 4 Representative Dan Newhouse prides himself on being one of only a handful of farmers in Congress and therefore claims to be a "significant" voice for farmers. The U.S. Congress passes the Farm Bill roughly every five years to shape national agriculture, nutrition, conservation, and forestry policy. The last time it was passed was in 2018. Newhouse was sworn in in 2015 and was already well into his second term when the Farm Bill came up for a vote.
---
---
| |
---
## From Legislating to Executive Orders

Now that we have seen a seismic shift from the Legislative Branch actually legislating to a country run by executive order, the all-important Farm Bill has been gutted by the so-called Big Beautiful Bill, H.R. 1. Along with making huge and devastating cuts to SNAP and other critical programs, it also dealt a devastating blow to Medicaid. These two cuts alone, so deep and damaging, have left rural America reeling and without a clear future. Add to this the cuts to programs such as Local Food Purchase Assistance and Local Food for Schools. Not to mention the negative impact of tariffs and cuts to foreign aid, which have reduced agricultural purchases by billions of dollars.

---
|
## SNAP Cuts and Food Insecurity

The consequences of cuts to SNAP cannot be overstated. Eighty percent of the Farm Bill is allocated to SNAP, representing billions of dollars. In Yakima County, one in five people depend on SNAP, which is twice the state average. The impact on food insecurity and the inevitable consequences that follow will rip through our community like a plague. Surprisingly, there is no MAGA spin that works here because there is no upside. Even attempts to claim protection of Americans from paying for "illegal aliens" ring too hollow for even Newhouse to mouth. Recently, [Jerry LeClaire wrote an article](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H9-0RyiyAh09YD_-5NbTayNeWR8vHKP6gPAo7tur-_R9mM6nW8agHiER2MtWSLK4aJXTwQ9vKKgytZSRvGSMEQCiXFbRQOg60BhsPfcEnphbz9dNLJDdOHIAplRgX8cTaHIBv4jF2-VZVx3Cyqi0L3lmwEyn42_Sie_xE3hCogy_7H6VGjVx1tG2rjh8vW7jgTAB-YkNr0mLtCWjpSgy_yo6TP7Is1Fs&c=CXLAYSyYA3DCBZHTV3PShcS1lkZFkoiKXKJmAZtZdwAb_sW6K6Akew==&ch=CULAB6FakhuN_Qsx8ULd_ZWDIdwFYzx6h6Laba918CdMH5XMlvEolA==) on Congressional District 5's Mike Baumgartner and his position on the Big Beautiful Bill, and it is laughable how it mirrors Newhouse. Apparently parroting MAGA talking points is preferable to actually representing one's district.

---
## [Medicaid](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H9-0RyiyAh09YD_-5NbTayNeWR8vHKP6gPAo7tur-_R9mM6nW8agHiER2MtWSLK4qWJNtUwraSrL66xLbtKED3LezqklKmIVl8mMKpn38-JWU33imX7TSlBoSIe10BrrHBHghNX5a-5Umluz8uIz26Kf1aMmTEbgDQI9CmdBvsKGY51qKD9ygzRmdYFrUAUjYw9IoifEjmzMAGcH3QQIK3nea35l_ckKiPZboxanYSRb3yK7ktAJb9-S8V2YM0-k-tEpsMA1hZ4=&c=CXLAYSyYA3DCBZHTV3PShcS1lkZFkoiKXKJmAZtZdwAb_sW6K6Akew==&ch=CULAB6FakhuN_Qsx8ULd_ZWDIdwFYzx6h6Laba918CdMH5XMlvEolA==) Fallout

Cuts to Medicaid total approximately $911 billion dollars, which is just a little less than double Elon Musk's wealth. For those of us who live in rural areas, we already know how fragile and inadequate our healthcare system is. With upwards of 70 percent of the people in rural Washington dependent upon Medicaid or ACA benefits, it requires no exaggeration to describe the crushing blow to our economy and people with the loss of rural healthcare. Do Nothing Dan's white knight solution is to "fight for us" to secure our share of [$50 billion directed toward rural hospitals over the next ten years](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H9-0RyiyAh09YD_-5NbTayNeWR8vHKP6gPAo7tur-_R9mM6nW8agHiER2MtWSLK4qWJNtUwraSrL66xLbtKED3LezqklKmIVl8mMKpn38-JWU33imX7TSlBoSIe10BrrHBHghNX5a-5Umluz8uIz26Kf1aMmTEbgDQI9CmdBvsKGY51qKD9ygzRmdYFrUAUjYw9IoifEjmzMAGcH3QQIK3nea35l_ckKiPZboxanYSRb3yK7ktAJbw0abHglbSfX7aaJKzs3IqU=&c=CXLAYSyYA3DCBZHTV3PShcS1lkZFkoiKXKJmAZtZdwAb_sW6K6Akew==&ch=CULAB6FakhuN_Qsx8ULd_ZWDIdwFYzx6h6Laba918CdMH5XMlvEolA==). That amounts to just five percent of Medicaid cuts -- and it comes with huge strings attached. Even more problematic is that half of the funds are allocated based on state applications, and the other half is based on "need" as assessed at the discretion of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS). We have already seen 47's administration's attitude toward Democratic states. What is the likelihood that this distribution will be equitable, especially with Newhouse's and 47's history?

---
|
---
## Global Market Collapse

Destroying the global market has always been a superpower of 47, and this time around is no different. During 47's first administration, his trade war with China failed so completely that he had to bail out U.S. farmers to the tune of $28 billion, the legality of which is still in question. This time his tariffs, cuts to foreign aid, gutting of local programs, and general incompetence have meant significant losses of foreign markets for U.S. farmers. China, usually one of our largest buyers of soybeans, has purchased none from the U.S. this year. Instead, they have turned to Brazil and Argentina. To add insult to injury, 47 has just promised $20 billion to Argentina. 47 has announced that he will use tariff money, because it is "pouring in," to bail out farmers. While this confirmation of failed economic policies may console some, for our farmers it is a death knell. Traditionally both price supports and bailout money have gone to select crops, excluding our fruit and vegetable growers. Again, what is the likelihood that China will want to return to the U.S. in the future -- at least not without steep and painful concessions borne by the American people.

---
## Labor Impact and Wage Suppression

Wage suppression is also on the table through reworking of the Adverse Effective Wage Rate (AEWR), which is used to calculate the wage rate for guest workers. It is set to lower the wage paid to H-2A workers. Depending on your perspective this could be good or bad, but for our communities it is bad. The AEWR was supposed to make guest workers less attractive than local labor because of the extra cost. But as farms have grown huge, it has proven far more cost-effective to pay the higher wages than to rely on local workers. Lowering H-2A wages will only make local labor even less attractive. Additionally, small farmers have largely been excluded from participating in the H-2A visa process because of the high costs and complexity. Lowering wages does not make the process more accessible to them.

---
## The MAGA Dream Fulfilled

So what does this all mean? After nearly a decade of incompetence, Dan Newhouse has accomplished the MAGA dream. He is devastating our economy, creating poverty wages, cutting healthcare, and replacing it with food insecurity -- leaving us apparently expected to be grateful for whatever crumbs are thrown our way so that a few who already have too much can have more. And now Do Nothing Dan has announced that since the Farm Bill has been gutted, he can finally pass [the "skinny" Farm Bill](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H9-0RyiyAh09YD_-5NbTayNeWR8vHKP6gPAo7tur-_R9mM6nW8agHiER2MtWSLK47TFJCZILmbHyzBt8znjyqHop1XzPEKh7YlbSadb5GiQimkfUcv9SlFtpD9K7AmtRwL6l_gEVCZ4oxgIDZaH089P2txFk2iOmf8zmQGtO7z7q-DpFwu00wQ==&c=CXLAYSyYA3DCBZHTV3PShcS1lkZFkoiKXKJmAZtZdwAb_sW6K6Akew==&ch=CULAB6FakhuN_Qsx8ULd_ZWDIdwFYzx6h6Laba918CdMH5XMlvEolA==). My goodness.

---
| |
---
| White woman problems with ACA: Angie Girard
When I read Angie Girard's most recent Substack article, I knew it was something more people needed to see. If a comfortably well-off, educated white woman can be so upended by changes to the ACA, it takes little imagination to grasp the impact on the millions of Americans who have far less security.
I haven't included the article here for the sake of brevity, but I strongly encourage you to visit Angie's Substack and read [My ACA Marketplace Journey.](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H9-0RyiyAh09YD_-5NbTayNeWR8vHKP6gPAo7tur-_R9mM6nW8agHiER2MtWSLK4n3eIRvb4PyRDPVMPryQ9wx9F_yQlczI7RBfxPpzS2bBzCopq1iTHNgLbKlT5qdtJybt2da8ZApQeCpGkObWihwdaETbRBTAJdrJDYPXxTyRQdET6U5wgTA==&c=CXLAYSyYA3DCBZHTV3PShcS1lkZFkoiKXKJmAZtZdwAb_sW6K6Akew==&ch=CULAB6FakhuN_Qsx8ULd_ZWDIdwFYzx6h6Laba918CdMH5XMlvEolA==)

Politico: Louisiana asks Supreme Court to gut Voting Rights Act and ban use of race in redistricting| | |
---
| | Though a long and winding fight, **Louisiana's voters got the fair map they deserved** last year. Now the Supreme Court is not only going to try and take that away, but also try and knock out the last vestiges of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) in its totality. **[We can't let the suppressive majority on the Supreme Court get away with dismantling the VRA, Folks. RUSH $25 or more to stand up for the fair maps and districts voters deserve in Louisiana and elsewhere across the country>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117160650/575552553/1498593520?refcode=101225_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlYzU4YWQ5LWM3YTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1oN3DK4YnAD9gC5sPRftYCevO2HMU1TH5QjIL3m3rpE=)**

There's no way to sugarcoat this, Team: **Louisiana is asking the Supreme Court to gut the central provision of the Voting Rights Act and ban any use of race in redistricting.** In a legal brief filed just ahead of the new Supreme Court term, the state urged the Supreme Court to overturn a landmark 1986 ruling that established a legal test for when a voting map illegally dilutes minorities’ voter power. That ruling, Thornburg v. Gingles, has been understood for decades to require that states with significant communities of minority voters draw districts that fairly reflect their voting power. Louisiana also told the Supreme Court it has made the decision not to defend the state’s current congressional map from 2024. That map contains two majority-Black districts among the state’s six House seats. This unusual move comes as the state claims it was "_coerced_ " into complying with the Voting Rights Act. **This is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year.** Chief Justice John Roberts has been working to gut the VRA for more than a decade. The VRA's provision against racial gerrymandering is one of the last major legs of the law standing. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity. **[Team: We can't tolerate this kind of blatant partisanship interfering with our right to vote. Stand up for fair districts, ballot access, and more in Louisiana and beyond with $25 or whatever you can today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117160653/575552556/1498593520?refcode=101225_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlYzU4YWQ5LWM3YTctZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1oN3DK4YnAD9gC5sPRftYCevO2HMU1TH5QjIL3m3rpE=)**

clean_body: Politico: Louisiana asks Supreme Court to gut Voting Rights Act and ban use of race in redistricting| | | | | Though a long and winding fight, Louisiana's voters got the fair map they deserved last year. Now the Supreme Court is not only going to try and take that away, but also try and knock out the last vestiges of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) in its totality. = | | | = There's no way to sugarcoat this, Team: Louisiana is asking the Supreme Court to gut the central provision of the Voting Rights Act and ban any use of race in redistricting. In a legal brief filed just ahead of the new Supreme Court term, the state urged the Supreme Court to overturn a landmark 1986 ruling that established a legal test for when a voting map illegally dilutes minorities’ voter power. That ruling, Thornburg v. Gingles, has been understood for decades to require that states with significant communities of minority voters draw districts that fairly reflect their voting power. Louisiana also told the Supreme Court it has made the decision not to defend the state’s current congressional map from 2024. That map contains two majority-Black districts among the state’s six House seats. This unusual move comes as the state claims it was "coerced " into complying with the Voting Rights Act. This is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Chief Justice John Roberts has been working to gut the VRA for more than a decade. The VRA's provision against racial gerrymandering is one of the last major legs of the law standing. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: James Talarico
subject: I refuse to take corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
When I was first elected, I made a rare decision in Texas politics. I was the only member of the legislature to reject corporate PAC money.
I was confronted with the same decision when I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. This will be the most expensive race I’ve ever run. There are plenty of corporate PACs willing to give big donations for access and influence.
But I’m not changing my decision. I refuse to take their money. The people I serve will never have to wonder who I’m fighting for.
[**That’s why I’m counting on people like you to fuel our campaign. Please consider making a contribution today. I can’t do this alone.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-gm&t=1&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-gm&t=2&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z)
Refusing to accept corporate PAC checks was not easy. When I got to the House, I suddenly had a bunch of new “best friends.” And they all had lots of money. Money that came with expectations.
I refused to be part of it. In our broken political system, it’s harder than ever to know whether your leaders are fighting for you or are just puppets for their mega-donors.
Even when they sent me unsolicited checks, I returned the money. Thousands of dollars. Check out this tweet from my first term back in 2019:
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-gm&t=3&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z)
If they send me checks again in this race, I’ll send them back. I won’t be part of their corrupt system. My vote is not for sale.
This campaign is of and for the people. So I need to ask you, Peter:
[**Will you please make a donation to our campaign today? Texas is a massive state, and the super PACs that want to buy this seat have war chests loaded with corporate money. Anything you can give will help.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-gm&t=4&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251012-1-gm&t=5&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z)
We’re building this grassroots movement together. Let’s make it one that we can be proud of.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=6&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=7&refcode2=113_1347274_m-Em5Z&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=113%2E1347274%2Em-Em5Z).
clean_body: Peter — When I was first elected, I made a rare decision in Texas politics. I was the only member of the legislature to reject corporate PAC money. I was confronted with the same decision when I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. This will be the most expensive race I’ve ever run. There are plenty of corporate PACs willing to give big donations for access and influence. But I’m not changing my decision. I refuse to take their money. The people I serve will never have to wonder who I’m fighting for. Refusing to accept corporate PAC checks was not easy. When I got to the House, I suddenly had a bunch of new “best friends.” And they all had lots of money. Money that came with expectations. I refused to be part of it. In our broken political system, it’s harder than ever to know whether your leaders are fighting for you or are just puppets for their mega-donors. Even when they sent me unsolicited checks, I returned the money. Thousands of dollars. Check out this tweet from my first term back in 2019: If they send me checks again in this race, I’ll send them back. I won’t be part of their corrupt system. My vote is not for sale. This campaign is of and for the people. So I need to ask you, Peter: We’re building this grassroots movement together. Let’s make it one that we can be proud of. James Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

Peter ,
A new poll just dropped, and it’s sounding the alarm for Democrats in Pennsylvania.
More than half of voters still don’t know whether they’ll vote yes to retain three Democratic state Supreme Court justices this November.
That uncertainty is exactly what Republicans are counting on. Their national operation is already spending big to confuse and mislead voters into voting “no.”
If they succeed, it could flip Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court to Republican control, handing Donald Trump and his allies a greenlight to attack voting rights, reproductive freedom, and fair elections for years to come.
We can’t let that happen.
GOTV PAC is launching our Pennsylvania voter outreach program in the coming weeks to make sure Democrats turn out and vote yes to retain and protect the court’s 5–2 pro-democracy majority.
But we need your help to hit the ground running before the GOP’s misinformation takes hold.

name: ElectJon.com
subject: $10 to reelect Jon Ossoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
Jon Ossoff is currently laying the groundwork for what will be the most difficult reelection campaign of any U.S. Senator, and he’ll need an overwhelming number of grassroots donations to ensure he has the resources to win.
[**Can you please make your first donation today, Peter?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251012-1-f&t=1&akid=916%2E5691347%2EPZLjZw)
Here’s why we’re asking:
Winning this race and stopping a full-blown MAGA takeover of Georgia will require building the most ambitious statewide campaign our state has ever seen — and doing it _fast_.
We’re talking about hiring _more_ organizers, holding _more_ rallies, and doing _more_ direct outreach to voters in every corner of the state.
And we can’t afford to wait, because Republicans are _already_ pouring millions into Georgia to try to drown out Jon’s message.
So we need to get our message out there. And frankly, that takes money.
If everyone reading this chipped in just $10, we’d hit our October goals easily and we wouldn’t have to ask again for weeks.
But the reality is that most people don’t give. That’s why we’re counting on folks like you who know the stakes of this race to chip in if you can, Peter.
[**So we’re asking: can you please make a contribution to Jon’s reelection campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251012-1-f&t=2&akid=916%2E5691347%2EPZLjZw)

Thank you!
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: A big problem… for 2028
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
[1]State Democrats Committee

Peter — there’s a
lot going on.

In times like these, no one could blame you for wanting to sit it out
until 2028 when Democrats get our chance to take back the White House. But
the data nerds all agree — Democrats can’t afford to wait that long.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Gif with three rotating headlines: 1) Wall Street Journal: Democrats
get lowest rating from voters in 35 years. 2) The Telegraph: Time is
running out for the Democrats. 3) The Atlantic: If the party doesn't
figure out how to compete in more states, perpetual GOP dominance is all
but assured.

Things have been looking bad for months. So please, let us explain how
everything just changed in the last few weeks and [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]why your support of
$5 or more to elect Democrats is so important now — not
just later.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]CHIP IN NOW

Right now, Republicans control the Senate with a 53-47 majority. Nine
months ago, the Senate map looked really tough, with only Maine and North
Carolina being obvious flip opportunities in 2026 — and the 2028 map
looked EVEN TOUGHER.

That meant even if we flipped both Senate seats next year, it was more
than likely Democrats would have been stuck in the minority. And on top of
that, Republicans in Texas and across the country are actively trying to
rig their district maps for the House. Both situations meant even with a
new Democratic president (Newsom, Ocasio-Cortez, Buttigieg, Harris,
Beshear, Whitmer!) it was looking less and less likely like Democrats
would have the majorities in Congress that they’d need to deliver for
working families and restore our democracy.

BUT THEN DEMOCRATS STARTED FIGHTING BACK.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]The Guardian: 'We are at war - bring it on': Democrats ready to fight
dirty to stop Trump

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]CBS News: California Democrats prepare redistricting effort to counter
Texas GOP

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]'Democrats lead in the U.S. House popular vote' Results from the August
Strength in Numbers/Verasight poll

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]HELP DEMOCRATS KEEP FIGHTING »

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]The Washington Post: Sherrod Brown plans to run for Senate in Ohio
again, boosting Democrats' hopes of retaking a seat in the increasingly
red-leaning state.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Newsweek headline: GOP Senators Worried About Losing Republican Seat in
Texas: What Polls Show

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1010&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]The Washington Post: Sen. Joni Ernst (R-Iowa) will not seek reelection
to a third term, creating an opening for Democrats in their bid to regain
control of the Senate.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1011&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]HELP DEMOCRATS KEEP FIGHTING »

Now Republicans are on defense all over the country for both the House AND
the Senate in 2026. If we can take either or both back in 2026, that means
we won’t have to wait just until 2028 to restore our democracy — we’ll
finally have the power in Congress that we need to grind Trump’s takeover
of our country to a screeching halt.

But the oligarchs backing Trump know this too — they’re ALREADY writing
million-dollar checks to prop up unpopular Republican incumbents across
the country. That’s why Democrats can’t afford to sit it out until 2028 —
we’ve got a democracy to save!

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1012&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]So, can we count on your support of $5 or whatever you
can chip in today to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot
nationwide in 2026? This is our chance to make a difference — we can’t
waste it!

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96635?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=1013&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Contribute $5
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96635?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=1014&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Contribute $15
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96635?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=1015&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Contribute $30
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96635?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=1016&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Contribute $50
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96635?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=1017&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Contribute $100
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96635?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=1018&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Contribute $250
[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96634?refcode=em20251012-9564&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5 ]Give another amount

Thank you for making a difference,

—SDC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=1020&akid=9564%2E614464%2E6wNzW5

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: The Sanity Interview: Ben Habib
body:
Even More Brexit: Ben HabibIn this interview we chatted with Ben Habib, the leader of Advance UK, a rising political party endorsed by Elon Musk. We discussed British identity, immigration policy, what Tony Blair went wrong, and why the England's future depends on recovering its past. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/ZPPNYq4a2rCN2OTZYJzNZQ)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MzE0NjkifQ/YTSFjhBGZF6VJuUKyUvlZg)
---

# **[7 Reasons to be brave: Allie Beth Stuckey's powerful call at Share the Arrows](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The fragrance of revival has been drifting like incense across the nation ever since the assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk, . This feeling took physical form yesterday when 6,500 women from all over the country gathered in Allen, Texas, for Allie Beth Stuckey’s Share the Arrows conference.After a day filled with worship led by Francesca Battistelli and lots of encouraging talks from some of the most prominent voices in conservative evangelicalism, including Alisa Childers, Jinger Vuolo, and Katy Faust, Allie took the stage to close out the event with a speech on something we desperately need if we want to keep this revival burning: bravery.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

name: Arly Henninger-Voss
subject: I’m here to empower you to save wildlife [Video]
body:
Defender,

My name is Arly Henninger-Voss, and I’m here to help you make a powerful
difference for wildlife and the environment in Pennsylvania and beyond.

A little bit about myself: I’m a Pennsylvania native who was raised and educated
in the Keystone State. I love hiking in our state’s beautiful parks and wild
areas with my dog. The imperiled hellbender salamander, our state’s official
amphibian, also happens to be one of my favorite species. Look up these funky
(not-so) little guys if you aren’t already familiar with them!

I’m excited to connect with incredible wildlife supporters like you and share
how you can persuade your U.S. Representatives and Senators to take action
against serious threats facing wildlife.

WATCH ARLY’S VIDEO INTRODUCTION!
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/4084398?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==]

Defenders is launching this new effort in your region at a critical and
unprecedentedly perilous time for our nation’s imperiled species. Pennsylvania’s
members of Congress, particularly yours, have exceptional strategic importance
to our success in defending the Endangered Species Act and other protections on
which wildlife depend.

I’ll keep you posted about upcoming opportunities in your area to engage in
protecting wildlife through in-person and virtual events, including meet-ups,
hikes, guest speaker presentations, and meetings with your elected officials on
key issues.

Our first opportunity to connect will happen soon – keep an eye out for an email
from me with more details about our virtual kick-off of the new Wildlife
Defenders program in Pennsylvania.

If you haven’t already, let us know if you are interested in learning more about helping Pennsylvania’s
animals by signing up here!
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/4084399?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==]

That’s all for now, but I look forward to reaching out again soon. Together, I
know we can have a real, lasting impact on the wildlife we all cherish during
this extraordinarily critical time!

Sincerely,

Arly Henninger-Voss

Pennsylvania Organizer
Defenders of Wildlife

P.S.: Please feel free to reach out to me directly with any questions at ahenninger-voss-contractor@defenders.org
[http://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/4084400?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==] .

[http://www.facebook.com/DefendersofWildlife] [http://twitter.com/defenders] [https://www.instagram.com/defendersofwildlife/?hl=en] [http://www.youtube.com/defendersofwildlife] [https://www.tiktok.com/@defendersofwildlife]

Defenders of Wildlife 1130 17th Street NW • Washington, DC 20036 defenders.org [https://defenders.org]

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [dpwillis67@gmail.com]

Please do not respond to this email. Click here to unsubscribe.
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.defenders.org%2Fpage%2F18130%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3FtriggerId%3D14720%26templateId%3D15058&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC]

subject: What’s this about?
body:

I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump to Middle East, Backyard Tombstone, and an Expensive Feather
body:
President [Trump is en route to Israel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQRk9jMiP_Ah042ISsN90QFbgA7xQY2W5Q335EzxEmrSeVvvf-PYcnBAr78hc2dGWOw45XJiwF01DSaztK3IL3hAi5jDB9vSH5QQlluRRc6sFDoPdgKu9mRIW6QifbRmjzaLWuVgcjjNpaKYQwXWOkbDr7MOPcThYfBqYquPubFFJLIZQUte3sBNKi70YjQStmBPpQYqr_x7CXFWd6xxNTPcWtIreWcmSm_zDVM9Vf11Xv43Rb3Py-xESeqf5Hg98eTPUUTuQjxYWpPuQESHyFDTL_gNfhoWDmM2yBAma-xlxgwczhglB4QkLIyD-FeElwIvE07aB0K4WokvPHFYhCblpmxLJBoM_c8qvGp1PfAQAA__8huZLz) ahead of a major Middle East summit, where he is expected to mark a historic hostage-prisoner exchange and promote a U.S.-brokered ceasefire between Israel and Hamas.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtu6zAQAE9DdhZ2l9THBYvX6AUBHCBIoXTCWlzbjCnJoBgTvn3gXCH9zBQzHMYDhxiW8xvP4vJpHRcpW5ScJY05fc-3vM7B-yjCWz7ydH1w8iMB1TuEHZrRc4iP0WrvTiIkRovDtgFj960x-uIsmNowdnvoZDItS9OQ9d6yhW7yXOvgnjUENAhACFXd1RNjLb47WmRDyoL4kNdUfa1hyRc5xcd6l1RN66yju-R825T5p6hX1JdSqpKma1iOMT4JRT39xw7xnRpF_TB8vHwOr4p6nZy_lRBj2JpWWTjPHH4Nnf804u7oJwAA__-mtm-E) | |
# Monday, October 13, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1792, the [cornerstone of the White House](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCngc7IfyCQwsXX0OVrr0SLvY73zuDI3gTx9qec7g2u_mlmpPm4LTegRPv9P2xoOeRlx6MmZMaycHluD84beZ8QofIK7uuE4hct9SCUFMosHiidS996GxA1mhatGi_S9NfRmDbaCVfnh1UbCAHldRpD73rpEC4rBIChJftuU1IZJaVWshumwYEa0E9rr8DoppfoiXPpPjPtHDGkM7-wdC5vbbKR-VEb86_Rc6Pn4zi6SJVzOd_e6JkjVeHhFLSLX2n0nB3nFYtQ5h2KxChiflYULpcdS-W8o0hAvi3WPw5KieplbHp534DSzzT_6a-X1d8BAAD___Nogg4) was laid at the site chosen by President George Washington and Pierre Charles L'Enfant, city planner for the nation's new capital. Today's edition features a story about a luxury restaurant in Barcelona that has taken the humble burger to extravagant new heights, unveiling an [$11,000 creation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1upjAQAJ_GdP7kPyApXFxDl2uvRAtef-zF2MjeD8Lbn3KvkHqk0Wj-fMwfQIny8zfs6DmWOePVEjJjnbm-9oPLTiEkRGi8wPp5Qw2zUaaXWklt5wCU7tl1wUdEg7ZDr8dBWfc-WtttfgEVI8Boo-ojvNvVGewXO0BwceghduS_bVppq5UyWj36t34F3WN4W5wGa4RTGIhLffwtlHnDmO5yYn2sZe-S35iPJuwvYSZhpuu6HgG_sHL55sJMsZQgzNQOyNQ2uW4Y5Q6f2OTyqk-sshWJXwfmRifKu7xkRgwSsqR8EgNTyZKLRGBJLK0ZnFZOmKmrPhwXpURtGIVTzx0o_Y_iH508vfkXAAD__9jfic8) crafted over eight years and plated with gold. How much would you pay for the perfect burger? Reply to this email and tell us. Fall might be beautiful--but your gutters don't think so. Between the leaves, pine needles, and debris piling up, many _Flyover_ readers are already seeing the signs of clogging. Our team took a closer look at [LeafGuard's unique one-piece system](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtu6zAQAE9DdhZ2l9THBYvX6AUBHCBIoXTCWlzbjCnJoBgTvn3gXCH9zBQzHMYDhxiW8xvP4vJpHRcpW5ScJY05fc-3vM7B-yjCWz7ydH1w8iMB1TuEHZrRc4iP0WrvTiIkRovDtgFj960x-uIsmNowdnvoZDItS9OQ9d6yhW7yXOvgnjUENAhACFXd1RNjLb47WmRDyoL4kNdUfa1hyRc5xcd6l1RN66yju-R825T5p6hX1JdSqpKma1iOMT4JRT39xw7xnRpF_TB8vHwOr4p6nZy_lRBj2JpWWTjPHH4Nnf804u7oJwAA__-mtm-E) and was seriously impressed. If you haven't had gutter trouble yet, just wait until those autumn rains hit--it's worth fixing before it starts.
|
---
## Trump Heads to Mideast Amid Fragile Truce
President [Trump is en route to Israel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQRk9jMiP_Ah042ISsN90QFbgA7xQY2W5Q335EzxEmrSeVvvf-PYcnBAr78hc2dGWOw45XJiwF01DSaztK3IL3hAi5jDB9vSH5QQlluRRc6sFDoPdgKu9mRIW6QifbRmjzaLWuVgcjjNpaKYQwXWOkbDr7MOPcThYfBqYquPubFFJLIZQUte3sBNKi70YjQStmBPpQYqr_x7CXFWd6xxNTPcWtIreWcmSm_zDVM9Vf11Xv43Rb3Py-xESeqf5Hg98eTPUUTuQjxYWpPuQESHyFDTL_gNfhoWDmM2yBAma-xlxgwczhglB4QkLIyD-FeElwIvE07aB0K4WokvPHFYhCblpmxLJBoM_c8qvGp1PfAQAA__8huZLz) ahead of a major Middle East summit, where he is expected to mark a historic hostage-prisoner exchange and promote a U.S.-brokered ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. Vice President JD Vance said the remaining [hostages could be released "any moment now](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D0OnDAUBODTQGfkHwy7hYs0dJs2JXq2H4sT_yD77SJuH5ErpP6k0cz8eq0vCDHk909IaGgra8azRSTCulL9pINKCt5HRGhkwf25oPpVcqmZ4Eyo1UOI1zr23myIElWPRswTV-NzVqrfDVi18c3PGtw8IYK2-mm5nLV1VrnJ9cHcaYILJTiXgg_6oR0Ijf5hRwFKdiNHH6jU4XcJmXbc4lW-WAdXUh_NTnS0Tv3o5NLJ5TzPIVt3r7i9k8tRYqDg2o17IGR7-TTs5PKF7JA1uBoLrQLGwPbSCN7YWMWI0NCzHRI0lkrCTCyXk1WXQarpMc19Nf44Q4yhTXM38neCEP-Vov968mvk3wAAAP__Ut-K-A)," while Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu called the moment historic, declaring Israel is ready to receive them. Under the agreement, Hamas will release 48 Israeli hostages--20 believed to be alive--in exchange for 250 prisoners and more than 1,700 Palestinian detainees. Ahead of Trump's arrival, U.S. Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, Ivanka Trump, and Jared Kushner addressed a Tel Aviv rally on Saturday, where the crowds unfurled banners praising Trump for the ceasefire and hostage release. [See photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuOnTAUheGnMd1GvnA7hYsTRe4mKaIoJdrgDXZiMLI9w5CnjzivkHpJS_r-X2_jG_rg9_UbbqTLEsedzhyoFEpjSe_bUeLmrQ1EmMuE858Lkx0lly0IDkKNFn24xqayeiGSpCrSou-4ah69UpXTSolh5pJTL3r7WIaHUlPXoZ1w7nquROX1_Sa4UIJzKXjdDu2MoiU7TI1AJVnDyfoSU_07-r04WsIVPyjVc9yqoF0pR2bqyaRh0pznWW95vzcmDe3wGZg0N4pJE4ujxKTxOSEFn-FI6DPBCwpYwL2vBAlDuAAdoYW4AH0eNBey4GIueO8UCDPBdIHDDTP4HVb8i0waTPB8iu_uZ3ZMmTh7y9TXL3deOvMPSkeVtD1OH4LPXc8avm7owwtS_qv-h5b_AgAA___dvZs5). Co-hosting the peace summit in Egypt, Trump sees the truce offering a rare opening to broker peace, even though key issues like Gaza's future governance and Hamas disarmament remain unresolved. Humanitarian [aid has begun entering Gaza](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ_GdEb-gYUtXNyGbm-bEg14gElsjMywiDx9RF4hzamOPp3zfbz6F1Cgdf4PER1PqV_x3AMyY-45H3HjFMn7gAg7DzB-XZB9b5SppVZS294DhauvCu8mRIO2QKebh7LVs7G2WNw0DA02QzWhtW391DBgO1ZtPbQK2yeOBbmbppW2WimjVVm39Qi6Rt8OlQZrRKXQE6dcfiZaecEpXOmNuRxTLIJbmLdd2H_CdMJ053mWeOR037gLwnQ3XphOqzuMMB2Qlx4DvTFfklZOcoZvkPsIAb08NgkLgpdpkvsRI7GcUpYbwoiSVonztXGRnd9OCoH2RyMqNUeg8DuI_2Tx7cxPAAAA__82PYcE), and agencies are preparing to scale up relief efforts.
## Nor'easter Slams East Coast
A powerful [nor'easter battered the East Coast](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ_GdCDv2uCjcPE3dPe3KZHBy-HE2CezOXRvHzmvkGZXmpFm9M3Hfb67EEN6_HcHWd7ynOg6IzFTmbl8H0_OR_A-ErmTF7d-vV3xM0rsW5AtqNm7EN-zbrzdiJBUQxbMIJUejVLNbhc5jAPozXgvwYNBJ7Xf-gXHcQRcTBNsTQMJCqREkF1_61cHPfnbosEpFFqSD5xL95lD4p22-M4vKt2ajybanfl5CvVP4CRwuq6rS8taKapfFXK8UxE4nZzLcQqcUi4Vh0pbX7vmereYsw_p0ZY1OVQGoG-K9c8rxBjOwQgtH4cL8beW_7TVy-JPAAAA__8HKn5R) over the weekend, flooding coastal communities, toppling power lines, and forcing hundreds of flight delays and cancellations. The storm brought winds up to 60 mph and dumped several inches of rain from the Carolinas to Massachusetts, prompting states of emergency in New Jersey and parts of New York. In Alaska, meanwhile, the remnants of Typhoon Halong caused [catastrophic flooding in remote villages](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD0OnDAUhE8DnVf-w8aFizTbbdqU6Nl-LN4YjMzLIm4fkSukHI00mu_79ZpekEve3j9hRU9znTY8j4JE2CZqf9ad6ppTKohwUID4-4KWJsnlwARnQk0Jcrkm3Sc_I0pUPXphDVfaWaX6xTsdbBzD4AzOdrQmKtBuFMqFEHmyrs_-XhNcKMG5FPwxjEMEMWAagxagZKc5pky1PT41b7TgXK76xfaIde2LX4j2o1M_Ovns5BP2G-Cu7tAox4KdfFKre45Q2IlACza21UbLzcTmUmvK25tteLIPtgMvJo2e0wghmcClFTq5mBxEEy1wa5Tom0_7mUvJh7Gd5u8Vcvn3h_5L4tfLvwEAAP__sICGNw), sweeping away homes and leaving some residents unaccounted for. Across the East Coast, officials warned of continued risk from beach erosion, storm surge, and high tides through Monday. The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) issued [ground stops at major airports](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMhZ9G3hhIlH-SQUMXb7drR4OxmFj3ypYh0Q789oX6Cl04HBIf-J0_X9MXhRi2929a2ckrTRt_SmQRzpPkY90lrcH7yExFnjT_XJT9hBo7MBqMnTyFeE1t492LGdk27MzQa9s-BmubxZE2_WNAfe_9wz4N9nP7nH3vH8PA3KFtgqs0o401WqPRt-7ezWQ69vdna8iiajX7ICnfvlPYZOFXvNLJ-TantYluEdmLsr8UjgrH7dpTkbpSOFawwtHoOlDheBSofgrHFxGEUg4u8M7p2Dx4jnQVIIGVvlOGLWVZqjVQyHvKUoBKTWvGGQoLSIJPZvqBhc40Q9rqLUimk6PCscnO758QYyj9oFr9XinEf2_Lf3V9OvwbAAD__yp6lDI), including JFK, LaGuardia, and Boston Logan, with some delays exceeding 100 minutes.
## Professor Finds Roman Tombstone in Backyard
A Tulane professor digging in her New Orleans backyard [unearthed a 2nd-century Roman tombstone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2q3DAUhJ9G7rTox5a8hYtAcHfTpjTHOkd3lehnkU-u8dsH5xVSDcwMA9_8_Ng-IOVUP39AoYVj2yqdRyZm6hv3P-XNrSTETAQH7xB-X9BxM8pMUiup7YaQ8rWNAy6RyJAdaNHeKTs-vbXDawmzDrNyDiN6oxFmh866HbXGmUY_Dmm517TSVitltHpM8xRAT4TzPmqwRoyKMHHrj18tVX5RzFf7ov4IrQx5eTG_D2G_CbMKs57n-ThjuW4MczeEWaFzCpmEWW_3FuDUqjxbz3jnNSSqLHsrUCW3sh_cKslKp2w9E9RDlutg6pcw66S8jCE47_YowViSI-konzOiVMp7pZ_uCTALu_LeKQr7_fUe-oLvM-WcDufFqD4LpPwPgP_r9a_F_A0AAP__fOWV2w) that had been missing since World War II, sparking an international investigation. The marble marker, belonging to a Roman Imperial Navy officer, vanished from a museum in Civitavecchia, Italy, after a 1943 bombing. Experts from Tulane and the University of New Orleans confirmed its authenticity, and the artifact has been turned over to the FBI Art Crime Team for repatriation. Italy plans to officially receive the stone back in a ceremony slated for summer 2026. clean_body: President ahead of a major Middle East summit, where he is expected to mark a historic hostage-prisoner exchange and promote a U.S.-brokered ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. | | | | | | Monday, October 13, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1792, the was laid at the site chosen by President George Washington and Pierre Charles L'Enfant, city planner for the nation's new capital. Today's edition features a story about a luxury restaurant in Barcelona that has taken the humble burger to extravagant new heights, unveiling an crafted over eight years and plated with gold. How much would you pay for the perfect burger? Reply to this email and tell us. Fall might be beautiful--but your gutters don't think so. Between the leaves, pine needles, and debris piling up, many Flyover readers are already seeing the signs of clogging. Our team took a closer look at and was seriously impressed. If you haven't had gutter trouble yet, just wait until those autumn rains hit--it's worth fixing before it starts. | Trump Heads to Mideast Amid Fragile Truce President ahead of a major Middle East summit, where he is expected to mark a historic hostage-prisoner exchange and promote a U.S.-brokered ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. Vice President JD Vance said the remaining ," while Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu called the moment historic, declaring Israel is ready to receive them. Under the agreement, Hamas will release 48 Israeli hostages--20 believed to be alive--in exchange for 250 prisoners and more than 1,700 Palestinian detainees. Ahead of Trump's arrival, U.S. Special Envoy Steve Witkoff, Ivanka Trump, and Jared Kushner addressed a Tel Aviv rally on Saturday, where the crowds unfurled banners praising Trump for the ceasefire and hostage release. . Co-hosting the peace summit in Egypt, Trump sees the truce offering a rare opening to broker peace, even though key issues like Gaza's future governance and Hamas disarmament remain unresolved. Humanitarian , and agencies are preparing to scale up relief efforts. Nor'easter Slams East Coast A powerful over the weekend, flooding coastal communities, toppling power lines, and forcing hundreds of flight delays and cancellations. The storm brought winds up to 60 mph and dumped several inches of rain from the Carolinas to Massachusetts, prompting states of emergency in New Jersey and parts of New York. In Alaska, meanwhile, the remnants of Typhoon Halong caused , sweeping away homes and leaving some residents unaccounted for. Across the East Coast, officials warned of continued risk from beach erosion, storm surge, and high tides through Monday. The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) issued , including JFK, LaGuardia, and Boston Logan, with some delays exceeding 100 minutes. Professor Finds Roman Tombstone in Backyard A Tulane professor digging in her New Orleans backyard that had been missing since World War II, sparking an international investigation. The marble marker, belonging to a Roman Imperial Navy officer, vanished from a museum in Civitavecchia, Italy, after a 1943 bombing. Experts from Tulane and the University of New Orleans confirmed its authenticity, and the artifact has been turned over to the FBI Art Crime Team for repatriation. Italy plans to officially receive the stone back in a ceremony slated for summer 2026. . name: Checkmate
subject: The election to end all future elections
body:
MAGA is looking to pull up the ladder on our ability to vote by knocking out three Democratic justices in this judicial retention race in a pivotal swing state.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018IUjs_hrRTPH-L3lu2ZUheiyHWHfLEp-adbfdrfdWwU4INJJhwRoVm0CGoimsaIXRBl4mkK7fOy1MMpYnCUMdE7ylmaQUjbXMznK6IKCQO8UIhZ2tRPN3MPUEwYLhpyq2lrW9IwQ2y9szvc96BAcaPZ0AnD1SC--Nuy_VWu2uMLJ8NyAat1TwSVhE1yh6mFRpI8UWwH2suJ_yQ37OSf2mARWIuMrC2Ko3N1f6zO48ig=&c=YMaq33B9d8GXbydIzZkEccb5mj2m-PVvBit2k7jYICt0WoIevGaJbQ==&ch=798WqNVg1h-nvLaCfO9y2QVWIpdGtHcER8Xyp73wlWtNy9mb1T8wCg==)

| Friend,
Project 2025 is already over halfway achieved in just a little over nine months of Trump in office.
From instigating an economic meltdown to realign wealth to billionaires and away from workers, to an all-out assault on abortion rights--MAGA is on the brink of transforming America into an unrecognizable right-wing hellscape.
But MAGA's crown jewel is yet to be achieved, and it is the ultimate checkmate: capture the courts in pivotal swing states like Pennsylvania and use them to roll back our right to vote in free and fair elections, delivering the death blow to democracy and instituting authoritarian MAGA rule.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018IUjs_hrRTPH-L3lu2ZUheiyHWHfLEp-adbfdrfdWwU4INJJhwRoVm0CGoimsaIXRBl4mkK7fOy1MMpYnCUMdE7ylmaQUjbXMznK6IKCQO8UIhZ2tRPN3MPUEwYLhpyq2lrW9IwQ2y9szvc96BAcaPZ0AnD1SC--Nuy_VWu2uMLJ8NyAat1TwSVhE1yh6mFRpI8UWwH2suJ_yQ37OSf2mARWIuMrC2KoFspkhGPsKbw=&c=YMaq33B9d8GXbydIzZkEccb5mj2m-PVvBit2k7jYICt0WoIevGaJbQ==&ch=798WqNVg1h-nvLaCfO9y2QVWIpdGtHcER8Xyp73wlWtNy9mb1T8wCg==)

| With this masterstroke, MAGA would in effect be using democracy to destroy democracy.
MAGA wants to pull up the ladder behind them to prevent the rest of us from using peaceful means to stop their terrible vision of an America ruled by an absolute "unitary executive": or, in less technical terms, an American monarch.
But there is hope. People are finally waking up to MAGA's twisted ambitions, and they're fighting back. Thousands are preparing to protest this weekend to show Trump and MAGA fascists that we won't back down.
Pennsylvania is the battlefield on which MAGA will launch its opening salvo--and we must bring all of our resources, efforts, and energies to bear to win this beyond-critical judicial race in Pennsylvania on Tuesday, Nov. 4.
[The three Democratic justices up for retention in PA need our help. We need to bring much more attention and financial support to this fight if we are going to pull this off. But there is hope. People are finally waking up to MAGA's twisted ambitions, and they're fighting back. Thousands are preparing to protest this weekend to show Trump and MAGA fascists that we won't back down.
Pennsylvania is the battlefield on which MAGA will launch its opening salvo--and we must bring all of our resources, efforts, and energies to bear to win this beyond-critical judicial race in Pennsylvania on Tuesday, Nov. 4.

## Texas National Guard Deployment in Limbo
A federal appeals court ruled Saturday that the Texas National Guard can [remain in Illinois](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp_GdEb-ATsULrahy7ZbogEPibXGRvYkJG9_RfIIt_6ORnPOv-t0hRBDuv2FDR291jwlPGpEIiyTxz3m94aJ5piX_-hrjlBWKJMSqudScKknDyG-p67xbhZ-kA06aY3QvdZyaO5OdWBRdKAt2gX1xVo5-94oJfRszXBpgjuPSSG1lEL2pl0HcdG98V4OqzRdzzqBPlAuLd2R8AV1je_8xNIueWuiuxPtlek_TI1MjcdxtGleTotzZ2rccwwUlsrUSOWx7Rz8FlKoVIBCTkyNsO8IsfIlPwrxj2vlX_abgKcPCpHfHlA8DzGGlEPlZUmgtBWmb4rz-3EO1VjWidsGIX4-pN91fTr1EwAA__8b8Y-j) under federal control but cannot be deployed to protect federal assets until it hears further arguments. The ruling follows a federal judge's Thursday order that [blocked the deployment](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ_GdEYz_ksoXNyGLrfdEk2wDdYaHBknhLdfkWYfYLsp5pyj7_u6DTeKKa7Tf1q8re-Qh9XvW_K1-jI4_0j5WPxa7ymP395tOVEJVAYBQnMEjnJwFNMxqMbZO7gOG2_xYkBqKbFrZouiwysAAClvjNajg2swpEZBInQuNNGeZQgoEQG1aUMHV6mNc9gFNEozBd7FmktbZ1_9m7aQjvzypR3z0iQ71_rYmPzHRM9Ev-97G_JbnRjnAxP9eTLRf6J8pRrzSolPTyqO_yLycY4jTZmX5ymkKdY99phS3MyFKZgWiumzWP_m6WXFTwAAAP__wj9-Vw) on the grounds that it violates the constitutional principle of state sovereignty. Judge April Perry said the deployment would only "add fuel to the fire" and suggested that "not even Alexander Hamilton could have envisioned one state's militia to be used against another state's residents." ## Woman Killed in Conflict Outside of PetSmart
Keona Zachyua Hampton, 22, allegedly shot and killed a woman in the parking lot of a Dallas PetSmart last week after she reportedly [declined to say](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOkceGxwoXGyT7m27JRrwkFgMNrInL4-_X7G_sPW9urrn_PmavjByTM_fuJOXnzVPiT6VSYTKFOjgfO6UZOa8bBRqZiwrlslo0yvQCuwUMPI5dW3wsw4jtOTh7rTtrYWxffmhR2e63ow4Bz0s6Ia50240Czhydu3a6K8x0GABNPTuto56sL0LAcYVXNc3naYQJZebvEjoB-vKZ_6mclvy3rJ_iRy1sb8a82jM46B8MF1RYx6fvGNSW2SmoGJSAZmxqgPLFtNTcRaFq1BRWJ7vi1PhnN-iUhZV8bw68sK0qTO_FdUFGYWqAhjMXQ_QFh-OT2SO1d2bTj93jPzvlfyfy29v_gYAAP__BiSKQA) "thank you" when the victim, 41-year-old Cecilia Simpson, held the door open for her. Simpson confronted Hampton when the suspect didn't acknowledge the gesture at a nearby store, sparking a heated argument. Hampton followed Simpson and her daughter into the PetSmart, where staff [asked her to leave](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL9utDAQxJ_GdEZem38uXHzSJ7pLE0UpkbldwMqCEXbujrePyCukG2lGo5nf5224-cBhm9_8Si6_pjhs9ExMOdMxIO0cz5W2PHK8fxGmyP6Y_DFopWsJSoIZ0Ac-h6pANyq0UJCDtlGmNgZssTg1qg7BGt10k7aqUgpsPbW6M6OqOjJFcFcZKDAACuqmnKzqTN0ggp2gqWpRKcKQ41HmhTK9fJr4jA86yntcC3ZLznsS5p_QvdC9H-_Xg3KOly10__EudI8h7d-Z5DOufpPomX2SKceDpGemmZBPyYQSyV8yLTHmsM1C91fqFKYPKMx_0I1pW2ttcTjcn4E5pKYVlZpXH_h3UP4bxofTPwEAAP__jdOF6w) when she continued berating them. As Simpson was driving away, Hampton threw a bottle at her vehicle, leading to a physical fight that turned deadly when Hampton shot Simpson. A witness who tried to administer CPR said Hampton was [taunting Simpson](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3yoyAUxZ9GOxwuKP9QUGyTLttu6dzIJTJBceAa49vvuK-w7Tkz5-P35zE-MKa4vn7jQo6_IY8rHTURM5XR05byudDKz5SnN_maE5aAZVRSDQKkAD16jOkc-9a7p_QWWnLwY6QetAbbzi54IJjCDYy5yV6h0iDDgFZZsGiNb6O7wkCCBpAwmC5YedOD8R5sANMPTS_JR86l45mYvlhDOvOHSjflpU1uZt5qo3816t6o-3EcXcjf68XlN-q-10vOC64iIGNKp6hzZpF3rtGT2IjrgoUFBqYifKzbziSuBrFmFhXPuL4Ez7i-xZl3kUOIU8RU2-L8dsSUYjU_TS9fC8b0bxX_H8uPU38DAAD__9-wjDw), urging her to "fight outside." Simpson's mother [called the shooting](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SgyAUhZ9GOxz-JLGg2MYu227pXMMlMgFx4CbGt99xX2G7U5w5P9_PbbpBiGF9fENCSx-fpxX3GpEIy-Rwi_lIuNIc8_2JruYIxUOZJJc9E5wJNTkI8Zh06-zM3SBatOJiuOqVEkO72NmAdnM_AOhBwUWhN0ZK9PIqdI9Ot8GeYYILJQQXven8wK-qN86JwQuj-0ZzdIFy6WhBwg9UH4_8xtLdc2qjXYi22qivRo6NHPd973z-6PPGaWjkeMpGjhXXihFrZe9wp5AqS5kWLKxuCM_K8osYeMLCNqSaoBCrS84U1gc76xgtsD7ZkV9tsW7bQ4yhmkuj-SNBiH9r6H8M31b-BgAA__8m9InX) "senseless," adding that, "_It’s like a bad dream that I can never wake up from_.”
## Fake Story about Texas Woman Goes Viral
A fake story about an Olive Garden waitress who was arrested for throwing breadsticks at customers who didn’t tip is [making life miserable](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAURp8GOwyXH4WCYhu72XZLw8hlJINigIzj229mX2HrL_lOzvm5zTcXU9wf325D294hzzueNWFrWGaPR8rXhnu7p7w80decXAmuzJxxRYFRELN3MV2z7Ly9M2-gQwvjwIQSAky3WrOA5IMImhmtFQSlx8BAeYlaaCWhi_ZzBgwEAAM19MEwLdTgPZgAg1REMvSx5dK3FRu-XQ3pyi8s_ZK3Ltm1taMS8UX4RPh0nme_rCXvn5Xw6aND-ORKi0tCwqec4gvpwxWPO70XdL62uDwrDe6JtLZcLsqBGSlh7I_16Ir1xxlTinUYiWSPzcX0h27_C_ay_DcAAP__l_t-wg) for Megan Ashlee Davis, a student in College Station. The social media post, which includes an authentic mugshot of Davis, has been viewed by over five million people. Davis was [arrested for public intoxication](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0SmzAQhJ8GOjH6AREKFWncOW1K5sQd9o0lxEgy2G-fIXmElDu7s7P7_b7Pd-DA2-MXRHL1s6Z5o7MEqpXyjLSH9I20VR_S8iIsKUBeIc9a6kEoKZSZETh8575F5yVOqiWnRivNYIya2qfTahmW1Rrwk_fGWxy1Qm2mEcj2euhbdleZksooJdVgu3WSP8xgEdW0KtsPTS8Juabc1SdV-kBZwzcdlLslxTa4Z617aczPRt8afTvPs9szR6oc_0Uafbs-XR4UkQIfJB6QkTZxAtdMpQjImUolFAdnCOK9BY58aZ8JsFReXgK57O9KYgnAUSD59_YibLPD_eQQuNix6eUjAoe_y-r_8Tyc_hMAAP__k8iOMA) in August, just a few weeks after her mother's death. A Facebook account with 1.7 million followers used Davis' mugshot and a recycled story to create the post, which appears to have been deleted. "_It's probably like my worst nightmare coming to reality_ ," said Davis, who shared that she has been the victim of inappropriate comments and AI-generated images using her mugshot. The post has proliferated despite a [statement from Olive Garden](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OgzAQBeDTQGfkH3BC4WIbumy7JRqYcbAyYGRbkNx-xV5h29Gn0Xvv5zE-IHDYnt-wkitvH8eNzsxUCqURaef4WWkrE8f5RZgjQ_KQRi11J5QUyowIgT9jW6ObJPaqJqduVprOGNXXiwM5-Rk7a3FSNN-MgtbPc6u1R_Daqjq465mSyiglVWcb38u76Syi6r2ybVe1kjCUmJqyUKE3ZM-feFBq5rjW7JZS9lyZr0oPlR7O87ycCBvSThvSVi5X6eEqdoGYGCs9wEopzHCdIoeDxBMS0iZOCCVRzuIICVh4eJHYYy5i0vfW9Pe-WcrKdXK4n4E5ZHurWvlcIfBfoPK_GQ-nfwMAAP__W0mJEA) saying the story isn’t true.

According to Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, it’s a bill that contains “the entire setup, groundwork, and [infrastructure to move from cash to digital currency](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Umr3DAMAOBf49w8eIk9k0MOhTS3VygUHj0FL3Ji6iXYnsnMvy_pAr309HQU0icJvb8tb8oHn9YvKsLYni4vCY4aoDUoi4U95FeE1HTI5gfYmoMqTpWFESYwJZjyxSofXkvf2VETO9AORnqVhAvO6dBtI9PaEq0sMN3fOFjNKb8SNmjXO6kH1vnxxCihnFJChby4gdy4kNbSwVHZC9QTsL7lcmkbNHiq6sIrP6BcTI5dGLfW9or4J8RmxObjOC57yQ1M82mNr6oePq0VQ1Q-nB2IzSskf69YmYatX31TAdscgionwWeTEJ9uQmA5CNwPjCAmQ0V8IoTiz6eDv22A599bICarM94iPl0J_bqRM4z7_i4Qk_cWF6Pirvya_lsQwfp7RHz6Zf9J1nwvBhCf_hnVldHuhw_BV3lFPVn_3tS1j_3uMbKfAQAA___xDKun).” What appears to be “modernization” may actually be a transition to programmable money. In other words, a digital currency that could be controlled by the federal government. When cash dies, [access to your savings can become conditional](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Umr3DAMAOBf49w8eIk9k0MOhTS3VygUHj0FL3Ji6iXYnsnMvy_pAr309HQU0icJvb8tb8oHn9YvKsLYni4vCY4aoDUoi4U95FeE1HTI5gfYmoMqTpWFESYwJZjyxSofXkvf2VETO9AORnqVhAvO6dBtI9PaEq0sMN3fOFjNKb8SNmjXO6kH1vnxxCihnFJChby4gdy4kNbSwVHZC9QTsL7lcmkbNHiq6sIrP6BcTI5dGLfW9or4J8RmxObjOC57yQ1M82mNr6oePq0VQ1Q-nB2IzSskf69YmYatX31TAdscgionwWeTEJ9uQmA5CNwPjCAmQ0V8IoTiz6eDv22A599bICarM94iPl0J_bqRM4z7_i4Qk_cWF6Pirvya_lsQwfp7RHz6Zf9J1nwvBhCf_hnVldHuhw_BV3lFPVn_3tS1j_3uMbKfAQAA___xDKun). That’s not theoretical. Ask Canada’s truckers what happened when their bank accounts were frozen. This isn’t a currency debate. It’s a sovereignty crisis. If they control your money, they control you. You may be out of options, but there’s one move you could take: Get your free [Retirement Survival Kit](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Umr3DAMAOBf49w8eIk9k0MOhTS3VygUHj0FL3Ji6iXYnsnMvy_pAr309HQU0icJvb8tb8oHn9YvKsLYni4vCY4aoDUoi4U95FeE1HTI5gfYmoMqTpWFESYwJZjyxSofXkvf2VETO9AORnqVhAvO6dBtI9PaEq0sMN3fOFjNKb8SNmjXO6kH1vnxxCihnFJChby4gdy4kNbSwVHZC9QTsL7lcmkbNHiq6sIrP6BcTI5dGLfW9or4J8RmxObjOC57yQ1M82mNr6oePq0VQ1Q-nB2IzSskf69YmYatX31TAdscgionwWeTEJ9uQmA5CNwPjCAmQ0V8IoTiz6eDv22A599bICarM94iPl0J_bqRM4z7_i4Qk_cWF6Pirvya_lsQwfp7RHz6Zf9J1nwvBhCf_hnVldHuhw_BV3lFPVn_3tS1j_3uMbKfAQAA___xDKun) now.

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas National Guard Deployment in Limbo A federal appeals court ruled Saturday that the Texas National Guard can under federal control but cannot be deployed to protect federal assets until it hears further arguments. The ruling follows a federal judge's Thursday order that on the grounds that it violates the constitutional principle of state sovereignty. Judge April Perry said the deployment would only "add fuel to the fire" and suggested that "not even Alexander Hamilton could have envisioned one state's militia to be used against another state's residents." Critics of the activation have of Texas National Guard members and of Texas-based companies. Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt, a Republican, also the move. Around 200 members of the Texas National Guard are currently in Chicago, where federal authorities have to immigration enforcement operations. Woman Killed in Conflict Outside of PetSmart Keona Zachyua Hampton, 22, allegedly shot and killed a woman in the parking lot of a Dallas PetSmart last week after she reportedly "thank you" when the victim, 41-year-old Cecilia Simpson, held the door open for her. Simpson confronted Hampton when the suspect didn't acknowledge the gesture at a nearby store, sparking a heated argument. Hampton followed Simpson and her daughter into the PetSmart, where staff when she continued berating them. As Simpson was driving away, Hampton threw a bottle at her vehicle, leading to a physical fight that turned deadly when Hampton shot Simpson. A witness who tried to administer CPR said Hampton was , urging her to "fight outside." Simpson's mother "senseless," adding that, "It’s like a bad dream that I can never wake up from.” Fake Story about Texas Woman Goes Viral A fake story about an Olive Garden waitress who was arrested for throwing breadsticks at customers who didn’t tip is for Megan Ashlee Davis, a student in College Station. The social media post, which includes an authentic mugshot of Davis, has been viewed by over five million people. Davis was in August, just a few weeks after her mother's death. A Facebook account with 1.7 million followers used Davis' mugshot and a recycled story to create the post, which appears to have been deleted. "It's probably like my worst nightmare coming to reality ," said Davis, who shared that she has been the victim of inappropriate comments and AI-generated images using her mugshot. The post has proliferated despite a saying the story isn’t true. | Flying together with our sponsor Digital Dollar 2.0 May Be Coming On July 17, while the press chased shiny objects and Epstein headlines, the House passed the GENIUS Act. According to Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, it’s a bill that contains “the entire setup, groundwork, and .” What appears to be “modernization” may actually be a transition to programmable money. In other words, a digital currency that could be controlled by the federal government. When cash dies, . That’s not theoretical. Ask Canada’s truckers what happened when their bank accounts were frozen. This isn’t a currency debate. It’s a sovereignty crisis. If they control your money, they control you. Up to 550,000 people are expected to attend this year's festival, held every weekend through Nov. 30. () ➤ Austin: Texas youth camp representatives warned the Department of State Health Services on Friday that a proposal to increase licensing fees could put many camps out of business. The agency indicated the higher fees are needed to offset the cost of enforcing new safety requirements passed in response to this summer's deadly flash flooding. () ➤ Franklin: The Texas and Southwestern Cattle Raisers Association is working with sheriff’s deputies in Burleson and Robertson counties to investigate reports of stolen cattle. () ➤ Godley: An animal rescue group captured 22 stray dogs—13 adults and nine puppies—that have been roaming the community. Johnson County recently partnered with Fort Worth Animal Control to round up the dogs. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This is why the Democrats shut down our government
body:
Help me elect better leadership from New York.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkgn/?__vbtrk=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, the Democrats in Congress are holding our government hostage.
Republican majorities in the House and Senate have come together to pass legislation that will continue to fund the government but the Democrats have chosen to filibuster in the Senate and prevent any spending bill from getting to President Trump’s desk!
We currently need 60 votes to end a Senate filibuster and NOT ONE Democrat is willing to budge and negotiate an end to this madness.
And the worst part is that they aren’t doing this for you. Democrats have not chosen to shut down our government to help veterans, support American families, or to protect our liberties -**but****rather to give healthcare benefits to illegal immigrants.**
This shutdown is designed for Democrats to score political points with their woke liberal base and it proves yet again that they have no vision to improve the lives of the American people.
**They have nothing else to run on** and they believe that prioritizing handouts for those who have broken our laws over the needs of the very people they were elected to serve will help them win the next election.
**The Democrats are the party of _ILLEGALS FIRST_ and _AMERICA LAST_!**
That’s why they have lost control of both Congress and the White House to the GOP and why in states where they still have power, like my home state of New York, they are facing historically low approval numbers.
Governor Kathy Hochul’s failed leadership is making New York unsafe and unaffordable while Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries are doing everything in their power in Congress to prevent our government from putting Americans first.
I am ashamed of the damage that these New York Democrats are causing to the Empire State and our nation... And I am working tirelessly to** FLIP NEW YORK RED.**
My team and I are laying the groundwork right now to elect America First leaders up and down the ticket in New York that will restore our state and help Make America Great Again!
**_[So please, if you’re able, chip in whatever you can TODAY to help me take back New York and defeat the Democrats that are leading the government shutdown](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkgn/?__vbtrk=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[STAND WITH ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkgn/?__vbtrk=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, I have never backed down from a fight and I’m not going to start today.
With your help, we can replace these failed leaders with America First Republicans and keep the pressure on every Democrat who would shut down our government for the benefit of illegals.

**[This is our chance to take our country back.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkgn/?__vbtrk=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) **
I hope you choose to join the fight today and support my mission to Flip New York and SAVE AMERICA.
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkgn/?__vbtrk=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik** Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkgn/?__vbtrk=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2MzUwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

body:
The opposite of most of what you’re reading.
But I promise you this email is different.
| | [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=80a0b8cf36f64fa9a32adcabb1acd607&_e=wKdzc0ueUS4wfNH01FY9SesO30n9Kc0NB9bMsMDHxxd_Y0fyUorIOha08VghuFMIFzcXZcXuTvpfut_UWEw0-mI6paxuK2CxIgXHoif5y1h1D7UYR2a4Qce__nRPIesZd2_V6eYm35smifSK_rvqYyznBoVs33CP9txToXZge1YYD7vFL-Ij-bG9yUTyzx_QckL0DtREQh1cK7J-dZrUNANZtUSHTBj6A2pJ9C_hhzpJ3Ax8PjGE7N8UGisAI_FxCvj_8l677KFNvaUZVMfQEELAIBVf6T39od9lAg2VTKErseZdIBCvLaG7V5LPwwZ4-0Ua71b016uR_xNeCBqtrTsnLa6rI6tqpS8M8X27gQJwrFGNCf4Hu1FWobFGdlxJB086QX5NNUd5vKVR7_ChULZW4BO6TflN6sC0IijU99y3JFtJwnGefVkMOM6ETGc4x-kvk7p9jV6cTSkfI9vD0yp4ELjfPCH4GbVypy_3-XLQNNk2C71ERHGJuxdgiDpgMMcP3mo1qqoF9slRsXchnVyjvJ2jrXzpJXDFNGulYxDYYVHLBqzp8A6tljJo2_JvYYai7xrisCDXlywSKveQhH0zGHmbVBNMsnW6ZIHb9B4%3D)
---
Peter – You’re probably getting lots of emails asking for donations from politicians.
---
_But this email is a bit different._
---
Most of those other emails start off by asking YOU to donate and then guilt you into reaching for your wallet.
---
I refuse to play that game. Instead, I’m starting by telling you what _I’ve_ done.
---
**I personally put $2.5 MILLION toward saving our House Majority last cycle – __not__ for my own re-election or to defend myself from Soros prosecutors who were SUING me.**
---
_That was money to help conservative candidates WIN their toss-up battleground races!_
---
_Just like President Trump, I firmly believe elected officials need to put skin in the game._
---
_**If I’m going to ask you to give, then I better do it too!**_
---
Honest to God, if you cannot give right now, please don’t. You can just stop reading here.
---
[**_But if you can give, we’re going to need all of the help in the country we can get, because we’ve got an emergency on our hands._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=80a0b8cf36f64fa9a32adcabb1acd607&_e=wKdzc0ueUS4wfNH01FY9SesO30n9Kc0NB9bMsMDHxxd_Y0fyUorIOha08VghuFMIFzcXZcXuTvpfut_UWEw0-mI6paxuK2CxIgXHoif5y1h1D7UYR2a4Qce__nRPIesZd2_V6eYm35smifSK_rvqYyznBoVs33CP9txToXZge1YYD7vFL-Ij-bG9yUTyzx_Qi0a4YXC_u5brOFrLmNdsaq1awkZrhcxKdPa2B9rVdv2Yje-Imr0b3mA5DSaGzpFpaxsU8I0w8fHGFfUJqhUVKLNJ4nHqcspffMMRFvKdB5cl_2FLFWDG3nfCNc0c_DGcMX-hhaEAB0Dp-DMg3TXRPoc-UAYzSgkLCzRsqEQGW8kwg6QK8unTuy58jaj0LWnXUlbSw6Crn58rIavCsaRpgsRaNpM53ixNpmsOHW3dRFrave7Kn5KkqYeOQukHLD-cuBNyIZ2WB9oRk-8cAYuDxzFl7Php3_P2naTu95oBZPFB7t8XvIMmmllU5wH4x-n-N__5iSL4GviwZUdUvtyhCAzFMHaavIpWDKzxfw8i0gauH1jLoKqC6C-ZCiBdLQy4cP179BMj5ARwjCS7ARBL9qFVzke78R1QnQafgwToQ7c%3D)
---
**After losing back-to-back special elections, we’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the _bare_ _minimum_ _threshold_ to declare a Majority in the House!**
---
_And now even Obama is coming for our Achilles’ Heel – launching his _own_ $2.5 MILLION campaign to flip the House._
---
_**I’ll be honest with you: after we shifted funds away from my own campaign, we don’t have the funds necessary to stop Obama.**_
---
But with YOUR help right now, we can fight back and win.
---
We’re going to prove that here in America, elections are still decided by We the People.
---
[**So please, make a contribution, and together, let’s save the People’s House now that our majority is hanging by a thread.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=80a0b8cf36f64fa9a32adcabb1acd607&_e=wKdzc0ueUS4wfNH01FY9SesO30n9Kc0NB9bMsMDHxxd_Y0fyUorIOha08VghuFMIFzcXZcXuTvpfut_UWEw0-mI6paxuK2CxIgXHoif5y1h1D7UYR2a4Qce__nRPIesZd2_V6eYm35smifSK_rvqYyznBoVs33CP9txToXZge1YYD7vFL-Ij-bG9yUTyzx_Qas_c2YQMnODsyCYGTKQ1AWoH2lW877VzQuv8wKdKsc_s8AfpYVp-eOPtLihXxZ4CemqGUMp5y_ZwAU_pBo9aUFOaU8neyz0hrwwnMzJOUXMc_gk-CD5kQ9UayMuKdrrPAUKoxL_bADJPzBjy5_sGCXBVXsch3bYlrEm327Nni_ryf4kBTLzBbmJonVuYf-Hn55furARDStrU9kNNSuFHuG_TgZrFH8Ts9rT2_WwMfc7cwrZR5jf07siifwZTOLPC7IUMWr8-9yLzG-71BZO-JsgPyIhex5I81dYLVTtGHRUc7MpToOGg97BxLo1we-XLIffWsk5aGFKhXfQAPL-d4s3FB4G0BBkBeiYdaKEbDgwJRnSNgOxaE5dTQBsNm4-IaoK6E-abXCTEiiatgtxNb83ElWukFC0FvKRdVp9BwGU%3D)

clean_body: The opposite of most of what you’re reading. But I promise you this email is different. | | Peter – You’re probably getting lots of emails asking for donations from politicians. But this email is a bit different. Most of those other emails start off by asking YOU to donate and then guilt you into reaching for your wallet. I refuse to play that game. Instead, I’m starting by telling you what I’ve done. I personally put $2.5 MILLION toward saving our House Majority last cycle – not for my own re-election or to defend myself from Soros prosecutors who were SUING me. That was money to help conservative candidates WIN their toss-up battleground races! Just like President Trump, I firmly believe elected officials need to put skin in the game. If I’m going to ask you to give, then I better do it too! Honest to God, if you cannot give right now, please don’t. You can just stop reading here. After losing back-to-back special elections, we’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the bare minimum threshold to declare a Majority in the House! And now even Obama is coming for our Achilles’ Heel – launching his own $2.5 MILLION campaign to flip the House. I’ll be honest with you: after we shifted funds away from my own campaign, we don’t have the funds necessary to stop Obama. But with YOUR help right now, we can fight back and win. We’re going to prove that here in America, elections are still decided by We the People. | | | | | | Thank you, Jim Jordan P.S. Any amount you can give will truly make a difference. | Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040
