name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Depletion of Hollywood
body:
Hello, I hope the Fall is good on your end.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..VLlBWDlypMM2ydEYJp1eReXEEBtoNKPcHSy5i4AXvcM?) for more
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8b173e3-86b8-4941-8322-c3f9d0b48894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# [The Depletion of Hollywood](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175986908&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1OTg2OTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAzNTcwNDIsImV4cCI6MTc2Mjk0OTA0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BNNIAto_J28uR68FBF1JaIpINlnJ7Q2JaENVHJb7CzE)
| | [Andrew Yang](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---
| Oct 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175986908&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1OTg2OTA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDM1NzA0MiwiZXhwIjoxNzYyOTQ5MDQyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ausgEgNZTujFnlq4AD0avCjCd8Rj3PtcLEIccEHTzU0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175986908&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1OTg2OTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAzNTcwNDIsImV4cCI6MTc2Mjk0OTA0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BNNIAto_J28uR68FBF1JaIpINlnJ7Q2JaENVHJb7CzE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175986908&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1OTg2OTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAzNTcwNDIsImV4cCI6MTc2Mjk0OTA0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BNNIAto_J28uR68FBF1JaIpINlnJ7Q2JaENVHJb7CzE)
---
| | [](https://substack..-ahBXFlT9k6nYNW24Qqyq2qD3T0LFEdIqQdcK_CbziQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/the-depletion-of-hollywood?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hello, I hope the Fall is good on your end.
I grew up in the 80s as a big aficionado of American culture and movies. I remember seeing "Return of the Jedi" with my father in theatres, and the first "Karate Kid" is emblazoned in my mind right down to the soundtrack. Also "The Warriors," Eddie Murphy's comedy specials, Bruce Lee movies, "The Terminator," you get the idea. Part of this was that I was the child of immigrants glomming onto what it meant to be American. Part of it was that there was still a monoculture when, for example, Michael Jackson's 'Thriller' came out. And part of it was that I was a geeky kid who read lots of comic books and loved movies. I even went to Comic Con last week.
I have tried to pass on my enthusiasm for Star Wars and movies to my kids, with mixed results. Young people today are glued to YouTube and TikTok. Most all of the content they see is produced by individual creators.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a5654596-4206-40d3-84d4-8b6a3fef446d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meanwhile, change has come for Hollywood. A story came out in the Wall St. Journal last week called "[L.A.'s Entertainment Economy is Looking Like a Disaster Movie](https://substack.com/redirect/671e0075-3fa7-4f9a-acc8-51f377bec02d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" about how the creative middle class of Los Angeles has been decimated over the past several years. Caterers, production assistants, writers, a cartoonist who worked on Mulan, camera people and thousands of others are out of work. One makeup artist became a phlebotomist at a 66% pay cut. The number of workers in the industry shrank from 142,000 to 100,000 in just two years, and many have left LA altogether.
Some of these stories are very sad, including the cookie store proprietor who declared personal bankruptcy after her two stores closed because there weren't enough TV or movie sets that needed catering anymore. TV shoot days collapsed 58% over the last 3 years. I have friends in LA who told me "Survive until '25" was their mantra. But '25 hasn't brought a rebound; indeed, it's gotten even worse.
This isn't an AI story - yet - though that's clearly around the corner and was part of the strikes. Shooting productions in LA has become expensive relative to other locales, in part because the labor in LA is generally higher-paid. L.A. is now the sixth-most popular site for making movies, a steep drop. The writers and actors' strikes derailed productions and the industry never fully bounced back. Streaming services have found that dollars haven't followed so fewer projects are being greenlit. The Palisades fires drove some out of town. And movie box office receipts are still way lower than they were pre-COVID as Americans are less in the habit of going to see movies in the theater, as it's a lot tougher on the wallet than home viewing.
It reminds me a little bit of New York in the 90s, when friends of mine worked for magazines like Complex, Lucky, Maxim and Time. Now most of those publications have disappeared or migrated online and those friends left the field. They were some of the folks who made living in the city awesome in my twenties.
The storytelling capital of the U.S. is emptying out. The place where people went to try to catch on or learn a craft is disappearing.
Look, I know that there are now different types of creators, and there are a lot of groups of workers suffering out there; some won't find the story of Los Angeles particularly sympathetic, even knowing that a lot of these folks are blue-collar crew members. But a way of life being decimated is sad. Thousands of people made lives and careers and homes doing something of value, and now it's evaporating. I didn't like it when it happened to the factory workers or the local journalists or recent college graduates either.
Plus, what's happening to Hollywood is going to happen to a lot of us upcoming. AI will soon supplant a lot of content creation; it could even replace the current wave of influencers. Mr. Beast, the most popular YouTuber in the world, posted last week: "When AI videos are just as good as normal videos, I wonder . . . how it will impact the millions of creators currently making content for a living . . . scary times."
If you don't feel something for the former workers of Hollywood, I'm sure it will hit closer to home eventually. The big question is what, if anything, will we do?
For a political movement to fuel change, check out [Forward](https://substack.com/redirect/f4b623b5-4626-478a-a6d1-79d5c5a21e17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This week I interview Jonathan Ng Sposato, the founder and CEO of Joysauce, a new TV network spotlighting Asian Americans on the [podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/c0974b67-eae3-4b3d-aefb-d7af31e9c3e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Offlineparty.com](https://substack.com/redirect/445dd23c-bdc2-4bdf-b05e-b1da264cfd02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is coming to Philly next week and then to Brooklyn, Chicago, SF and LA! Noble Mobile is growing quickly - ping [matt@noblemobile.com](https://substack.com/redirect/853962b0-2c37-49b3-bc23-d334fb320121?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if you could use a hook up with some free wireless or want to find out how to get rewarded for looking up and touching grass.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8b173e3-86b8-4941-8322-c3f9d0b48894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

---
| | | [Like](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175986908&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1OTg2OTA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDM1NzA0MiwiZXhwIjoxNzYyOTQ5MDQyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ausgEgNZTujFnlq4AD0avCjCd8Rj3PtcLEIccEHTzU0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175986908&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1OTg2OTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAzNTcwNDIsImV4cCI6MTc2Mjk0OTA0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BNNIAto_J28uR68FBF1JaIpINlnJ7Q2JaENVHJb7CzE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Tennessee Three
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

You may know our most recent 2026 congressional endorsement, Justin J.
Pearson, as one of the Tennessee Three. If you haven’t heard about this or
forget the details, let us share the inspiring story with you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251013.kbtJIV&refcode=em20251013-37100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1 ]But first, will you chip in any amount to help us send Justin to
represent TN-09 in Congress?

On March 27, 2023, a horrific mass shooting was carried out at the
Covenant School, an elementary school in Nashville, Tennessee, killing
three nine-year-old students and three staff members.

This violent tragedy was not an isolated incident, but part of the
worsening gun violence epidemic running rampant in our country, as leaders
in the pockets of the NRA and gun industry refuse — time after time — to
step in and pass commonsense gun reform to save lives.

Three days after this mass shooting, hundreds of community members
gathered at the Tennessee state capitol to make it clear: thoughts and
prayers are not enough — our children and communities deserve action.

Three Democratic lawmakers, including Rep. Justin J. Pearson, courageously
chose to join their constituents in peaceful protest, chanting “No action,
no peace" through a bullhorn on the House floor’s public chambers. From
that moment on, the Republican supermajority was determined to make an
example out of them, and they became known as the Tennessee Three.

In an unprecedented and authoritarian move, Tennessee Republicans made it
their mission to punish Justin and his colleagues for exercising their
First Amendment rights by voting for their expulsion, under the guise of
“breached decorum” — a move usually reserved for serious misconduct by
lawmakers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251013.kbtJIV&refcode=em20251013-37100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1 ]Politico: What to know about ‘the Tennessee three’ after two Dems are
expelled. Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson were both booted from the
state House, while the vote to expel Rep. Gloria Johnson failed. Photo of
Justin, Justin, and Gloria holding their hands in the air.

Rep. Gloria Johnson was spared expulsion by one vote, but Justin and his
fellow colleague, Rep. Justin Jones, were expelled from their seats. The
GOP cynically tried to silence two young, Black leaders for standing side
by side with their constituents and calling for action to save our
children from the wrath of gun violence.

As Justin wrote in a CNN opinion piece, “In Tennessee, the birthplace of
the Ku Klux Klan and where multiple Klan, White Nationalist, and neo-Nazi
organizations still thrive, the condescension and barely-veiled racism
heaped on Justin Jones and me, and on the communities we represent, were
on full display.”

What came next was a nationwide uproar. Justin did not give up or go
silent — he continued to raise his voice, speak truth to power, and rally
community members in the fight for justice.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251013.kbtJIV&refcode=em20251013-37100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1 ]Image from Bazaar photoshoot of Justin Jones and Justin Pearson

Six days after his wrongful expulsion, Justin was reappointed to his seat
by the Shelby County Board of Commissioners in a unanimous vote, and then
won a special election to retain his seat that August with almost 94% of
the vote.

It goes to show that true power is with the people, and far-right forces —
from the Tennessee Republican Party to Donald Trump and his MAGA cult in
Congress — know that and are afraid of it. That’s why they’re attacking
our most fundamental freedoms, but together, we can stop them.

Justin is ready to take this fighting spirit to Washington on behalf of
the working people of Memphis and join Justice Democrats like Summer Lee,
Rashida Tlaib, and Delia Ramirez in working to stop fascism while pushing
for bold solutions to gun violence, economic inequality, climate change,
and more.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251013.kbtJIV&refcode=em20251013-37100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1005&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1 ]But we’re going up against powerful, wealthy forces, so it’s going to
take ALL of us to win. Your contribution of $5 or more will
directly fuel our movement and help send him there: please pitch in
whatever you can.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251013.kbtJIV&refcode=em20251013-37100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1024&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251013-37100-footer&t=1025&refcode2=37100_1203867_QBIgI1&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=37100%2E1203867%2EQBIgI1

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

You know I don’t play by the rules, so _**I’m spilling the dirty truth that Washington doesn’t want you to know:**_ [**Chuck Schumer is TERRIFIED that AOC could primary him and _WIN._**](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evI4ITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE) That’s the _**REAL**_ reason why he**SHUT DOWN** the government. AOC has raised over **15 MILLION** in the first 6 months of the year—**and she’s not using the money for re-election in her own district.** **_She’s preparing for something much bigger, and Chuck Schumer knows it._**
---
[ **LET'S DRIVE AOC CRAZY!** ](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evI5ITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)
---
That’s why he’s **SCRAMBLING** and catering to the **far-Left lunatics** with a government shutdown, because _**they would rather pay for illegal alien healthcare than our troops.**_ But this is much bigger than the shutdown, **Patriot**. I hate to admit it, but AOC’s popularity is _**RISING.**_ **_And you know her base is crazy enough to elect her Senator, or worse... _PRESIDENT.__** **[Just look at what’s happening with Zohran Mamdani in New York—AOC’s home state.](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evI6ITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)** **Patriot** , I’ve stood up to AOC and the corrupt establishment, and they _**HATE**_ me for it. **[But I don’t care. I LOVE living rent-free in AOC’s tiny little brain.](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evI7ITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)** So let’s do something together that will _**MAKE HER GO INSANE!**_ **If every patriot who reads this donates just $1, we have a chance of CRUSHING HER.** I want to **_shake her to her core_** and send an **OVERWHELMING** message to her socialist cronies: **WE’RE NOT BACKING DOWN.**
---
[ **RUSH $1 TO CRUSH AOC** ](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evI8ITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)
---
I’m running for Governor to bring our America First mission to the _**next level.**_ **[If AOC wins, she’ll turn our country into a haven for TRANNIES, illegals, criminals, and Leftwing loonies.](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evI9ITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)** We **CAN’T** let her win the battle. [**RUSH $1 NOW TO LIVE RENT-FREE IN AOC’S BRAIN********⬇️⬇️**](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evIaITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)
---
[ **LIVE RENT-FREE IN AOC'S BRAIN** ](https://e.e.conservativevictorynow.com/re?l=D0I2xufmngItepw1evIbITmgpcacw5&s=HLKDMOCCNBHMELCE)
---
**Hold The Line.** **— Nancy Mace**

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd5g50qfh9ipf40eg52uoblu3l9rgqasag114c40_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs) [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7nhq87ad5qljd5hjhmpvmv3kth7610tcgdjfbr0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z90ican7dmijjkaugfna7t55v71c92s6s1qmna3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc6meu2vp5klq2jnf5qla8e1eprho0p04tef9tlg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znqkoji56qet2emaqrlv5ll5oci7b0g67nd3iq88_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcum6191h0frjo4m1skp9pb17if00ae3a6illqi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5qmnjcv32nghl9lkckpp7rcd5ln7klbvq6cvn68_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4clg66o34cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zca14l4if7nuukd9p9bali0ikminh1hhoq8dsid8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36c3h2bs)_

They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi3hbcanmcltf17nbb1lqmfq0i8tqpcumr7q96no_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36cjh2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkfr98cd4sfpaoo76k672nbv61e6o6e31m95uueg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36cjh2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlaijh79cb1b7659dbr97nba6ao0uhp1023bh8c8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmco36cjh2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: A week behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
While we paused, Democrats kept right on fundraising.
| **__A Personal Note from Elise Stefanik__**
---
Friend,
As I’ve said previously, when the Democrats shut down the government at the start of the month, I paused all of our fundraising.
**The last thing I wanted to do was bother you with emails and texts at a time when millions of Americans are struggling because the Democrats decided to hold our country hostage to try and benefit _illegals_ at your expense.**
In fact, I believe so strongly that the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority that I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
_But while we were paused, the Democrats kept right on fundraising..._
| **Dems push for $15 from supporters in fundraiser, pin shutdown on Trump and GOP**
“Leading Democrats began fundraising off the government shutdown, blaming Republicans and President Donald Trump despite having **voted against a bipartisan extension** to _keep_ government operations running.”
[Source: _MEAWW News_]
---
Honestly, we should have expected nothing less from a party so radical that they were willing to shut down the government in order to give healthcare to _illegals_!
As the Democrats continued to fundraise, I realized we couldn’t remain paused and allow them to take advantage of the shutdown to gain an edge for the midterms.
...Especially not when we’re locked in two battles with razor-thin margins:
_**Right now, we’re just _1 SEAT_ over the threshold to declare a majority in the House and the latest polling shows me BEATING Kathy Hochul by _1-POINT_ once voters are made aware of our positions. **_
**But because of our pause, we’re now starting off October a week behind on fundraising.**
_Earlier this year, you helped me make up 5 months of fundraising in just a few weeks. Now, I need your help making up this week of fundraising in just a few days._
If there’s any group of grassroots Americans who can pull it off, it’s my supporters._You’ve always come through for me when I needed it most._
And now more than ever, I’m counting on your support, Friend.
We’ve fought so hard to both DEFEND the House and get into a position where, with the right messaging and support, we can BEAT Kathy Hochul and SAVE New York.
It would be devastating to squander that opportunity because we fell behind on fundraising and lacked the resources to tell Americans the TRUTH about Hochul and the Democrats.
[**So please, if you can, make a grassroots contribution to help us CATCH UP now that we’re starting off the month a week behind in fundraising – _and I’ll ensure it goes FIVE TIMES AS FAR._**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4aa29ea489094f808edb97912a722c6b&_e=SR1mZayhbtwuq4_2WXQE2DoLLFlzs-7cMbfNHzQFma3HHCkJKHBBQgg_c3wTkWFxhCdMgg-l9gB-piIAegidmDjSQLvFrvc2E0t1jwaPPSqyd4m8RxvPXk_jlFfLSMpAb-LX1A13eluHwtExhSg3U2vRfFZ-smXeErFDP81Qv4USdGH78uYm7-5BXQJxmsVT5l5hoz_fHzwnodDCBT2iufXcmEAKuoWVeLLzM4wn0zmUQIJI33jxZUzrXJx-NnvGyJb4s9JVC8hKTnOK1jG9UHXSIEExyQEAOVZ_DaCc3psgTBgpZz7UcI3vf452LqRj_MQ7L_ZeuqY2w7GP2wEWYuHnYTrQU8E5yRqLYWhjfld2xAaBYjLVGCPAMtqJFMSHGotHnjHMUkQV5ZZ_eNKUt55zaxeI8VeHJXB8OPFu7yaz62eUhfGsPeamhxskUvdZTDlGF9hITImBGb6Lu78H3mPHQEN6A96jywaQWivYcvwe0owiuxrwfSyddXi6IwYAEdEvrrxkceytgVSfr_Bdwy1A_HW3TEcGShqX4LbdPhcAIoEQw6ORbP8zXYwxRxtNeYdqnl9sfRudYAtjvLwZTD1ZZVUp8FogFwm4M_HASmY%3D)

But because of our pause, we’re now starting off October a week behind on fundraising. Earlier this year, you helped me make up 5 months of fundraising in just a few weeks. Now, I need your help making up this week of fundraising in just a few days. If there’s any group of grassroots Americans who can pull it off, it’s my supporters.You’ve always come through for me when I needed it most. And now more than ever, I’m counting on your support, Friend. We’ve fought so hard to both DEFEND the House and get into a position where, with the right messaging and support, we can BEAT Kathy Hochul and SAVE New York. It would be devastating to squander that opportunity because we fell behind on fundraising and lacked the resources to tell Americans the TRUTH about Hochul and the Democrats. | | | | | | Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership | Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zunuc8tjnovcrpp1anq05j23br4l96bape65b0hg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmcp76clh2bs) [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zktmnsesi3lni2cltc4apfg04u6belancvnpbr0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmcp76clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgrphhbqbdg9ctvlcnk1es43gurpb0hon61oo4d8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmcp76clh2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z99fc5h7uu40kqpqbkbslgpcok30911d8dlipf3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmcp76clh2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhufruqeujeutffcu7vthepnssdottpo78ot65q0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmcp76clh2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7838724okpgvoliuspfo0n9jmu233io6nut3iig_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmcp76clh2bs)

body:
Republicans flee DC as millions lose health care
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K7ESN9C0AJWXK24JVPGTXRZ4_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K7ESN9C0AJWXK24JVPGTXRZ4_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, **This government shutdown is the fourth under Trump - and this one is less than 250 days into his second term.**
This shutdown comes after Republicans caused prices to skyrocket and they made one of the BIGGEST cuts to healthcare in our country’s history. With this government shut down, 22 million Americans are threatened with even higher healthcare premiums.
Trump’s big, disastrous budget bill only benefits his billionaire pals and family members. Meanwhile, 15 million Americans will lose access to healthcare. More hospitals in rural areas across Tennessee are closing thanks to new cuts to Medicaid and Tennessee Republicans’ ongoing refusal to expand under the Affordable Care Act.
The bottom line is that the American people deserve better than a corrupt president who said he would “be proud to shut down the government.” That’s not leadership. That’s deserting his sacred responsibility to lead this country for the benefit of everyone. How is the country better if millions of Americans are left without pay or healthcare?
This is where we need YOU, Peter. We need to take a stand and tell Tennessee Republicans that they’re running away from the job that people ELECTED them to do. Every dollar we raise will be used to hold Republicans running our state into the ground accountable.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48f70ee2-99c4-407e-9bef-12c2eec9929d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnl0aGViYWxsb3QuY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNzQ4Mzc2MzYsInMiOjUxNTY1NjYsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjAzNjA5MDYsImV4cCI6MjA3NTkzNjkwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.Jf0UKouwhXoFc07IkKW3BUIxpsD2VQ8K1NX2IUBmJng?)
With national 24/7 news channels and wall-to-wall White House coverage, it's always about flipping the Senate, taking back the House, or primarying someone on a federal level. That's the shiny object. But the real battleground right now isn't Congress--it's the state legislatures. Those are the last line of defense.
Republicans control 28 state legislatures, Democrats control 21 (excluding Nebraska's unique setup). That means most states don't have the same protection from Trump's administration as Democratic states do. And Trump himself has said he'd rather let states decide their own laws.
While it's tempting to focus on getting more progressives into Congress, the biggest impact--and biggest gains to be made--are in the statehouses.
And you know who's understood this for decades? Republicans. The GOP has systematically stacked state legislatures, supreme courts, county boards, and school boards. It's been a slow burn for years, and it's now paying off. If Democrats want lasting, direct change, we need to build the infrastructure **from the bottom up.**
## **Direct Impacts**
Though many state legislatures only meet for part of the year, their influence is enormous. They introduce far more bills than Congress--sometimes as much as **23 times more annually**. The smaller district sizes and closer proximity to constituents means state reps and senators take up a wider variety of issues, including very local problems that would never reach the federal level.
Think about it this way: in most companies, you've got your boss, your boss's boss, and then the C-Suite, board of directors, and CEO. The C-Suite and board (Congress and the President) set the overall direction, but those decisions often take years to trickle down. Your boss's boss (the Governor) influences things above you, but you're only indirectly affected. Your boss (the state legislature) makes the decisions that shape your daily life immediately--what you work on, how your environment functions, and what rules you operate under.
That's the role of state legislatures in government. They control the "everyday levers" of policy, backed by the Constitution's Tenth Amendment, which reserves powers not given to the federal government for the states and the people. That means legislatures oversee:
* **Education** - determining most school funding, setting curricula, and academic standards.
* **Healthcare** - managing Medicaid, regulating health insurance, overseeing nursing homes.
* **Crime and safety** - writing criminal codes, setting penalties, and supervising police.
* **Transportation** - funding roads, maintaining infrastructure, regulating licenses and registration.
* **Elections** - running voter registration, defining voting processes, and drawing districts.

And unlike Congress, state legislatures are often more efficient. Less partisan gridlock. Faster legislative sessions. Bills tailored to local problems. That means state laws usually take effect much faster than federal legislation, creating immediate changes in people's lives.
Because districts are smaller, residents also have a much greater ability to influence outcomes. While a U.S. Senator may have staff to filter thousands of calls and emails, many state reps personally answer correspondence from constituents. A determined group of residents can move the needle in a statehouse in a way that would be almost impossible in Congress.
## **The GOP 's Decades-Long Legislative Power Grab**
In 1973, Mark Rhoads, an Illinois state house staffer, started the Conservative Caucus of State Legislators to counter the Environmental Protection Agency, wage controls, and other federal actions in the wake of Barry Goldwater's defeat. The name was eventually changed to the **American Legislative Exchange Council (ALEC)** , co-founded by Heritage Foundation founder Paul Weyrich, future congressman Henry Hyde, and Ronald Reagan's PAC director Lou Barnett.
What ALEC does is deceptively simple: it churns out **" model bills"** for conservative state legislators, pre-drafted by right-wing activists and corporate interests. Lawmakers can take these bills back to their chambers, file them with minimal edits, and pass them into law. In effect, [ALEC has become a ](https://substack.com/redirect/1dead5d7-7524-46d1-a5c0-2c031ecd1463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**["bill mill"](https://substack.com/redirect/1dead5d7-7524-46d1-a5c0-2c031ecd1463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that mass-produces legislation across all 50 states, giving Republicans a pipeline of ready-made laws that push conservative priorities.
The scope of this influence is staggering: in just 7 years, **over 600 ALEC-modeled bills were enacted nationwide**. Its structure is corporate-like, with multiple task forces specializing in everything from taxes to social issues. ALEC's ability to marry the agendas of global corporations with state politicians has made it one of the most powerful engines of conservative policymaking in U.S. history.
ALEC's fingerprints are everywhere:
* [In the 1980s,](https://substack.com/redirect/64558744-4e59-40d3-b09c-bb489b250f9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it pushed **anti-gay propaganda** , claiming homosexuality caused psychological harm and led to pedophilia. By 1989, it had published a model bill criminalizing HIV-positive people for having consensual sex without disclosure--a law born out of AIDS panic and fearmongering.

* [In 2005](https://substack.com/redirect/f19e64f6-a3a9-4fc2-bd09-f7e55a974ac7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Florida passed ALEC's "Stand Your Ground" law. Within years, **30 states adopted it** , and it became the legal basis for George Zimmerman's acquittal after killing Trayvon Martin in 2012.
* In 2011, ALEC published a ["State Legislators' Guide to Repealing ObamaCare"](https://substack.com/redirect/047c393d-3e65-408a-8e28-08cd8cdfe1d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and rolled out model bills to block the ACA. Insurance giants like Humana and UnitedHealthcare directly benefited from ALEC legislation that saved them money while raising costs for patients.
* [On behalf of Altria](https://substack.com/redirect/1dead5d7-7524-46d1-a5c0-2c031ecd1463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (formerly Phillip Morris), ALEC advanced tax breaks for flavored tobacco products to make them cheaper and more attractive to teenagers.

And yet, ALEC maintains its IRS status as a **501(c)(3) "educational" nonprofit**, allowing it to dodge lobbying rules and accept tax-deductible donations from corporations and foundations. In reality, ALEC is a lobbying juggernaut, albeit one with a different name. Common Cause even filed an IRS complaint in 2011, arguing that ALEC's activities should legally be reclassified as lobbying.
The long-term vision is even more chilling. At ALEC's 2022 summit, one commentator said the quiet part out loud: if the conservative constitutional convention movement succeeds in rewriting the U.S. Constitution, America will finally become the "conservative nation" ALEC has spent decades working toward.
Through ALEC, Republicans found a turbocharger for their state-level strategy: **a machine that mass-produces regressive policies while training and equipping lawmakers to pass them efficiently.** Democrats, meanwhile, underestimated just how effective this bottom-up power is.
## **Republicans ' Electoral Route to Dominance**
[In 2010](https://substack.com/redirect/2d50fddf-f514-4ccf-8bb7-641e454f6465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Karl Rove outlined the plan for the next election in state legislatures and said, _" He who controls the maps can control Congress."_ Rove didn't just hint at a plan -- he bragged about it in the _Wall Street Journal_ like a Bond villain revealing his master scheme. With the census around the corner, Rove and his Republican allies unveiled the **Redistricting Majority Project (REDMAP)** , a blueprint to target just 107 key legislative districts in 18 state chambers. If they could flip control, they would redraw the maps and lock in power for a decade or more.
The strategy had already been tested. In 2002, Republicans seized control of the Texas state house and immediately redrew the state's congressional maps. Overnight, Democrats' 17-13 edge in the Texas delegation became a 20-12 Republican majority. Safe Democratic seats became impenetrable GOP strongholds, and Republican incumbents suddenly had the luxury of stockpiling money to help allies elsewhere. The lesson was clear: **win the maps, and you win the future.**
By 2010, Democrats held 11 of the 18 chambers Rove identified; Republicans held 7. After Rove and Republicans pumped millions into those key districts in the 2010 elections? Republicans controlled all 18. REDMAP worked exactly as designed.
The numbers tell the story:
* **Before 2010:** Democrats held a 4,047-3,326 advantage in state legislative seats nationwide.
* **After REDMAP:** Republicans flipped that margin, and by 2011, they were redrawing maps across the country to cement power.
* **Today:** Republicans hold a 4,063-3,214 advantage, a structural edge that has kept them competitive in Congress even when they lose the national popular vote.

REDMAP's impact went beyond raw numbers. It gave Republicans the power to:
* **Gerrymander purple states into red fortresses** , locking Democrats out of Congress despite winning statewide races.
* **Supercharge state legislatures** with safe Republican majorities, allowing ALEC's corporate bill mill to churn out regressive policies with little resistance.
* **Starve Democrats of resources** , forcing them to spend big just to compete in districts that had been deliberately carved to favor Republicans.

Rove was right: the party that controls the maps controls the future. And Democrats, distracted by Washington's glitz and obsessed with the presidency, let Republicans quietly capture the real engine of political power. By the time they looked down from Capitol Hill, the floor had already been pulled out from under them.
## **The Roadmap to Redemption**
For over 13 years, Republicans have controlled nearly 60% of state legislatures, fueled by the perfect storm: REDMAP's gerrymandering, ALEC's bill mill, and Democrats' complacency during the Obama years. While Democrats chased the glamour of Congress and the White House, Republicans were quietly building trenches in state capitals. By the time Democrats woke up, the battlefield was already rigged.
We had a shot of adrenaline after Trump's first term. Volunteers flooded the streets, statehouse campaigns saw unprecedented energy, and Democrats flipped chambers in Virginia, Colorado, New Mexico, and Minnesota. But that fire dimmed under Biden, compounded by the pandemic, and Republicans seized the chance to dig in further. Now, with another Trump administration barreling ahead, Democrats are again at risk of missing the forest for the trees.
The truth is this: **Congress is flashy, but state legislatures are where the change actually happens.** That's not just rhetoric; it's how federalism was designed. The Tenth Amendment gives states sweeping power over education, healthcare, criminal law, transportation, and elections. The day-to-day struggles that make or break people's lives aren't set in Washington -- they're decided in Richmond, Tallahassee, Austin, Harrisburg, and Lansing.
And Republicans know it. They've run everywhere, even in deep-blue states, and invested in infrastructure to support their candidates from school boards to statehouses. Democrats, meanwhile, often treat red districts as lost causes. That has to change.
There's a reason this year in Virginia made headlines: Democrats filed a candidate in **every single one of the 100 House of Delegates seats.** That forced Republicans to defend turf everywhere, draining their resources and keeping them from funneling money to battlegrounds. That's the model we need to replicate nationwide. Imagine if we did that in Pennsylvania, Georgia, Wisconsin, or North Carolina. Even if we didn't win all those seats, we'd make Republicans fight on every front instead of cherry-picking their battlegrounds.
The payoff isn't just immediate -- it's generational. Once Democrats win back these chambers, we can redraw maps in 2030. Trump is already pressuring GOP legislatures to pass unconstitutional gerrymanders in 2025. So yes, Democrats must be willing to play hardball, too. If Republicans can twist maps into grotesque, snake-shaped caricatures of democracy, why shouldn't we redraw them to empower working people, protect communities of color, and actually reflect voters?
Governors matter here, too. We need executives with teeth who won't roll over when Trump's administration leans on them. Leaders like Wes Moore in Maryland, Gretchen Whitmer in Michigan, JB Pritzker in Illinois, Josh Shapiro in Pennsylvania, Andy Beshear in Kentucky, and Gavin Newsom in California have demonstrated what it means to resist authoritarianism while delivering for their constituents. And we have the chance to add more -- like electing Rep. Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey, protecting Democratic majorities in Pennsylvania's courts and legislature, and, right here in Virginia, making Abigail Spanberger the first woman Governor in the Commonwealth's history while cementing a Democratic trifecta.
**There are currently 7 state legislatures with a narrow margin where key investments would make a massive impact:**
* Arizona
* House - 14 D - 21 R
* Senate- 13 D - 17 R
* Maine
* House - 76 D - 73 R
* Senate - 20 D - 15 R
* Michigan
* House - 52 D - 58 R
* Senate - 19 D - 18 R
* Minnesota
* House - 67 D - 67 R
* Senate - 33 D - 32 R
* Pennsylvania
* House - 102 D - 101 R
* Senate - 23 D - 27 R
* Virginia
* House - 51 D - 48 R
* Senate - 21 D - 19Rq
* Wisconsin
* House - 45 D - 54 R
* Senate - 15 D - 18 R

That is just 50 seats to effect massive change in the country and that's just a start.
**But none of this happens without us. Volunteers and donors need to stop thinking only in terms of presidential or congressional races. Don 't just go out and help US Senate or US House candidates. Knock doors for your delegate. Phone bank for your state senator. Donate to a local candidate whose name you didn't even know yesterday. Because here's the truth: those are the people who will impact your healthcare, your kids' schools, your voting rights, your grocery bill, and your day-to-day life.**
If Democrats start investing big in statehouses now, the payout in Washington will be tenfold later. We can't just fight for the White House and hope the ripple effects will save us. We need to build from the bottom up, state by state, district by district, until we've rebuilt the infrastructure Republicans spent decades perfecting.
The road to redemption isn't in D.C. -- it starts in your backyard.
Here are some links for you to get involved before election day on November 025 if you are able:
* [Volunteer for Abigail Spanberger for Governor](https://substack.com/redirect/822e77a1-9739-4b76-a7c0-1df6e339dbd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Volunteer for Ghazala Hashmi for Lt. Governor](https://substack.com/redirect/358358a5-61bf-482a-a43b-cf71d055541f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Volunteer for Jay Jones for Attorney General](https://substack.com/redirect/be882fd0-76c6-4f52-82b1-3cac1c893217?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Volunteer for Virginia Democrats in the State House](https://substack.com/redirect/ad0a6cdf-bbf3-4102-9ffc-388fcf938a73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Volunteer for Rural Democrats in Virginia](https://substack.com/redirect/95cffe16-0df1-4369-9628-eee283b08ed3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Help out 27 Democrats in Red Districts in Virginia](https://substack.com/redirect/065e3cd8-4c53-40d2-9338-5e290a6da341?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

### **TL;DR**
Republicans have spent decades building power from the bottom up -- stacking state legislatures, courts, and local offices while Democrats focused too much on Washington. Tools like ALEC's model bills and Karl Rove's REDMAP gerrymandering strategy have locked in GOP dominance across the country, giving them control over everyday issues like schools, healthcare, and voting rights.
If Democrats want lasting change, they must invest seriously in statehouse races -- everywhere, not just in swing states. Running candidates in every district (like Virginia did this year) forces Republicans to fight everywhere, drains their resources, and sets Democrats up to redraw fair maps after the 2030 census. Governors with backbone, like Whitmer, Moore, and Shapiro, show how state-level leadership can defend against Trumpism.
**The bottom line:** The fight for America's future won't be won in D.C. first -- it will be won in statehouses. If Democrats want to protect democracy, they need to prioritize state legislatures now.

With national 24/7 news channels and wall-to-wall White House coverage, it's always about flipping the Senate, taking back the House, or primarying someone on a federal level. That's the shiny object. But the real battleground right now isn't Congress--it's the state legislatures. Those are the last line of defense. Republicans control 28 state legislatures, Democrats control 21 (excluding Nebraska's unique setup). That means most states don't have the same protection from Trump's administration as Democratic states do. And Trump himself has said he'd rather let states decide their own laws. While it's tempting to focus on getting more progressives into Congress, the biggest impact--and biggest gains to be made--are in the statehouses. And you know who's understood this for decades? Republicans. The GOP has systematically stacked state legislatures, supreme courts, county boards, and school boards. It's been a slow burn for years, and it's now paying off. If Democrats want lasting, direct change, we need to build the infrastructure from the bottom up. Direct Impacts Though many state legislatures only meet for part of the year, their influence is enormous. They introduce far more bills than Congress--sometimes as much as 23 times more annually. The smaller district sizes and closer proximity to constituents means state reps and senators take up a wider variety of issues, including very local problems that would never reach the federal level. Think about it this way: in most companies, you've got your boss, your boss's boss, and then the C-Suite, board of directors, and CEO. The C-Suite and board (Congress and the President) set the overall direction, but those decisions often take years to trickle down. Your boss's boss (the Governor) influences things above you, but you're only indirectly affected. Your boss (the state legislature) makes the decisions that shape your daily life immediately--what you work on, how your environment functions, and what rules you operate under. That's the role of state legislatures in government. They control the "everyday levers" of policy, backed by the Constitution's Tenth Amendment, which reserves powers not given to the federal government for the states and the people. That means legislatures oversee: Education - determining most school funding, setting curricula, and academic standards. Healthcare - managing Medicaid, regulating health insurance, overseeing nursing homes. Crime and safety - writing criminal codes, setting penalties, and supervising police. Transportation - funding roads, maintaining infrastructure, regulating licenses and registration. Elections - running voter registration, defining voting processes, and drawing districts. And unlike Congress, state legislatures are often more efficient. Less partisan gridlock. Faster legislative sessions. Bills tailored to local problems. That means state laws usually take effect much faster than federal legislation, creating immediate changes in people's lives. Because districts are smaller, residents also have a much greater ability to influence outcomes. While a U.S. Senator may have staff to filter thousands of calls and emails, many state reps personally answer correspondence from constituents. A determined group of residents can move the needle in a statehouse in a way that would be almost impossible in Congress. Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey, protecting Democratic majorities in Pennsylvania's courts and legislature, and, right here in Virginia, making Abigail Spanberger the first woman Governor in the Commonwealth's history while cementing a Democratic trifecta. There are currently 7 state legislatures with a narrow margin where key investments would make a massive impact: Arizona House - 14 D - 21 R Senate- 13 D - 17 R Maine House - 76 D - 73 R Senate - 20 D - 15 R Michigan House - 52 D - 58 R Senate - 19 D - 18 R Minnesota House - 67 D - 67 R Senate - 33 D - 32 R Pennsylvania House - 102 D - 101 R Senate - 23 D - 27 R Virginia House - 51 D - 48 R Senate - 21 D - 19Rq Wisconsin House - 45 D - 54 R Senate - 15 D - 18 R That is just 50 seats to effect massive change in the country and that's just a start. But none of this happens without us. Volunteers and donors need to stop thinking only in terms of presidential or congressional races. Don 't just go out and help US Senate or US House candidates. Knock doors for your delegate. Phone bank for your state senator. Donate to a local candidate whose name you didn't even know yesterday. Because here's the truth: those are the people who will impact your healthcare, your kids' schools, your voting rights, your grocery bill, and your day-to-day life. If Democrats start investing big in statehouses now, the payout in Washington will be tenfold later. We can't just fight for the White House and hope the ripple effects will save us. We need to build from the bottom up, state by state, district by district, until we've rebuilt the infrastructure Republicans spent decades perfecting. The road to redemption isn't in D.C. -- it starts in your backyard. Here are some links for you to get involved before election day on November 025 if you are able: TL;DR Republicans have spent decades building power from the bottom up -- stacking state legislatures, courts, and local offices while Democrats focused too much on Washington. Tools like ALEC's model bills and Karl Rove's REDMAP gerrymandering strategy have locked in GOP dominance across the country, giving them control over everyday issues like schools, healthcare, and voting rights. If Democrats want lasting change, they must invest seriously in statehouse races -- everywhere, not just in swing states. Running candidates in every district (like Virginia did this year) forces Republicans to fight everywhere, drains their resources, and sets Democrats up to redraw fair maps after the 2030 census. Governors with backbone, like Whitmer, Moore, and Shapiro, show how state-level leadership can defend against Trumpism. The bottom line: The fight for America's future won't be won in D.C. first -- it will be won in statehouses. If Democrats want to protect democracy, they need to prioritize state legislatures now. By the Ballot is an opinion series published on Substack. All views expressed are solely those of the author and should not be interpreted as reporting or objective journalism or attributed to any other individual or organization. I am not a journalist or reporter, nor do I claim to be one. This publication represents personal commentary, analysis, and opinion only. What is By the Ballot? By the Ballot is a free SubStack that features unapologetic dispatches from the New South 's next generation of Democrats. Commentary on stances, tactics, and news on the Left. We don't claim to know everything or always be right, we just want to be a part of the conversation. While there 's many different ways to power and the Right wants to take over our country by hook or by crook, we want to help Democrats help Americans by making a government for the people by the ballot. Make sure to follow us on socials to stay up to date on our work! You can find By the Ballot on: Contact us at substackbytheballot@gmail.com | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matt Royer Herndon, VA 20171 ? ?

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: It sent a chill down my spine
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Socialist politicians want to rewire America

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbfgjtq1jng7o8fn6koq0str0pfjaiv2pub7tt38_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
---
| | Patriot,
_“Democratic voters are warming to socialism.” _
That’s an actual phrase in a recent news article I read about how socialism is on the rise in the Democratic Party, and it put a chill down my spine. Because if you stop for even a second and really think about what that means, it’s terrifying.
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Bernie SandersZohran MamdaniOmar FatehIlhan Omar
These politicians want to fundamentally rewire America. They want to tear down the free-market system that built the greatest economy in the history of the world and replace it with a government-controlled version of “fairness” that has failed everywhere it’s been tried.
**They want to destroy the country that allowed a kid like me to escape Harlem and achieve the American Dream. **
They tell us socialism means fairness. But when you look closer, it really means more government control, fewer choices for families, and less opportunity for everyone.
Under socialism, bureaucrats decide how much you can earn, what kind of healthcare you can receive, and what speech is acceptable. They punish success, discourage innovation, and chip away at the idea that individuals - not the government - should determine their own destiny.
**_We can’t sit back and watch this movement chip away at our American values. Socialism has no place in the land of the free._**
If we want to keep America the greatest nation on earth, it’s going to take courage, conviction, and citizens willing to stand up and say: Not here. Not now. Not ever.
_[Will you join me in taking a stand against socialism?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo5on1mk8led6jserhrbchhremehkf1r3pnicbmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)_ Right now, we’re running a campaign for governor of Minnesota that is focused on preserving our freedoms, strengthening families, and getting government off our backs.
[Can I count on your to join me in this fight and take a stand against socialism?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztj5jioi70d80gs2thk69lpfnkgh1s9ttuvn9j4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)

---
| | [TAKE A STAND AGAINST SOCIALISM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ke7iisrraoa5hhge2fn12cingd9gh0em5ri28o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
---
Thank you,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3odtt5he6mi1nrmuun7k38ldeslretrae38sedg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)Kendall
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7cm868tjggfpd38qalkfuujstj7foc6cda4dp4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z76r1trd9blcjmg1t1v487rtbipt9fimta6d4d6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt49btrj5n9mqh07ennjgt7er8pjti3a904mut8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdpjr0goltfg05jl4pk2t947pkjg2jrqiid9sp48_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziqn15oq1foclig0ioj7b7etvd536bt4krs11i1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm2o72cph2bs)
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.
---

# [RFK Jr Issues 2025 Warning [Seniors Most At Risk?]](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
For years liberals have called RFK Jr a _**QUACK**_ ... an _**ALARMIST**_ ... and a _**CONSPIRACY THEORIST**_.
But now it appears _**HE WAS RIGHT**_ about a COVID lab leak...
He was _**RIGHT**_ about microplastics... And he was _**RIGHT**_ about FDA corruption.
Now, he's issued **[a terrifying new warning](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Americans need to hear in 2025.
Millions are in the crosshairs... And if you were born before Jan 1st, 1965, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** affects you most of all.

Get the full facts **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Liberals will call **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** crazy too, until they see **[the data](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Learn why RFK Jr is warning Americans about this emerging health crisis before it's too late. Watch **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/8ef4de5a-b6a1-4215-b897-cbb9adbb1d56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now.
* * *
# Trump declares the "end of an age of terror and death" in the middle east to thunderous applause in Israel
President Donald Trump addressed Israel's Knesset on Monday, calling the Gaza ceasefire **[the"end of an age of terror and death"](https://substack.com/redirect/1e0ba373-2ebf-4491-a8aa-2555bcaf8e68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and the "historic dawn of a new Middle East," receiving standing ovations as all 20 living hostages were freed by Hamas.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e0ba373-2ebf-4491-a8aa-2555bcaf8e68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"This is the end of an age of terror and death and the beginning of the age of faith and hope and of God," he said. "It's the start of a grand concord and lasting harmony for Israel and all the nations of what will soon be a truly magnificent region. I believe that so strongly, this is the historic dawn of a new Middle East."
* **Celebrates hostage release and calls for peace:** Trump praised the return of the hostages after two years in captivity and acknowledged the 28 deceased hostages whose remains will be returned, declaring that Israel has won militarily and now must translate battlefield victories into lasting peace and security.
* **Urges Palestinians to reject terrorism:** Trump issued a direct message to Palestinians to "turn forever from the path of terror and violence" and exile extremist forces, presenting the peace deal as their opportunity to rebuild Gaza and choose a different path forward.

### Watch Trump's remarks here:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3cb59573-168c-4d15-806b-58286e9956d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Netanyahu calls Trump the "greatest friend" Israel has ever had after brokering historic peace deal
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu **[called President Donald Trump the"greatest friend" Israel has ever had](https://substack.com/redirect/b66765fe-e4ad-4aa9-9b37-4f7930df468f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and nominated him for the Israel Prize, Israel's highest award, citing his support including strikes on Iran's nuclear sites.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/22fa7009-7cf7-4a20-9732-1704fafcc1cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Hostage release completed:** Hamas released the final 20 living hostages on Monday as part of a prisoner exchange that saw Israel free 2,000 Palestinian prisoners, marking a major milestone in the breakthrough peace deal.
* **Comprehensive peace framework:** The 20-point peace plan includes a ceasefire, withdrawal of Israeli forces to pre-defined lines, amnesty for Hamas members who renounce violence, and humanitarian aid flowing into Gaza under international supervision.
* **Gaza reconstruction plan:** Trump will chair an international "Board of Peace" overseeing Gaza's transition to a technocratic Palestinian committee, with plans to transform Gaza into a "thriving modern miracle city" through international investment and a U.S.-led security force.

body:
Why is an obscure judicial race getting so much attention. If MAGA seizes this court they all but guarantee Trump will take Pennsylvania and its critical 19 electoral college votes in 2028
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tiHIeUXAyMhgirqfJRTJb6IQ74Ro_CiqU79YYCNl3nJQVaLYEaZOqIOW6T6QjGqprBKHz1tGpmVRJNrgcLalK1uAS56MzKWsbbqVoXfRKBU0a_Y-ifq8duRYiUsHgF6TqFgyTWnZAvoUKVWvOE9ZxnKh_8FlmQ7EYVM21vCTOz1oZ0XjPHklvlN5lNyOq_R0iSNM12dhbm6HIzGPs5t9OUHMrCPYR5c6&c=TLHhP4mGCIL5wuYAfDba7tDrcz52xe3xf0C5Ep9fFoFrlYCCCpM3TA==&ch=ibScAN7D0Tb3vS3BHjZw-vDuMwFeQdqdwpcHcMSq9fvYOiK7D4SrUA==)
---
| Peter,
The situation on the ground in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court 2025 has gone thermonuclear and is now the hottest election of 2025.
If you are thinking wtf why is an obscure judicial race getting so much attention--we get it. This race matters because if MAGA seizes this court they all but guarantee Trump will take Pennsylvania and its critical 19 electoral college votes in 2028 when he seeks a third term.
Here's the rundown of where things presently stand:
First: In early September MAGA launches a bolt from the blue surprise attack rapidly spending millions in this quiet and often overlooked judicial race and quickly seizes the lead.
Then: Dem PA Governor Shapiro, Defend our Courts, DNC & DLCC, launch a desperate counter-offensive in Late September to pull Democrats back from the brink of defeat.
Now: Things have stabilized and we have somewhat contained MAGA's breakthrough but voters are still confused, the majority remain undecided.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tiHIeUXAyMhgirqfJRTJb6IQ74Ro_CiqU79YYCNl3nJQVaLYEaZOqIOW6T6QjGqprBKHz1tGpmVRJNrgcLalK1uAS56MzKWsbbqVoXfRKBU0a_Y-ifq8duRYiUsHgF6TqFgyTWnZAvoUKVWvOE9ZxnKh_8FlmQ7EYVM21vCTOz1oZ0XjPHklvlN5lNyOq_R0iSNM12dhbm4mDG-wFZnWmneLXRxgi_c-&c=TLHhP4mGCIL5wuYAfDba7tDrcz52xe3xf0C5Ep9fFoFrlYCCCpM3TA==&ch=ibScAN7D0Tb3vS3BHjZw-vDuMwFeQdqdwpcHcMSq9fvYOiK7D4SrUA==)
---
The ballots that voters will vote on in this race don't have party affiliation to simplify it for voters. They simply say vote yes or no to retain these justices and leave it up to voters to figure out which is the GOP and Democratic position.
MAGA is taking advantage of this and is spending millions on deceptive ads and mailers to try to convince Democratic and Independent voters to vote no and remove their Supreme Court Justices.
22 days remain until election day and we need to do everything we can to convince our undecided voters to vote yes. [Please, can you make a donation of whatever you can spare so we can rush it to the frontlines and put it to work convincing these undecided voters to vote yes?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tiHIeUXAyMhgirqfJRTJb6IQ74Ro_CiqU79YYCNl3nJQVaLYEaZOqIOW6T6QjGqprBKHz1tGpmVRJNrgcLalK1uAS56MzKWsbbqVoXfRKBU0a_Y-ifq8duRYiUsHgF6TqFgyTWnZAvoUKVWvOE9ZxnKh_8FlmQ7EYVM21vCTOz1oZ0XjPHklvlN5lNyOq_R0iSNM12dhbm4yKzf-B0kTf1rU40WwApyH&c=TLHhP4mGCIL5wuYAfDba7tDrcz52xe3xf0C5Ep9fFoFrlYCCCpM3TA==&ch=ibScAN7D0Tb3vS3BHjZw-vDuMwFeQdqdwpcHcMSq9fvYOiK7D4SrUA==)

clean_body: Why is an obscure judicial race getting so much attention. If MAGA seizes this court they all but guarantee Trump will take Pennsylvania and its critical 19 electoral college votes in 2028 | | | | | == | Peter, The situation on the ground in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court 2025 has gone thermonuclear and is now the hottest election of 2025. If you are thinking wtf why is an obscure judicial race getting so much attention--we get it. This race matters because if MAGA seizes this court they all but guarantee Trump will take Pennsylvania and its critical 19 electoral college votes in 2028 when he seeks a third term. Here's the rundown of where things presently stand: First: In early September MAGA launches a bolt from the blue surprise attack rapidly spending millions in this quiet and often overlooked judicial race and quickly seizes the lead. Then: Dem PA Governor Shapiro, Defend our Courts, DNC & DLCC, launch a desperate counter-offensive in Late September to pull Democrats back from the brink of defeat. Now: Things have stabilized and we have somewhat contained MAGA's breakthrough but voters are still confused, the majority remain undecided. | | == The ballots that voters will vote on in this race don't have party affiliation to simplify it for voters. They simply say vote yes or no to retain these justices and leave it up to voters to figure out which is the GOP and Democratic position. MAGA is taking advantage of this and is spending millions on deceptive ads and mailers to try to convince Democratic and Independent voters to vote no and remove their Supreme Court Justices. 22 days remain until election day and we need to do everything we can to convince our undecided voters to vote yes. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for your support during this moment of crisis. name: Senator Jennifer B. Boysko
subject: Why I’m standing with Leslie Mehta
disclaimer_text:
Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
body:
Hi Peter,

I’m State Senator Jennifer Boysko, and I’ve spent my career fighting for Virginia families—whether it’s defending reproductive rights, improving healthcare access, or ensuring our schools prepare every child for success.

But you and I both know that the Senate can't do this work alone.

To deliver results, we need strong partners in the House of Delegates. That’s why I’m supporting Leslie Mehta, who is running to represent District 73 in Chesterfield. Leslie’s track record as a lawyer,

advocate, and healthcare champion makes her exactly the kind of leader we need by our side in Richmond.

Donate Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfclmjb?refcode2=btn&refcode=20251013boysko_b]

Leslie and I both grew up in rural communities. We know the struggles families go through, but we also know how communities pull together to help one another. That upbringing is what gave us our strong shared dedication to community service.

Leslie and I also share a commitment to:
* Protecting reproductive freedom so politicians never come between Virginians and their doctors
* Expanding access to affordable healthcare, especially for families and women facing barriers to care
* Strengthening public education with the funding, resources, and support our kids and teachers need
* Making Virginia more affordable for working families by addressing housing costs and fair taxes

If we want a Virginia that puts people first—not special interests—we need strong Democratic majorities in both chambers. That means keeping our Senate majority and flipping key House seats like District 73.

Can you split a contribution today between my campaign and Leslie’s [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfclmjb?refcode2=txt1&refcode=20251013boysko_b] ? Together, we can win a majority that delivers real change for Virginia families.

Donate Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfclmjb?refcode2=btn&refcode=20251013boysko_b]

Thank you for standing with us,
Jennifer B. Boysko
Virginia State Senator
Representing District 38

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcwhyleslie?refcode2=footerbtn&refcode=20251013boysko_b]
Volunteer [https://lesliemehta.com/get-involved/]

https://www.facebook.com/leslie4delegate/ [https://www.facebook.com/leslie4delegate/]
https://www.instagram.com/leslie4delegate [https://www.instagram.com/leslie4delegate]
https://twitter.com/lesliemehtava [https://twitter.com/lesliemehtava]

Leslie Mehta for Delegate
PO Box 1721
Midlothian, VA 23113
United States
