name: Kendall Qualls
subject: It sent a chill down my spine
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Socialist politicians want to rewire America

| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo88m3r0dldmdr0ncgdhr9j8v4hkt6gbatof79kg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)
---
| | Patriot,
_“Democratic voters are warming to socialism.” _
That’s an actual phrase in a recent news article I read about how socialism is on the rise in the Democratic Party, and it put a chill down my spine. Because if you stop for even a second and really think about what that means, it’s terrifying.
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Bernie SandersZohran MamdaniOmar FatehIlhan Omar
These politicians want to fundamentally rewire America. They want to tear down the free-market system that built the greatest economy in the history of the world and replace it with a government-controlled version of “fairness” that has failed everywhere it’s been tried.
**They want to destroy the country that allowed a kid like me to escape Harlem and achieve the American Dream. **
They tell us socialism means fairness. But when you look closer, it really means more government control, fewer choices for families, and less opportunity for everyone.
Under socialism, bureaucrats decide how much you can earn, what kind of healthcare you can receive, and what speech is acceptable. They punish success, discourage innovation, and chip away at the idea that individuals - not the government - should determine their own destiny.
**_We can’t sit back and watch this movement chip away at our American values. Socialism has no place in the land of the free._**
If we want to keep America the greatest nation on earth, it’s going to take courage, conviction, and citizens willing to stand up and say: Not here. Not now. Not ever.
_[Will you join me in taking a stand against socialism?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrb6fdilsp4puuf2lpjrqfqs1h4d7dmrnn5lm2bo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)_ Right now, we’re running a campaign for governor of Minnesota that is focused on preserving our freedoms, strengthening families, and getting government off our backs.
[Can I count on your to join me in this fight and take a stand against socialism?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfmv36nqt7g4pkgmaiaoqe814mrvteqsvu0uq9qo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)

---
| | [TAKE A STAND AGAINST SOCIALISM](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2h2slqp0g0eefo7g7ptqieu2uros9ei45rkkam0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)
---
Thank you,
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z979ducdedki241u87jkpsu32otrm3ncbm10b2ig_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)Kendall
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgrak1tg4sab00r5ibb2j98s4nv5ufpeukkj68to_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zorid8lid58qgabk67e51i20pmmd251tb4qdl458_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmapr6c5h2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: My decision:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
As you know by now, Donald Trump ordered the governor of Texas, Greg Abbott, and the Republican majority in the State House to literally find him five more Republican seats.

**Let me lay this out, clear as day:**
We are getting outspent, there are polls showing us under 50%, and as you read this Election Day is less than one month away and people are already voting.
This is going to be an expensive homestretch, because nothing less than Democrats getting a fair chance to take back the House is at stake.
If you are outraged at Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election -- and you are ready to fight -- [**please make a $3 contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251013&refcode2=2659_4767699_4AO203&akid=2659%2E4767699%2E4AO203)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251013&refcode2=2659_4767699_4AO203&akid=2659%2E4767699%2E4AO203)
Otherwise, let me remind you of how we got here -- and why this moment is so urgent.
The truth is, I wasn't sure whether or not we'd get to this moment. Even when talk started about Trump calling Greg Abbott for the five seats he said he was entitled to.
But as time went on, and I heard the calls for Democrats to "Do Something!" I agreed. No more holding hands. No more talk. It was time for action. Concrete action.
So we made the decision to move forward.
And folks, we simply have to be successful. We have no choice. It is the only chance to counteract even part of what Republicans are doing to redraw maps. We'll be talking about nothing less than guaranteed total Republican control.
The pundits said we'd never get to this point. Then many said we'd lose if we tried. But we are building the strongest grassroots campaign Democrats are waging anywhere.
And if we're in this together, we're going to win. But I can't do it alone. So I am asking.
[**Please make a contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Give $3 or any amount that works for you today. We just need people to give what they can, when they can. It will all add up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251013&refcode2=2659_4767699_4AO203&akid=2659%2E4767699%2E4AO203)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em251013&refcode2=2659_4767699_4AO203&akid=2659%2E4767699%2E4AO203)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em251013&refcode2=2659_4767699_4AO203&akid=2659%2E4767699%2E4AO203)**

Gavin Newsom

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb93r2lcbh2kdhu8h7cpsojjdjmddp49pibumu6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm6or1cdh2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhonrrklelga8a17rr5nl9hr1i69p3egsfvdvfug_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm6or1cdh2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv1nhfb9i6ptg8e2r6v9n61rnsvskq6nkopmvpho_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjm6or1cdh2bs)**

name: Team Moore
subject: This race is too important to fumble 🏈
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=753%2E1086043%2EP4pIAp)
Wes was at the Ravens game yesterday, Peter, and he asked us to send you this note.
Here’s the truth: **This race is too important to fumble. 🏈**
We flipped Maryland from red to blue a few years ago — and with sacking Wes a top goal in 2026, Republicans are suiting up for a rematch.
Our potential opponents would rather follow Trump’s playbook than stand up for Marylanders being hurt by his cruel agenda, so the stakes are high.
From Mountain Maryland to the Chesapeake Bay, we’re blocking Donald Trump’s attacks, defending our public servants, and rushing forward to strengthen our schools. But we need this team with us.
**[Our side has the grit and the game plan to win this thing — but we need you to step off the sidelines. Will you chip in $10 or anything you can to power Wes’ reelection campaign?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251012-1.eVwbNh&refcode=em-20251012-1&t=4&akid=753%2E1086043%2EP4pIAp)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251012-1.eVwbNh&amount=5&refcode=em-20251012-1&t=23&akid=753%2E1086043%2EP4pIAp)**
Thanks, Peter!
— Team Moore

clean_body: Wes was at the Ravens game yesterday, Peter, and he asked us to send you this note. Here’s the truth: This race is too important to fumble. 🏈 We flipped Maryland from red to blue a few years ago — and with sacking Wes a top goal in 2026, Republicans are suiting up for a rematch. Our potential opponents would rather follow Trump’s playbook than stand up for Marylanders being hurt by his cruel agenda, so the stakes are high. From Mountain Maryland to the Chesapeake Bay, we’re blocking Donald Trump’s attacks, defending our public servants, and rushing forward to strengthen our schools. But we need this team with us. Thanks, Peter! — Team Moore

Aftyn Behn is a perfect example of why this movement is so important: In the official ranking of all 50 states based on women’s representation in government, Tennessee ranks 46th.

And, while we’re using Tennessee as our example, Black women in TN are nearly 3x more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women — most of them preventable. TN ranks among the bottom nationally for maternal health outcomes, and the women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

**Aftyn looked around at what was happening in her state, noticed the lack of women in government, and decided to run for office herself.**

At Her Bold Move, we are laying the groundwork to ensure that NO qualified women candidates get left behind – especially those running for office in red/abortion-ban states. Too often, red states don’t have the infrastructure or support systems in place to help pro-choice women win, and we’ve seen how the laws in those states reflect that fact. That’s why our track record from the past cycle is so impressive – Her Bold Move is actually CHANGING the outcomes of elections, and getting more women into power in red states.

**We deserve better, and that is what we are fighting for.**

[**By electing pro-choice, pro-WOMEN _women_ to government, we CAN improve the situation in abortion ban states. Help us continue our work to support courageous women candidates running in red states by chipping in $20.25 to the Her Bold Move | Red States Project today. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117187123/575643750/-666422155?refcode=EM_F_251011Red_RSP_10_90DO_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyMzVlNGNkLTNhYTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FRX_vuUBBlsm7ifhUt8E2M5zmC86pRL5Q_yE1hEUEg8=)

clean_body: | | | | Make sure you’re ready for November 4 — check your status today Hi Friend, Tomorrow is the final day to register to vote for the November 4th election. Every year, races are decided by just a handful of votes — and this one will be no different. Take a minute right now to make sure you’re registered and ready. Here are the links you need: Need to register? "Click here to register." Already registered? "Check your status here." Prefer to vote from home?** "Apply for Vote by Mail." name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Huge scotus win on gender ideology
body:
Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgna7r1f9ruq5c4dkrqd9obro1rmlbs4t9sofnh8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmepb2cdh2bs)

## **[BREAKING: Court Gives Green Light to EVERY State to Protect Children](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq2ntgmbvtaaa24m7prre0mpdvvitc789rbj2gj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmepb2cdh2bs)**
Dear Fellow American,

Praise God! The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled, 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti_ that states can protect kids from harmful drugs and surgeries. Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

This is a landmark victory for every child in our country, as the ruling will allow EVERY state to implement similar laws to protect children from the harms of gender ideology.

This win moves us that much closer to finally ending the practice of experimenting on children.
[ DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkk8oqdtu74qpf18pen248uasja4d2hv7122t7eg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmepb2cdh2bs)
**Gender ideology is on the ropes.** Now we have to keep the momentum going and finish the job. Several cases and many clients are still waiting for justice from the lies of gender ideology, including:
* **Selina Soule** --she and several other female athletes have been standing up for fairness on and off the field for years. We've beaten back efforts to rewrite Title IX at the federal level, but many states, like Connecticut, continue to push policies that force girls to compete against male athletes.
* **Dan and Jennifer Mead** --their daughter's school secretly treated her as a boy, as part of the school's "social transition" policy. Many school districts around the country still have these policies in place.
* **Brian and Katy Wuoti** --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family.

[With your gift today,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2b4augk7l67gpbirm1tnom1o1i7dm02hvbv6s8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmepb2cdh2bs) we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. **Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!**

Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms.

In Christ,

John Bursch
Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti._ Your gift today helps ADF clients who are still waiting for justice. [Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0t4f6q1pbipviq7oo3cfaap5otk3toke0l6jso_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpjmepb2cdh2bs)

Brian and Katy Wuoti --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family. we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!** Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms. In Christ, John Bursch Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in United States v. Skrmetti. Your gift today helps ADF clients who are still waiting for justice. When Delano Squires speaks, you can feel both conviction and compassion in every word.
**[GET YOUR TICKET NOW!](https://substack.com/redirect/79d0334e-2fc2-49f0-b3c3-85ac407644ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
A **Senior Fellow at The Heritage Foundation** , Delano has become one of the leading national voices on the intersection of **faith, family, and culture** --issues that lie at the heart of America's renewal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/79d0334e-2fc2-49f0-b3c3-85ac407644ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Known for his thoughtful commentary and moral clarity, Delano challenges the narratives that keep communities divided and disempowered. His work at Heritage focuses on strengthening the most important institution in any society--the family--while restoring the timeless principles that make liberty possible.
Before joining The Heritage Foundation, Delano built a reputation as a writer, policy analyst, and cultural commentator whose words consistently cut through the noise. His essays and media appearances confront hard truths with grace, offering a moral framework rooted in faith, personal responsibility, and genuine love for community.
> "We don't need new values," Delano often says. "We need to remember the ones that built strong men, strong families, and strong nations."
At the[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/79d0334e-2fc2-49f0-b3c3-85ac407644ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Seed& Roots Summit 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/79d0334e-2fc2-49f0-b3c3-85ac407644ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_, Delano Squires will help us explore what it really means to rebuild a culture where faith and family are not afterthoughts--but the foundation of the future of work, education, and opportunity in America.
🗓 **Saturday, October 25, 2025**
📍 **Philadelphia, PA | Independence Visitor Center**
⏰ **9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Doors open at 8:30 AM)**
* * *
### 💡 Why This Matters
In a time when cultural clarity has never been more needed, Delano Squires brings a rare blend of intellect, integrity, and faith. He's helping chart a path forward for those who believe America's renewal begins--not in Washington--but in the heart, home, and community.
Reserve your seat at **[KathyBarnette.com](https://substack.com/redirect/b768b819-8574-4566-92d7-ebc75e16c226?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: What if I told you....
body:
I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter.
But I have to ask: Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $25 between Real Texas PAC and my Senate campaign in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=100925_3]
What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at The Cook Political Report increased our odds of winning?
What if I told you that CNN and The New York Times report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?
What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you?
This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win.
So please, split $25 or more between Real Texas PAC and me to power our campaign forward, win in Ohio, and keep up the fight for working people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=100925_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=100925_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=100925_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=100925_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=100925_3&amount=100]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=100925_3&amount=25]
Thank you so much,
Sherrod Brown
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=100925_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=100925_3]

San Antonio, TX 78248

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: It’s a ticket of hate and violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: "Let your RAGE fuel you" -Abigail Spanberger That's my Democrat opponent's message, Patriot. She's traveled all over the Commonwealth telling radical liberals to embrace rage. She wants Democrats to lean into anger and hatred. It's a sick, un-Christian message and it's NOT what we need in Virginia or our nation right now. Now it's come out that her partner on the ticket this November, Jay Jones, fantasized about committing violence against his political opponent. All because they didn't agree about politics. Political violence of any kind is totally unacceptable and completely disqualifying from holding political office. My opponent has stood by Jay Jones even with full knowledge of his vile comments. Every day Spanberger stands by Jay Jones, she legitimizes his fantasy of committing violence against his political opponent. Jay Jones' comments make me sick to my stomach, and Abigail Spanberger's tacit approval of what he said is absolutely revolting. I've put everything I've got into winning this race so we can make our communities safer and build a brighter future in the Commonwealth. Now, conservatives are facing the threat of violence in a way I never could've imagined. We have never seen the threat of political violence against conservatives like this in our Commonwealth. We cannot let unhinged radicals like Jay Jones and Abigail Spanberger win in November. I'm fighting to win this race. I've put my faith in the Lord, but today I'm putting my trust in YOU. Here's my call to action: cannot stress how important it is that we win this race to soundly REJECT Spanberger and Jones' calls for political violence in our Commonwealth and across the nation. Thank you for your support, Patriot. -Winsome Earle-SearsLt. Governor of Virginia | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Dr. Carol Anderson (via Fair Fight Action)
subject: On Wednesday at the Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Here’s what’s at stake. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117190783/575656377/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251013_T1_SCOTUSVRAPreview_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyMmUzMS0zZmE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pxj25W1Zl28U3GD8LSRSGIjQ2OyQlWbibRUSrH3mPAw=&emci=2e98222b-3fa8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d5022e31-3fa8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)

| | It’s Dr. Carol Anderson with Fair Fight Action. I want to talk about an important court case that could silence millions of voters for a generation. **On Wednesday, the Supreme Court will hear a case that gives it another opportunity to gut the Voting Rights Act of 1965.** At stake is the fundamental promise of democracy: _one person, one vote._ Under that principle, every American has an equal voice, wields equal power, and is guaranteed equal representation in government. But this case is targeting Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which protects voters of color from racially discriminatory political maps. If SCOTUS agrees to strike down Section 2, we could see a wave of racially discriminatory gerrymandering that dilutes the voice, power, and representation of Black Americans and other communities of color, particularly in the South. This case fits into a line of far-right legal challenges that have sought to enable voter suppression to bring back the Jim Crow South. And this attempt to gut Section 2 fits into a modern Southern Strategy, where they aim to eviscerate Black political power, thwart competitive elections, and build a new MAGA Solid South, with new congressional maps and enough safe seats to secure one-party rule of the U.S. House of Representatives. We shouldn’t be under any illusions about why this is happening. **A group of extremists thinks that they would lose their control of our government if an increasingly diverse America has a fair chance to make its voice heard in a true representative multiracial democracy.** Instead of doing the work to convince more voters to support them, they want to silence those voters. That’s why they resort to gerrymandering and other forms of voter suppression, including closing polling places in Black and low-income communities and shrinking the number of days for early voting. But that’s where Fair Fight Action comes in. **With your support, we can stay ready to defend the principle of _one person, one vote_ , to push back against voter suppression, and to work towards truly free and fair elections with equal access to the ballot box.** We can link arms against MAGA’s attempts to rip us back to a time before the Voting Rights Act. And we can channel the strength of generations of change-makers who demanded that our democracy make room for every voice. [**Ahead of this case, will you make a contribution of $30 or any amount to help Fair Fight Action hold strong against any new damage the Supreme Court may inflict upon our freedoms?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117190786/575656381/1609117871?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251013_T1_SCOTUSVRAPreview_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyMmUzMS0zZmE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pxj25W1Zl28U3GD8LSRSGIjQ2OyQlWbibRUSrH3mPAw=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117190787/575656386/1609117871?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251013_T1_SCOTUSVRAPreview_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyMmUzMS0zZmE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pxj25W1Zl28U3GD8LSRSGIjQ2OyQlWbibRUSrH3mPAw=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117190789/575656387/1609117871?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20251013_T1_SCOTUSVRAPreview_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTAyMmUzMS0zZmE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pxj25W1Zl28U3GD8LSRSGIjQ2OyQlWbibRUSrH3mPAw=)

clean_body: Here’s what’s at stake. | | | It’s Dr. Carol Anderson with Fair Fight Action. I want to talk about an important court case that could silence millions of voters for a generation. On Wednesday, the Supreme Court will hear a case that gives it another opportunity to gut the Voting Rights Act of 1965. At stake is the fundamental promise of democracy: one person, one vote. Under that principle, every American has an equal voice, wields equal power, and is guaranteed equal representation in government. But this case is targeting Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which protects voters of color from racially discriminatory political maps. If SCOTUS agrees to strike down Section 2, we could see a wave of racially discriminatory gerrymandering that dilutes the voice, power, and representation of Black Americans and other communities of color, particularly in the South. This case fits into a line of far-right legal challenges that have sought to enable voter suppression to bring back the Jim Crow South. And this attempt to gut Section 2 fits into a modern Southern Strategy, where they aim to eviscerate Black political power, thwart competitive elections, and build a new MAGA Solid South, with new congressional maps and enough safe seats to secure one-party rule of the U.S. House of Representatives. We shouldn’t be under any illusions about why this is happening. A group of extremists thinks that they would lose their control of our government if an increasingly diverse America has a fair chance to make its voice heard in a true representative multiracial democracy. Instead of doing the work to convince more voters to support them, they want to silence those voters. That’s why they resort to gerrymandering and other forms of voter suppression, including closing polling places in Black and low-income communities and shrinking the number of days for early voting. But that’s where Fair Fight Action comes in. With your support, we can stay ready to defend the principle of one person, one vote , to push back against voter suppression, and to work towards truly free and fair elections with equal access to the ballot box. We can link arms against MAGA’s attempts to rip us back to a time before the Voting Rights Act. And we can channel the strength of generations of change-makers who demanded that our democracy make room for every voice. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- An engaged citizenry that imagines — and delivers — the true potential of democracy is more vital than ever, and I’m grateful to you for adding your voice to this effort. Thank you, Dr. Carol Anderson Fair Fight Action = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: Indigenous Peoples’ Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
Back in 2021, Deb ran the Boston Marathon on Indigenous Peoples’ Day. | | | |
---
Did you know Deb runs races, team? Literally.
She started her running journey in the middle of her life and continues to run for good causes, including in the Marine Corps Marathon, Army Ten-miler, and the Canyon De Chelly Ultra.
**Back in 2021, Deb ran the Boston Marathon on Indigenous Peoples’ Day as a tribute to missing and murdered Indigenous peoples, their families, and the victims of Indian boarding schools.**
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquN1aoJYYSN4wWuHwHSdnJrriOo02d2QQ1RKIOVqOIfmosnqHVtywjrSF3tPl0gv1Df62KZhM_ALmGJ2GpEl2nR_7zpr_vNdev_osLoAONEaW_NNHpbuemIH1DMqFSDQghYvNGp_pvt03tyDMkCyeYu1TuxIhoQ6G1tMjBCX-He6bBJYQAHeqxTnd9VMFns9NKg2i1RfXVkZtGVQ-8k4M9RNmLmNbbt6iW16ykTteJsGCwHLtV-1ggg5xy7VVAwxie0EIB8bFe6o6nxhxNqjYXR-vJ4aEqLKAUgJAqkLV_sUXtVZD9OhtihTEdx6JMnB3FtSseJo7sauqRkiX0ETHuZffek-viyeYtw8Fm8E6oX7Oafpt_DrktsTfn-tbDJi9Q/4kp/icYf7J69QYm017DwdRisQw/h0/h001.hNXggKxZQ-uzUg933hIybXCrlmC0EQ-wp779ediGoz0)
---
At the time, Deb wrote:
_“My feet will pound the ancestral homelands of the Massachusett, the Mashpee Wampanoag, and the Pawtucket people and will follow in the footsteps of Indigenous runners who have participated in this race over its 125-year history.”_
This Indigenous Peoples’ Day, we know that – no matter what – we can always count on Deb to stand up and fight fiercely for the safety and protection of Indigenous, and all, people from violence here in New Mexico and beyond.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjkrdi54fjalimou6og0c2o8lqoopdeidj06qp7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6udmdmlggl4p8rbj45e15b24b8m2rqqp61uk20_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zht2v6f47tf946sdad6qpbcuceh7dllvg8k7icag_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)**

---

---
[ DONATE $120 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4bmdhh93ehgkdq1vseig6vf9s6fflhc356p1330_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
[ DONATE $65 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg08rp81tsms3fvr2hkjm6bt81mi9fj7s1gqpvbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zssauoa99qof1khf2rrjvkd2t790sekrsph3j0tg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zib7c2vp0d9vej30ouamv80d31n5p2kbghsjoqgo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh06ckeoirj4abcvtj2gquideka95mipjpvrid8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge8p32cph2bs)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. | | | Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble request from the heart, so please read it all the way through.In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: We’re setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Nov. 4, 2025 will have massive stakes.
Peter,
I’ve told you time and time again just how important this race is for New Jersey. **But what you need to understand is, what we do here will have major implications for the country.**
This is the first major election since Donald Trump returned to office. Since then, we’ve seen nothing but chaos and corruption come from the White House — and New Jersey families have taken hit after hit because of it.
On November 4, New Jerseyans have an important choice to make: we can choose the career politician who’s going to copy and paste Trump’s disastrous policies into New Jersey, or we can choose a new way forward: a leader who will _always_ put our state first, and _never_ bend to the will of deep-pocketed Washington politicians.
And if we win, not only do we send a powerful message to the nation by choosing the path of affordability, opportunity, and freedom — we empower Democrats _across the country_ to stand up and fight back against the Trump administration, setting us up for major wins in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
Whatever happens, America is going to follow New Jersey’s lead, Peter. That’s why National Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race, it’s why Donald Trump and his administration have attacked me repeatedly, _and it’s why we have to win this election._
**[The movement we’re building here in New Jersey is so much bigger than me or you — it’s about all of us coming together to build a new path forward for our state, and for our country. And if that’s the type of movement you believe in, I would really appreciate it if you split whatever you can between my team and Heartland Patriots to help power me to victory this Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96521?refcode=em20251013-9552&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9552%2E614464%2EfKRjUR)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in the balance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Bolts: Inside the Clunky Elections to Control Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=101325_1&amount=25]
folks: We'll keep this short.
Supporters of voting rights currently hold a 5-2 majority of Pennsylvania's state Supreme Court. That majority has been crucial in protecting voters' rights for the last few years , making sure valid ballots were counted and striking down attempts to make it harder for voters to participate in our elections.
Three of those justices are up for renewal in 2025, however, and off year elections like the one just a few weeks away always have depressed turnout and participation. That puts that pro-democracy majority at risk, especially with opponents of voting rights throughout Pennsylvania pulling out all the stops to try and take out these judges, which would force the court into an immediate 2-2 tie.
There is one final, crucial piece of this puzzle: Polls show most voters don't pay a ton of attention to judicial elections or know what is at stake. “ People have no idea, ” said one political volunteer recently at the annual Ephrata, PA street fair. “ Even informed voters—they just don’t know .”
That's where we come in -- trying to inform Pennsylvania voters of what is at stake and asking our supporters to reach out to any friends and family who are Pennsylvania voters to make sure they go out and vote in this critical election.
This all takes resources from grassroots supporters like you. Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us reach every voter we can ahead of their next election? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=101325_1&amount=15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=101325_1&amount=35]
Whether it's this election in Pennsylvania, the races in Virginia and New Jersey, or beyond -- your support will give us the resources we need to keep going from now, through the 2025 elections, and into next year's all-important mid-terms.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Turnout Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101325_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Bolts: Inside the Clunky Elections to Control Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court [] folks: We'll keep this short. Supporters of voting rights currently hold a 5-2 majority of Pennsylvania's state Supreme Court. That majority has been crucial in protecting voters' rights for the last few years , making sure valid ballots were counted and striking down attempts to make it harder for voters to participate in our elections. Three of those justices are up for renewal in 2025, however, and off year elections like the one just a few weeks away always have depressed turnout and participation. That puts that pro-democracy majority at risk, especially with opponents of voting rights throughout Pennsylvania pulling out all the stops to try and take out these judges, which would force the court into an immediate 2-2 tie. There is one final, crucial piece of this puzzle: Polls show most voters don't pay a ton of attention to judicial elections or know what is at stake. “ People have no idea, ” said one political volunteer recently at the annual Ephrata, PA street fair. “ Even informed voters—they just don’t know .” That's where we come in -- trying to inform Pennsylvania voters of what is at stake and asking our supporters to reach out to any friends and family who are Pennsylvania voters to make sure they go out and vote in this critical election. This all takes resources from grassroots supporters like you. Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us reach every voter we can ahead of their next election? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Whether it's this election in Pennsylvania, the races in Virginia and New Jersey, or beyond -- your support will give us the resources we need to keep going from now, through the 2025 elections, and into next year's all-important mid-terms. Thank you, Voter Action Project's Turnout Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: As of this morning...
body:
We wanted to be the first to tell you:
---
Hi Derek, we wanted to be the first to tell you: As of this morning, hundreds of thousands of votes have been cast in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and California. Over 445,000 votes have been cast in Virginia alone. And early voting in New Jersey starts in just a matter of weeks. That means we are running out of time to reach voters before they cast their ballots. **If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make your first donation to the DNC, this is it. You can use this link to help us reach voters across the country:** [**https://democrats.org/go/voter-outreach**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251013_4834_fr&refcode2=4842_22930333_h-y_1z&akid=4842%2E22930333%2Eh-y_1z) Abigail Spanberger, Mikie Sherrill, and Democrats up and down the ballot aren’t taking a single vote for granted, and neither is our team. We’re working tirelessly to connect with as many voters as we can in these final, crucial weeks of this election cycle, and to win over the undecided, persuadable voters who will decide the outcome. This work is not possible without your support — and with time running out before people cast their ballots, your support is especially important right now. When you chip in today, you’ll be directly funding our work to elect Democrats nationwide like Abigail Spanberger, Mikie Sherrill. [**Just $7 can make all the difference right now. Click here to make your $7 donation.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251013_4834_fr&refcode2=4842_22930333_h-y_1z&akid=4842%2E22930333%2Eh-y_1z) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251013_4834_fr&refcode2=4842_22930333_h-y_1z&akid=4842%2E22930333%2Eh-y_1z)**

body:
We’ve got to root out this corruption and hold the perpetrators accountable
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117196735/575672641/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNGNiODQ5LTQ1YTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xGLBTQR3VSGF8vr1u1dmXXaTlyLSzcLbwEzpmzZpq8k=&emci=fd04b876-12a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ce4cb849-45a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, A quid pro quo scheme is unfolding right before our eyes in the wave of mid-decade map redraws pushed by Trump and the GOP. So what exactly is happening? Dustin Burrows, the Speaker of the House in Texas, got Trump’s endorsement after pushing for a new map that would help the GOP pick up five extra seats in Congress. Then, North Carolina State Senator Phil Berger reportedly negotiated Trump’s endorsement in exchange for pushing an egregious gerrymandering campaign. Meanwhile, Indiana Governor Mike Braun is warning that his state could lose federal funding if they don’t go along with Trump’s redistricting scheme. This is part of a bigger strategy designed by the Trump regime to bend Republicans to their will by any means necessary to rig the midterm elections, silence the voice of voters, and lock in GOP control of the House for years to come. **Peter, this is a level of corruption and bullying that must be rooted out of our democracy.** **The NDRC is here to fight back. We refuse to let anti-democracy lawmakers off the hook for extreme gerrymandering and blatant corruption.** [**Help us push back and expose this unacceptable behavior so we can hold politicians accountable and keep fighting for fair maps.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117196736/575672642/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CorruptionInPlainSight_email_20251013-NDRC-Tier1-CorruptionInPlainSight_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251013-NDRC-Tier1-CorruptionInPlainSight_&utm_campaign=CorruptionInPlainSight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlNGNiODQ5LTQ1YTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xGLBTQR3VSGF8vr1u1dmXXaTlyLSzcLbwEzpmzZpq8k=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We’ve got to root out this corruption and hold the perpetrators accountable | Peter, A quid pro quo scheme is unfolding right before our eyes in the wave of mid-decade map redraws pushed by Trump and the GOP. So what exactly is happening? Dustin Burrows, the Speaker of the House in Texas, got Trump’s endorsement after pushing for a new map that would help the GOP pick up five extra seats in Congress. Then, North Carolina State Senator Phil Berger reportedly negotiated Trump’s endorsement in exchange for pushing an egregious gerrymandering campaign. Meanwhile, Indiana Governor Mike Braun is warning that his state could lose federal funding if they don’t go along with Trump’s redistricting scheme. This is part of a bigger strategy designed by the Trump regime to bend Republicans to their will by any means necessary to rig the midterm elections, silence the voice of voters, and lock in GOP control of the House for years to come. Peter, this is a level of corruption and bullying that must be rooted out of our democracy. The NDRC is here to fight back. We refuse to let anti-democracy lawmakers off the hook for extreme gerrymandering and blatant corruption. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = — Biz John Bisognano President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

subject: The beginning of the end of Trump starts in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Trump’s plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity — a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDz-VK0mhXhuw-94EuPEPqC1ZG5gurkYcFZlyEGEfkFiQ1aXgy2haXpp3NtTt4P1GMcAzl-BjQklbz9hk31hr3gMYfC-32EvyCxHVeigF6fd17kl80RWV_MwJgiBBupjXPgilIor7DK5wlVFR-ehetUvBBsdhZzddisi4BRdnpsh0WUYyW08wY-DYs_oDVAXT1z7KduGnko_P5xPtlRuBzE4gOfUZWTIItU1qylKIQs=&c=qTx0LprM0jMQuBJCCbhgUKscGcFUKBs6tnvMLAW_UU4Rxa8nU7yIBQ==&ch=PG5FC0OetW41CoafkSNTD-qe5IJFNU17SerzICJu5RHcrN6f023Z7A==)
---
| Peter,
For the first tens months of Trump's return to the White House, Democrats have been mounting a desperate defense of Democracy from a president drunk with power.
We've seen Trump crack down on freedom of speech, unleash soldiers in American cities, and use ICE as his personal gestapo to inflict terror on Democrat run cities.
All of it is wildly unpopular -- but Trump's plowing ahead like elections don't matter. Because that's the plan: end democracy before voters can end him.
The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the bellwether for everything that comes next for America.
If Trump flips PA's Supreme Court, he'll control the very body that decides how elections are run in the most critical swing state in the nation. This would allow him to gerrymander PA, suppress Dem votes, and ban mail-in ballots to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDz-VK0mhXhuw-94EuPEPqC1ZG5gurkYcFZlyEGEfkFiQ1aXgy2haXpp3NtTt4P1GMcAzl-BjQklbz9hk31hr3gMYfC-32EvyCxHVeigF6fd17kl80RWV_MwJgiBBupjXPgilIor7DK5wlVFR-ehetUvBBsdhZzddisi4BRdnpsh0WUYyW08wY-DYs_oDVAXT1z7KduGnko_P5xPtlRuB3ngLYvXHmdsSnMkBGuC_ps=&c=qTx0LprM0jMQuBJCCbhgUKscGcFUKBs6tnvMLAW_UU4Rxa8nU7yIBQ==&ch=PG5FC0OetW41CoafkSNTD-qe5IJFNU17SerzICJu5RHcrN6f023Z7A==)
---
But Trump's plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity -- a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
His deeply unpopular fascist agenda can only continue if he is able to rig upcoming elections to avoid backlash from voters. But If Democrats win in PA this November, it will set off a chain reaction paving the way for Democrats to end the Trump era once and for all:

* Win Back the U.S. House in 2026 -- with fair districts and voter protections in PA, Trump loses his ability to tip the scales in MAGA's direction for the midterms.

* Halt Trump's Fascist Agenda in Congress-- with Dems in control of the House, they can stop his efforts to criminalize dissent, target the press, and rig the economy in favor of MAGA billionaires.

* Expose Trump's Corruption -- launch House investigations to uncover and prosecute the crimes, cover-ups, and abuses of his administration.

* End the Trump era for good in 2028 -- with the most important swing state in the nation protected, Trump faces a backlash at the polls for the utter failure of his presidency and Democrats win back the White House. America closes the door for good on the Trump era.

Defend Our Courts is leading the counterattack against Trump in PA, rallying tens of thousands of Democrats across the nation to join us in our defense of the Dems on PA's Supreme Court. Having now raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this fight.
But with only 22 days left, we are still being outspent by MAGA 10-1 in this race. With your help, we can close the spending gap by election day and ensure the beginning of the end of the Trump era starts in PA.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or $10 to help Defend Our Courts defend PA's Supreme Court and usher in the fall of Donald Trump?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TDz-VK0mhXhuw-94EuPEPqC1ZG5gurkYcFZlyEGEfkFiQ1aXgy2haXpp3NtTt4P1nUxCPNF7NseAk31P0-hlYm6MRYzzPGQP5ilgbzMtmOVFRZAL4DpK6oPHmCyUXcvkyGoZ1KDzG0n4oemX7UM-TJmViv2BhRL2ACd8Z3SwNtiudRbXyAEItbV2XrCyVEqwEfizHMHdF5dCOStd3ALCVmnxCoiqvg7u8f_Al2mqJVXBTBmskFvddw==&c=qTx0LprM0jMQuBJCCbhgUKscGcFUKBs6tnvMLAW_UU4Rxa8nU7yIBQ==&ch=PG5FC0OetW41CoafkSNTD-qe5IJFNU17SerzICJu5RHcrN6f023Z7A==)

name: Brian Bengs
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Bengs for South Dakota
body:
I left the National Parks to run for Senate

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/iCT2xuU60HgMPIz_S5ijEA~~/AAUS1hA~/ZvZpOzwZCkLUE992X6wjPidmVXoJ9VFk5dCPjCO1NYRGmYzdwW6p9kaClE1XSG05sxikHmz9WLvifyBwlipOxp-hJsSJyF16Nt7Vd7LhVyJY6EaDAfqW5fCIfFaLp4xO)
| | | | Willis, My name is Brian Bengs. I’m a retired Air Force Lieutenant Colonel, a JAG officer, and until recently, I wore the uniform of a Wind Cave National Park Ranger. I am running to represent South Dakota in the United States Senate as an Independent because I believe in the Cowboy Code of the West: **tell the truth and take care of your neighbor.** The modern U.S. Senate is a country club. It’s full of career politicians like Mike Rounds, who answer only to corporate PACs and D.C. party bosses. They have no idea what it’s like to work the night shift, pay for feed, **or worry about a government shutdown cutting off essential services.** [**I’m asking you to join me in changing that by becoming a Founding Donor to my campaign for Senate today.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/bbs2YgDkoEofzMHHrgWysw~~/AAUS1hA~/2VFghLv7y6lg9Y--H1VVy7diKjgEq5oKELvj3tLUrN20s_Fyf0yOn1rLzyMrMZ5CEf40rJ1IRR8PZtlrfMCcxxIBUapmOVaYImWgcuiyi3y3SRgb1o8w3pUVAWec32FREa8aRX-YM68WlL-w-4RB2qtNzAFSHj8t7HYdbmj4h6NyBs4xnQvfBOTiAo644ykukcmhrw0aMi-rMiK9cE0GhZUPmkDKud6UJxzyDOR8r6r3XVteP-swRXoOBPsj4MYcpyGjKS6vwEPoU88Pn0YlUjVkOS66nHqonXhO4Z4rGJcDxgCgzT140gpjbD_MEYqd-eZ63xZeZxtnYCEaXo62dJ6OTzdd_all6rPI4OGyvxalVUxP32wTmX9L6MSKzVQh) These guys have become far more comfortable in D.C. than in the states that elected them. They believe their wealth and loyalty to the party exempts them from the basic principles of service and integrity. That’s why we have chaos in our country. That’s why places like South Dakota get ignored. I’ve served this country for 26 years in the military. I don't answer to a political party or a single personality because I swore an oath to the Constitution. But taking on millions in corporate money and a D.C. machine requires a team built on principles, not privilege. It requires people like you. Listen, I know you can’t donate to every race, every organization, or every email. **But, here’s why I’d like you to consider giving to our campaign:** Mike Rounds has a 1 _7% approval rating_ among clean_body: I left the National Parks to run for Senate | | | | | Willis, My name is Brian Bengs. I’m a retired Air Force Lieutenant Colonel, a JAG officer, and until recently, I wore the uniform of a Wind Cave National Park Ranger. I am running to represent South Dakota in the United States Senate as an Independent because I believe in the Cowboy Code of the West: tell the truth and take care of your neighbor. The modern U.S. Senate is a country club. It’s full of career politicians like Mike Rounds, who answer only to corporate PACs and D.C. party bosses. They have no idea what it’s like to work the night shift, pay for feed, or worry about a government shutdown cutting off essential services. These guys have become far more comfortable in D.C. than in the states that elected them. They believe their wealth and loyalty to the party exempts them from the basic principles of service and integrity. That’s why we have chaos in our country. That’s why places like South Dakota get ignored. I’ve served this country for 26 years in the military. I don't answer to a political party or a single personality because I swore an oath to the Constitution. But taking on millions in corporate money and a D.C. machine requires a team built on principles, not privilege. It requires people like you. Listen, I know you can’t donate to every race, every organization, or every email. But, here’s why I’d like you to consider giving to our campaign: Mike Rounds has a 1 7% approval rating among independent voters in South Dakota, and your dollars go further in our race because the cost of media and campaign resources is significantly lower here. In fact, a $100 donation to my campaign is equivalent to a $3,100 contribution in Florida. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ~~ ~~ We should fund service. Not the swamp. Thank you for being part of the team that’s ready to shock Washington. Brian Bengs Independent Candidate for U.S. Senate ~~ ** ** | Paid for by Brian Bengs for South Dakota Brian Bengs for South DakotaPO Box 404Hot Springs, SD 57747United States "Website"

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Trump is not an aberration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Just look at what Republicans have been doing in Congress.
They have been voting to advance cuts on hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and Social Security **so that they can give it to the billionaires who elected them** , in the form of tax cuts and sweetheart government contracts to companies like SpaceX.
They know that it is deeply unpopular. They know that it hurts you.
But they are not here to serve us. They are here to serve themselves and the billionaires who have paid them. **Oligarchy**.
They know that the only chance they have to get away with such an unpopular agenda — to get away with stealing in plain view — is to stoke deep divisions among us along lines of race, identity, and culture to keep us distracted.
This has been the Big Money Playbook — not just now, but for generations.
And that is why **Donald Trump is not an aberration**.
He is the logical and inevitable conclusion to an American political system that has been dominated by corporate and dark money.
And if we are here to defeat him, **we must defeat the system that created him**.
**That means that we choose to out-organize the oligarchy**. We will, and we must, do away with the power of big money in our politics.
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? Every dollar helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251013.KLYVVN&refcode=em20251013-9941-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251013.KLYVVN&refcode=em20251013-9941-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu)**
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251013?refcode=em20251013-9941-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9941_2526796_BOs1gu&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251013-9941-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=9941%2E2526796%2EBOs1gu)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Our path to VICTORY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
his is our make-or-break moment:
This poll changes everything...
| Peter,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
**That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. **
Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul?

clean_body: his is our make-or-break moment: This poll changes everything... | Peter, Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown. But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would BEAT Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1 POINT! Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York! ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? | Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Mike Van Someren for State Senate
subject: Raising Wages Helps Businesses Thrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a5ef6dff208e/raising-wages-helps-businesses-thrive?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=f2c8ba3c77&e=356c0699dd)
| | | | | | Hi Peter,
**Here’s the bottom line:** When Wisconsin workers earn more, families have security, small businesses thrive, new businesses can grow, and communities flourish. A raise isn’t just about fairness, it’s about making your community stronger.I grew up in a middle-class family right here in Wisconsin. My family believed in hard work and fair play. My parents taught me that if you worked hard, you should be able to raise a family, keep a roof over your head, and save for the future. But that doesn’t seem to be true for a lot people. Too many families in our state are working just as hard (or harder) as before and are still falling behind. Wages haven’t kept up with the cost of living. Groceries, health care, child care, and heating and electric bills keep climbing, but paychecks aren’t stretching far enough. More and more families are forced into impossible choices. But here's the secret---it doesn’t have to be this way.A raise would change that.For working parents, it means not having to choose between putting food on the table and filling a prescription. For small businesses, it means more customers spending money locally—whether that’s at a restaurant in Oconomowoc, a shop in Hartford, or a hardware store in Delafield. Stronger paychecks mean stronger communities.And for those dreaming of starting a business, fair wages make it possible to take that leap. When people have financial stability, they can invest in their ideas, open new storefronts, and create jobs right here in Wisconsin. Raises don’t just lift workers and their families, they create the foundation for innovation and entrepreneurship. That’s why I’m running for State Senate: **to turn these conversations into action**. Because talk alone won’t pay the bills, and **families don’t need more speeches. They need results.** This campaign is about building a Wisconsin where work is rewarded, not exploited. Where families have security and opportunity. Where businesses can grow, and new ones can be born.Together, we can raise the floor so that all of Wisconsin can rise. And if you'll join me in this fight know this, I won't leave you hanging.

---
| | Thank you,
Mike Van Someren
---
| | Want to know more? Want to help elect people that actually want to work for you? Go to [www.mikevansomeren.com](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=8208d6eed3&e=356c0699dd) to donate and learn more.

subject: It’s dark in Chicago. It’s time to do something.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117199289/575680375/1190962558?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_121025_ENG_NoKings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk4YjI2NzktNDlhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oOK_S6Ja72tlAeYx3eaEqZemz2wDRWfhb36M5_2KX3g=&emci=ecd7b2d0-0ba6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=598b2679-49a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=81601)_
Team,

It’s been a scary week in Chicago. We’ve seen story after story of federal agents descending on the largest city in our state, people being shot, and immigrants ripped from their communities.

But here’s the thing about Chicago: _**We don’t back down.**_

Trump said that Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and Gov. JB Pritzker should “be in jail”. Pritzker told him to “come and get me.”

Illinois Democrats are fighting back.

Mayor Johnson issued an executive order barring federal troops from using city property.

Thankfully on Friday morning, a federal judge issued a temporary restraining order to block the deployment of federal troops in the city – another blow for Trump and his authoritarian ways.

We applaud all the Illinois Democrats who are holding strong for our values, and not allowing Trump and his MAGA cronies to steamroll us and our city.

**[Will you add your name now to thank the Illinois Democrats who stood up to fight for us against Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117199291/575680383/1190962558?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_121025_ENG_NoKings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk4YjI2NzktNDlhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oOK_S6Ja72tlAeYx3eaEqZemz2wDRWfhb36M5_2KX3g=&emci=ecd7b2d0-0ba6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=598b2679-49a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=81601)**

clean_body: Team, It’s been a scary week in Chicago. We’ve seen story after story of federal agents descending on the largest city in our state, people being shot, and immigrants ripped from their communities. But here’s the thing about Chicago: We don’t back down. Trump said that Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson and Gov. JB Pritzker should “be in jail”. Pritzker told him to “come and get me.” Illinois Democrats are fighting back. Mayor Johnson issued an executive order barring federal troops from using city property. Thankfully on Friday morning, a federal judge issued a temporary restraining order to block the deployment of federal troops in the city – another blow for Trump and his authoritarian ways. We applaud all the Illinois Democrats who are holding strong for our values, and not allowing Trump and his MAGA cronies to steamroll us and our city. hope to see you soon!
