name: Abigail
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me personally, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
The whole country is placing their hope in this team to win the biggest election of 2025.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail. It's been a few days since our debate, and I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_It was a milestone for our campaign._
And yes, the hour on stage with Winsome led the headlines. But this election is bigger than that. _It's about the future of our Commonwealth._
From my days as a federal law enforcement officer and then as a CIA officer, I worked to keep our country safe. Then I ran for Congress not for the title, but to improve people's lives. And in this race, I've shown that I will put Virginia first — always.
Now, the whole country is placing their hope in this team to win the biggest election of 2025 so we can set the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond.
**That's why I hope I can earn your support today.**
[_**So, I'm respectfully asking: Will you donate $25 to my campaign for Governor? It's going to take a lot more contributions to keep airing ads, mobilizing voters, and sharing our agenda.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117199528/575680927/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTU4YjI2NzktNDlhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Nbih7oTa80Zs9XXBx1Q2eCnbEjrn6fj71cjWQ9yN3_c=)

name: Uno reverse
subject: The beginning of the end of Trump starts in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Trump’s plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity — a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbXz_eG7GZaHFm9S9e7ps0um_4s2Z-V07gv90qOgKA4lz3cYY1Ve1098R1FE-jk-RYLF3x0wmJR-u8DKBP0yM2BgCnSGdXDsHP_SUZ8FB8o6no3gs3d1oV67rdiUVSjl7xGu1-pvXCoWHqUfSPpaDbo2ec_oEjg2ujfvxUFbe2-crff5EUYt3qRo_6CkNWPsHNdL7zMLHiimmNnqkZowlFASaPUrv4sQAtCZVkUJORI=&c=62NfRQ6aa7O822v2XfU5aNcSGJ1al6mv5Vde9g7tjtFVKspEYFEM9g==&ch=VOfDAomaavkMt_RblLYEpjTbVP8ikRDuyCIJye6bgv7ZZeKgS9ehUA==)
---
| Peter,
For the first tens months of Trump's return to the White House, Democrats have been mounting a desperate defense of Democracy from a president drunk with power.
We've seen Trump crack down on freedom of speech, unleash soldiers in American cities, and use ICE as his personal gestapo to inflict terror on Democrat run cities.
All of it is wildly unpopular -- but Trump's plowing ahead like elections don't matter. Because that's the plan: end democracy before voters can end him.
The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the bellwether for everything that comes next for America.
If Trump flips PA's Supreme Court, he'll control the very body that decides how elections are run in the most critical swing state in the nation. This would allow him to gerrymander PA, suppress Dem votes, and ban mail-in ballots to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbXz_eG7GZaHFm9S9e7ps0um_4s2Z-V07gv90qOgKA4lz3cYY1Ve1098R1FE-jk-RYLF3x0wmJR-u8DKBP0yM2BgCnSGdXDsHP_SUZ8FB8o6no3gs3d1oV67rdiUVSjl7xGu1-pvXCoWHqUfSPpaDbo2ec_oEjg2ujfvxUFbe2-crff5EUYt3qRo_6CkNWPsHNdL7zMLHiimmNnqkZowlFASaPUrv4sQBtzqyXFFXvY=&c=62NfRQ6aa7O822v2XfU5aNcSGJ1al6mv5Vde9g7tjtFVKspEYFEM9g==&ch=VOfDAomaavkMt_RblLYEpjTbVP8ikRDuyCIJye6bgv7ZZeKgS9ehUA==)
---
But Trump's plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity -- a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back.
His deeply unpopular fascist agenda can only continue if he is able to rig upcoming elections to avoid backlash from voters. But If Democrats win in PA this November, it will set off a chain reaction paving the way for Democrats to end the Trump era once and for all:

* Win Back the U.S. House in 2026 -- with fair districts and voter protections in PA, Trump loses his ability to tip the scales in MAGA's direction for the midterms.

* Halt Trump's Fascist Agenda in Congress-- with Dems in control of the House, they can stop his efforts to criminalize dissent, target the press, and rig the economy in favor of MAGA billionaires.

* Expose Trump's Corruption -- launch House investigations to uncover and prosecute the crimes, cover-ups, and abuses of his administration.

* End the Trump era for good in 2028 -- with the most important swing state in the nation protected, Trump faces a backlash at the polls for the utter failure of his presidency and Democrats win back the White House. America closes the door for good on the Trump era.

Defend Our Courts is leading the counterattack against Trump in PA, rallying tens of thousands of Democrats across the nation to join us in our defense of the Dems on PA's Supreme Court. Having now raised over 3 million dollars, we are one of the largest Democratic organizations in this fight.

clean_body: Trump’s plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity — a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back. | | | | | == | Peter, For the first tens months of Trump's return to the White House, Democrats have been mounting a desperate defense of Democracy from a president drunk with power. We've seen Trump crack down on freedom of speech, unleash soldiers in American cities, and use ICE as his personal gestapo to inflict terror on Democrat run cities. All of it is wildly unpopular -- but Trump's plowing ahead like elections don't matter. Because that's the plan: end democracy before voters can end him. The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election is the bellwether for everything that comes next for America. If Trump flips PA's Supreme Court, he'll control the very body that decides how elections are run in the most critical swing state in the nation. This would allow him to gerrymander PA, suppress Dem votes, and ban mail-in ballots to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. | | == But Trump's plot for a fascist takeover has cracked open an opportunity -- a chance for Democrats to flip the script and strike back. His deeply unpopular fascist agenda can only continue if he is able to rig upcoming elections to avoid backlash from voters. But If Democrats win in PA this November, it will set off a chain reaction paving the way for Democrats to end the Trump era once and for all: Win Back the U.S. House in 2026 -- with fair districts and voter protections in PA, Trump loses his ability to tip the scales in MAGA's direction for the midterms. Halt Trump's Fascist Agenda in Congress-- with Dems in control of the House, they can stop his efforts to criminalize dissent, target the press, and rig the economy in favor of MAGA billionaires. Hi Peter - **Happy Indigenous Peoples ' Day! **Today is a day to honor the strength, resilience, and rich history of all Indigenous people across the entire country. As the former President and a proud member of Navajo Nation, I believe it's crucial to reflect on the fact our state still doesn't officially recognize Indigenous Peoples' Day. Our state's refusal to formally acknowledge this day is a painful reminder that the voices and experiences of Native peoples continue to be ignored and overlooked. If elected, I would be the first-ever Native member of Congress from Arizona -- but I need your help to get there. We're building a warchest ahead of a tough campaign next year, [**and I 'm so grateful for anything you can chip in.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/DNUBYGQ26HZQa_rb4HBEvg~~/AAPPABA~/W7xD6ytwdaePZbOCQYKlmFW5I9LX2BdWQUfw5dqPNw0KMAOLBbRnwk6k5_gCk2i1M2e1nuiXdKKlzSgOJ6s2LK2oFWSQbvbu56b16pJG-3cre9gx2_SGGzJQ7OUpUV8_FL8UT7XkR9XObHNqftlxM2E62cqf0IkOMNc9qqCqWDZmbMndDueEBUkQ3pOqekzNCaYEXToz-dgF9F0W-hUNihg_4LxhAoukp8TSQJ0xKsIOJ24GK4zwligdLR_CgPUPy46O5fPLPT7IjTAMuut-Eah82uJI79R13jM2pvX6WsguJa648dmfSfE1nW69__nKVMiBtg406tb7Fnn8QWiW_UejWWQDjph0d34qSof3LA7LG7MHvPCIaKk9ge7JCPMl)

Indigenous Peoples' Day was first reclaimed in 1992, pivoting the day from one that celebrated Christopher Columbus, to one that instead focused on the Indigenous people. This reclamation is a reminder of our resilience, our rich culture and history, and our ongoing presence in our nation.**It would be my solemn honor to be our state 's first Native American to serve in Congress. ** This Indigenous Peoples' Day, I ask you to use this day as a catalyst for change** - to educate, to advocate, and to take action for the health and future of the Navajo Nation and all Indigenous peoples.** Thank you for taking the time to honor and reflect on this important day, Jonathan Nez

clean_body: | | Hi Peter - Happy Indigenous Peoples ' Day! Today is a day to honor the strength, resilience, and rich history of all Indigenous people across the entire country. As the former President and a proud member of Navajo Nation, I believe it's crucial to reflect on the fact our state still doesn't officially recognize Indigenous Peoples' Day. Our state's refusal to formally acknowledge this day is a painful reminder that the voices and experiences of Native peoples continue to be ignored and overlooked. If elected, I would be the first-ever Native member of Congress from Arizona -- but I need your help to get there. We're building a warchest ahead of a tough campaign next year, | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ Indigenous Peoples' Day was first reclaimed in 1992, pivoting the day from one that celebrated Christopher Columbus, to one that instead focused on the Indigenous people. This reclamation is a reminder of our resilience, our rich culture and history, and our ongoing presence in our nation.It would be my solemn honor to be our state 's first Native American to serve in Congress. This Indigenous Peoples' Day, I ask you to use this day as a catalyst for change - to educate, to advocate, and to take action for the health and future of the Navajo Nation and all Indigenous peoples. Thank you for taking the time to honor and reflect on this important day, Jonathan Nez | | ~~ "Facebook" ~~ "X" ~~ "Instagram" www.tiktok.com/@nezforaz "TikTok" Jonathan Nez for Congress PO Box 1854 Flagstaff, AZ 86002 United States Contributions or gifts to Jonathan Nez for Congress are not tax deductible. Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress. |

name: URGENT: Action Required (via VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor issued a STARK warning >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our jaws are on the floor...
| _Justice Sotomayor just put the MAGA SCOTUS majority & Donald Trump to SHAME:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94694?t=6&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F) **If a member of the Supreme Court — _who is supposed to be impartial_ — is sounding the alarm, _we should ALL be listening._**

Team, we’re so grateful for Sotomayor’s BRAVE leadership — but Republicans are FURIOUS with Sotomayor, and they’re _plotting revenge._

We need to show Supreme Court Justice Sotomayor that Democrats (especially Democrats in your state) have her back!

[**As one of the FEW protectors of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. WE HAVE ONLY 18 SPOTS LEFT:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94694?t=7&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94694?t=8&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda and blatant disregard of the Constitution.**

Your bravery continues to blow us away, time after time.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94694?t=9&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94694?t=10&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94694?t=11&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21476%2E878179%2Ecwi37F)

subject: I’m so sorry to email you like this
body:
Patriot, I'm so sorry to email you like this, but tomorrow is the cutoff to respond, and your response was just flagged for me as **[MISSING]** from our database!
MAGA Republicans released a brand-new [TRUMP SATISFACTION SURVEY](https://e.e.informedrepublicans.com/re?l=D0I2xufmolItepw1evI0ITmgpkd0ps&s=DEHADBIIJELJGLAK) earlier this month with the goal to have 100 completed submissions from your area.
**So far, only 99 have responded ... _which means we 're just waiting on YOU!_**
[Patriot, all responses will be immediately flagged for President Trump's team, so it's important that you help us complete our survey before midnight.](https://e.e.informedrepublicans.com/re?l=D0I2xufmolItepw1evI1ITmgpkd0ps&s=DEHADBIIJELJGLAK)**Trump Satisfaction Survey**
**Registered to:** Patriot**Due:** 11:59 PM (ET)1.) Do you approve of the ICE deportations of illegal aliens?2.) Do you approve of banning men from women's sports?3.) Do you approve of tapping into American energy resources?4.) Do you approve of using our military to address the border crisis?5.) Do you approve of ending taxes on tips?_*** Optional Question: Are there any questions, comments, or concerns you 'd like to share with your Republican Senate Majority? ***_[TAKE THE SURVEY ->

Thank you,
_
Meredith from __Team Marsha Blackburn_[ TAKE THE SURVEY ->

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: This is the inflection point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final stand. My freedom is on the line. The cavalry is here – YOU.

My final stand. My freedom is on the line. The cavalry is here – YOU.
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9b7dj92fmvfrh07burcccfqnj99v8ejobnnbpi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeaor4c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
My final trial is closing in.
---
**An Obama-aligned Attorney General is forcing me into a rigged _state_ trial where President Trump legally can’t save me with a _federal_ pardon.**
---
In an earlier letter to you, I said that I’ve been left with no pardon, no lifeline, and _no cavalry coming over the hill._**
---
But boy, was I wrong!
---
Over 1 MILLION Americans signed the “ _People’s Pardon of Rudy W. Giuliani._ ” THANK YOU!
---
And now, a new report from _The Arizona Republic_ shows the Attorney General is losing ground in her witch hunt against me:
---
**Decision time nears: Attorney General Mayes outlines options...**
“...she did not rule out walking away from the high-profile prosecution”
---
**There _was_ a cavalry coming over the hill. It was YOU – the American people.**
---
But the battle isn’t won yet... Until I am proclaimed a **_FREE_ _MAN_** , until ALL charges are dropped, and until I’m no longer facing _20 YEARS_ IN PRISON, _I will not stop fighting_!
---
With “decision time” for the Attorney General fast approaching – and a real chance this wrongful prosecution could be dropped – I’m asking YOU to add your name to the public letter to “**FREE RUDY.** ”
---
[**Please add your name to the public letter to “FREE RUDY” to ensure I do not go to prison as an innocent man until I’m 100 years old.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqpoje8bmg25872tgn6ifjlt29r9nimdlrsgpskg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeaor4c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjk38d35iqg2i0a61f3c3lekfev62kiavvgp9rdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeaor4c1h2bs)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zej9ml8cj7ib9pf3lhnpmf9ojl4thsr9i7f26mf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeaor4c1h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd1b4ppqts2dp1s9ggut5esbd7qaf6h54l8m0n90_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeaor4c1h2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
P.S. In other good news, I am continuing to recover well following the devastating car crash. Just as President Trump is fond of saying, “NEVER SURRENDER!”
---

subject: I am starting to get concerned, Peter…
body:
| | | | Peter,
I've been trying to reach you for weeks, and I'm starting to get concerned...
As part of the Team Marsha GOP HQ team, it's my job to collect one million responses to our Support Audit, yet I’m STILL missing your response!
[Your zip code is one of the most critical areas in the country, and right now, we're falling behind. We really need your input to complete our research and make key decisions that will impact the future of our party.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxM19TSC04Ri4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjcyNTgtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMTNfU0gtOEYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzI3MjU4LTEwNDMifQ/VgerjXSLtiDYFZb56cu8Cw)[GOP HQ SUPPORT AUDIT](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxM19TSC04Ri4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjcyNTgtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMTNfU0gtOEYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzI3MjU4LTEwNDMifQ/pP2Ros9p9JvZ-ChLZJmDKw)RESPONSE = OVER DUESupporter: PeterEmail: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxM19TSC04Ri4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjcyNTgtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMTNfU0gtOEYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzI3MjU4LTEwNDMifQ/MWMAbdjYhugQqZw5chPpjQ)[RESPOND NOW >>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAxM19TSC04Ri4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjcyNTgtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMTNfU0gtOEYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzI3MjU4LTEwNDMifQ/q3N8wQ-5gAKyZBx43q9YPw)The survey is just 4 questions, and it will take you less than a minute to complete. But without your response, our data is incomplete, and our strategy is at risk.
Peter, we’re counting on you. Please take a moment to respond now.
Sincerely,

subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbHOnDAQhJ_GdCC8BgOFi0iI7k-bEq3thbMO28g2l9ePuOiUJsVf7szsaD_tr6_1C93hwv4TPSmj15RXi-kZ3P4oHhPlFVroa97WXNwmr6wyE0Gnu4oUH2QrBuAwVg-1od30uHEzWTFIaQg6abteGDMZ2QKvnLq7eMsFl7wH2ZgBYbJ65KPmG2hkXUvWlZgaE0Om9MLiXqRTRGswlyZQqQ71KOXMTPxgsDBYMpkrUYOBbCyNiZ7BEp9EG3myDvcUr_OW_F7fYPU_strr-ownMrFcxa85XskQE_N_ogzkHbkbL8_E_F77qxn0J7o9MDF_6D5ODIVCYWI2moFEH6_3BH2VlD1_u-NwWQ6sa3eP7rhvr8r3fvBS8CcAAP__sBaSNw) [****](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbHOnDAQhJ_GdCC8BgOFi0iI7k-bEq3thbMO28g2l9ePuOiUJsVf7szsaD_tr6_1C93hwv4TPSmj15RXi-kZ3P4oHhPlFVroa97WXNwmr6wyE0Gnu4oUH2QrBuAwVg-1od30uHEzWTFIaQg6abteGDMZ2QKvnLq7eMsFl7wH2ZgBYbJ65KPmG2hkXUvWlZgaE0Om9MLiXqRTRGswlyZQqQ71KOXMTPxgsDBYMpkrUYOBbCyNiZ7BEp9EG3myDvcUr_OW_F7fYPU_strr-ownMrFcxa85XskQE_N_ogzkHbkbL8_E_F77qxn0J7o9MDF_6D5ODIVCYWI2moFEH6_3BH2VlD1_u-NwWQ6sa3eP7rhvr8r3fvBS8CcAAP__sBaSNw) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbHOnDAQhJ_GdCC8BgOFi0iI7k-bEq3thbMO28g2l9ePuOiUJsVf7szsaD_tr6_1C93hwv4TPSmj15RXi-kZ3P4oHhPlFVroa97WXNwmr6wyE0Gnu4oUH2QrBuAwVg-1od30uHEzWTFIaQg6abteGDMZ2QKvnLq7eMsFl7wH2ZgBYbJ65KPmG2hkXUvWlZgaE0Om9MLiXqRTRGswlyZQqQ71KOXMTPxgsDBYMpkrUYOBbCyNiZ7BEp9EG3myDvcUr_OW_F7fYPU_strr-ownMrFcxa85XskQE_N_ogzkHbkbL8_E_F77qxn0J7o9MDF_6D5ODIVCYWI2moFEH6_3BH2VlD1_u-NwWQ6sa3eP7rhvr8r3fvBS8CcAAP__sBaSNw). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbHOnDAQhJ_GdCC8BgOFi0iI7k-bEq3thbMO28g2l9ePuOiUJsVf7szsaD_tr6_1C93hwv4TPSmj15RXi-kZ3P4oHhPlFVroa97WXNwmr6wyE0Gnu4oUH2QrBuAwVg-1od30uHEzWTFIaQg6abteGDMZ2QKvnLq7eMsFl7wH2ZgBYbJ65KPmG2hkXUvWlZgaE0Om9MLiXqRTRGswlyZQqQ71KOXMTPxgsDBYMpkrUYOBbCyNiZ7BEp9EG3myDvcUr_OW_F7fYPU_strr-ownMrFcxa85XskQE_N_ogzkHbkbL8_E_F77qxn0J7o9MDF_6D5ODIVCYWI2moFEH6_3BH2VlD1_u-NwWQ6sa3eP7rhvr8r3fvBS8CcAAP__sBaSNw).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyMkbHOnDAQhJ_GdCC8BgOFi0iI7k-bEq3thbMO28g2l9ePuOiUJsVf7szsaD_tr6_1C93hwv4TPSmj15RXi-kZ3P4oHhPlFVroa97WXNwmr6wyE0Gnu4oUH2QrBuAwVg-1od30uHEzWTFIaQg6abteGDMZ2QKvnLq7eMsFl7wH2ZgBYbJ65KPmG2hkXUvWlZgaE0Om9MLiXqRTRGswlyZQqQ71KOXMTPxgsDBYMpkrUYOBbCyNiZ7BEp9EG3myDvcUr_OW_F7fYPU_strr-ownMrFcxa85XskQE_N_ogzkHbkbL8_E_F77qxn0J7o9MDF_6D5ODIVCYWI2moFEH6_3BH2VlD1_u-NwWQ6sa3eP7rhvr8r3fvBS8CcAAP__sBaSNw).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Honoring Indigenous Peoples’ Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
Today, on Indigenous Peoples’ Day, we pause to honor the history, resilience, and contributions of Native and Indigenous communities in Colorado and across the nation.
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, I have been proud to work closely with the Ute Mountain Ute and Southern Ute Indian Tribes to expand voting access and protect the voices of Indigenous peoples. In 2019, we partnered with tribal leaders to guarantee voting access on tribal lands, ensuring that every tribal member who wanted to participate in our elections had the ability to do so. These efforts matter because access to the ballot is more than a right – it is a cornerstone of democracy, self-determination, and justice.
But our work cannot stop here. Indigenous communities continue to face systemic inequities, from health care to education to the protection of lands and water. As Attorney General, I will continue to respect tribal sovereignty, stand with tribal leaders, and fight for equity, justice, and inclusion across our state.
On Indigenous Peoples’ Day, let us commit to truth, accountability, and action. Let us celebrate the contributions of Native communities while recognizing our responsibility to build a future where every Coloradan can thrive.
Thank you,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

name: Team Guzman
subject: State Navigate forecast: this race is CLOSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Friend — A new nonpartisan State Navigate forecast just dropped... and it shows our campaign with a 65% chance of flipping this seat. That’s the good news. The bad news? It means we’re one bad week away from losing our edge. This race is that close. Every door we knock, every call we make, and every dollar we raise could be the difference between a 65% chance — and zero. Billionaires and Trump’s MAGA allies are pouring money into Virginia to stop us. They know if we flip this seat, we move one step closer to a Democratic trifecta — and one step closer to passing real gun safety laws, protecting reproductive freedom, and defending LGBTQ+ rights. We can win this. But it’s fragile — and it’s going to take everything we’ve got in these final days. ** ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. The forecast may say we have a 65% chance of winning. But in the next few weeks, let’s do everything we can to make it 100%. If we hold the line, we will. Thanks for standing with us. Let’s finish strong. Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Donald John Trump
subject: Please, I’m starting to worry…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

name: Deb Haaland
subject: re: Indigenous Peoples’ Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
It’s Indigenous Peoples’ Day, so I want to take a moment to honor some of the fierce Indigenous women who made me who I am.
[**But first, I’m running to represent all New Mexicans and give a voice to those who don’t have one. Will you donate $5 to our grassroots campaign for governor to help make history in New Mexico?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_1_ipd.G2ieUu&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-4974&t=2&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
From my great-grandmother, mother and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_1_ipd.G2ieUu&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-4974&t=3&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
_The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee!_
My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_1_ipd.G2ieUu&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-4974&t=4&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
_Mom served in the Navy, and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Indian Band._
Standing on the shoulders of the Indigenous women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so our youth would know they can be _anything_ they want to be.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_1_ipd.G2ieUu&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-4974&t=5&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
_Credit: CNN_
But here’s what I’m reminded of this Indigenous Peoples’ Day: History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together.
[**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor. Would you consider helping us build momentum with a contribution of $5? Your support could help make history in this race.** ](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_1_ipd.G2ieUu&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-4974&t=6&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251013_1_ipd.G2ieUu&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-4974&t=25&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)**
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251013-1&t=26&refcode2=4974_400544_n4yPeP&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=27&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=28&akid=4974%2E400544%2En4yPeP)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

From my great-grandmother, mother and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women. The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee! My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs. Mom served in the Navy, and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Indian Band. Standing on the shoulders of the Indigenous women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so our youth would know they can be anything they want to be. Credit: CNN But here’s what I’m reminded of this Indigenous Peoples’ Day: History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together. Be fierce, Deb

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Be a part of history
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztdqeabg3c065uhamigpulf65cunqlfdm8m8jo7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1isb9je5fjq330bkjnjb3g23tcvpoa6vjlcvslg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4s89id8f14kf74t6jm2rfj72458ah7neg1jn1k8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziebumgmrtqpciokc9ing1cot8elfqrhqkmll2mg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhkb7sf4fit1bo4f597c1aepfj4uapl9i8j3qdc8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdvnm9tk7ligkcgb36ovag1ma207s2mbenmif4c8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6rgdued4hgqteo03h7sino25s2mj3fmbspbitf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsto7k87rip6m3esji2hh6sbn76ura3504sl09c0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zabit2t2pbu5l03rptebhmfji0nmdfn7jqviqkhg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm489u93nq2pav92afp4u6b2k6i8mgcd3pcjihvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpge6pb1c9h2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
subject: WTAS: ‘Incorruptible’ Nancy Dahlstrom Launches Bid for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Governor
body:
In case you missed it (and we’re not sure how that’s possible!), Alaska
Lieutenant Governor Nancy Dahlstrom announced her campaign for governor
last..

<https://dfx1kn0n80mx5.cloudfront.net/email/image/38a812090dab476bbfc51c
861fd19e94.png>
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
CONTACT: press@nancyforalaska.com
OCTOBER 13, 2025
WTAS: ‘Incorruptible’ Nancy Dahlstrom Launches Bid for Governor
ANCHORAGE, Alaska – In case you missed it (and we’re not sure how that’s
possible!), Alaska Lieutenant Governor Nancy Dahlstrom announced her
campaign for governor last week, sending a wave of excitement across
the Land of the Midnight Sun.

A fighter by nature, Lieutenant Governor Dahlstrom is already working
hard to show Alaskans why, and here’s what they’re saying about her
candidacy:

* “I remember when you first were appointed to be the
Commissioner of the Department of Corrections. And I remember what you
inherited from the Walker administration. And I remember my council was
this, was we need somebody we absolutely can trust who is
uncorruptible. And then it became Nancy Dahlstrom. And I was like,
there couldn't have been a better pick. And you did great things over
there at DOC while you were there as Commissioner.” – The Amy Demboski
Show
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84962&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81337>
* “‘I’m stepping forward to lead Alaska because I believe in its
future, and I want our kids and grandkids to see theirs here,’
Dahlstrom stated, speaking on her motivation in joining the race.” –
Must Read Alaska
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84962&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81338>
* “In a press release, Dahlstrom lists standing up for election
integrity, budget discipline, and defending Alaska’s ‘values and
interests’ as her accomplishments in her current position. Dahlstrom
has served as lieutenant governor since 2022. Previously, she served as
Department of Corrections Commissioner and a member of the State
Legislature.” – Alaska’s News Source Fairbanks
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84962&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81339>
* “Dahlstrom says her leadership approach will focus on stronger
communication with lawmakers. ‘I think you might find that my
communication style is a little bit different. I will be working with
the legislature directly — maybe more than has been happening. That’s
just my style.’” – Your Alaska Link
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84962&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81340>

Bottom Line: Lieutenant Governor Nancy Dahlstrom has a history of
incorruptible service to the people of Alaska, and voters know she’ll
lead the same way as their governor.

###
nancyforalaska.com
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=84962&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=81341>

Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Governor

<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/open?s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC3-A904
-E168017696C1&c=84962>

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Sign the card for Rep. AOC’s birthday ➡️
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251013-1572-foote&t=1001&akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

It’s Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s birthday! AOC is committed
to being a fair and fearless leader, a bold fighter for justice, and a
progressive champion for our communities.

From taking on corporate greed to fighting for the policies that matter
most to working-class families, AOC has never backed down. Every single
day, she brings courage, clarity, and compassion to the halls of Congress
— and inspires a grassroots movement far beyond it.

To celebrate this day, the Squad Victory Fund is putting together a
special card from Rep. AOC’s supporters across the country to show her how
much we appreciate her dedication to always standing up and speaking truth
to power.

Your message will remind her that this isn’t just her fight — it’s ours,
too. She’s a core part of an evergrowing people-powered movement that
refuses to accept the status quo, and demands lasting, transformative
change for our communities.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AOC-birthday-card-25_copy/?source=em20251013&t=1002&akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI ]Will you sign this birthday card and add a personal message to Rep.
AOC?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AOC-birthday-card-25_copy/?source=em20251013&t=1003&akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI ]Happy Birthday, AOC!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AOC-birthday-card-25_copy/?source=em20251013&t=1004&akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI ]SIGN THE CARD

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

The Squad is standing up to far-right extremism, corporate greed, and
the GOP’s attacks on our fundamental rights — but we need you with us to
fuel this fight.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251013-movement.TwcuZO&refcode=em20251013-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI ]Chip in today to stand with the Squad and power this movement
forward.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251013-movement.TwcuZO&refcode=em20251013-1572&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI ]Contribute ››

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1572%2E342411%2EhVUkDI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Be a part of history
body:
You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.

| | |
---
| | Dear Friend, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl5vk8p43jhd6745t7m8jqbob2mv2vvitluol1l8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z06troi35rg8e8ak1d1db5hrufnj4c6soi47c5v0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsu522cq5ma3fiuolrprvb7809lam279hoi356i8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3mptdtk7o9nj0666cj51b6lpevc1l2bfijahe5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6drdqsnij21esffq7b6tt1315h7uddlgaeomoko_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl5a8bdpo9opfr8ro0kvsc3htbdr5dm47scml008_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5rufffmukhmh3sqouo3c9bbo8i97dlc7es5j1jg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn92s1qh4lj79dafle9767lva54r10qsg4jfudmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zusqcq3nba5osn4hdt1te411ccg0fmdbs8eh4140_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd02gqg2djgbtc1s7ncsdot9i09q61njg1eq0ve0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs) **Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztqtdfdkvfujscm0aehg8ch9kc67kmlsutma5qng_rp22sh2s8i6eor0cpgeeob4c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

---

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Announcing my new initiative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117204096/575695581/-1728836336?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-10-13_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmY1ZGU5Ny01M2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FwoyL-oco0eQfDYuL4xsuMh_kkFcAGelZ3k9DMWZnhM=)
---
The chaos and dysfunction in Washington are worse than ever — and it’s all because the Republican majority is more focused on partisan infighting than actually governing.

**Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026.**

And Michigan?

We’ve got **FIVE** competitive seats — three to flip and two to defend.

That’s why I launched my Majorities Are Made in Michigan initiative to protect my own battleground seat in MI-03 and support Democrats across the state. Your contribution will be amplified by FIVE times. With a single contribution, you can support the following five seats — two to hold, and 3 to flip:

→ MI03 (HOLD)

→ MI04 (FLIP)

→ MI 07 (FLIP)

→ MI08 (HOLD)

clean_body: Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026. | = The chaos and dysfunction in Washington are worse than ever — and it’s all because the Republican majority is more focused on partisan infighting than actually governing. Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House in 2026. And Michigan? We’ve got FIVE competitive seats — three to flip and two to defend. That’s why I launched my Majorities Are Made in Michigan initiative to protect my own battleground seat in MI-03 and support Democrats across the state. Your contribution will be amplified by FIVE times. With a single contribution, you can support the following five seats — two to hold, and 3 to flip: → MI03 (HOLD) → MI04 (FLIP) → MI 07 (FLIP) → MI08 (HOLD) → MI10 (FLIP) = | | | = | = If we want to take back the House majority, we need to build a firewall right here in Michigan. That means protecting health care, fighting extremism, and making sure Congress works for working people, not billionaires and special interests. This isn’t just about one race. Peter, by now, you've likely heard the news: Donald Trump and his administration have indicted me on baseless charges – all because I’ve done my job as Attorney General.
For months now, we've seen Trump manipulate the justice system in a coordinated effort to go after his political opponents for defending the rule of law.
I knew that holding the most powerful and corrupt accountable – especially the president – could make me a target. But I'm not about to back down now, and I know you aren't either, Jessica.
Trump is escalating his political retribution campaign – and I need your immediate help to fight back.
We must show, right now, that the American people reject his dangerous political revenge campaign. I'm calling for 20,000 rapid-response donations today to send an unmistakable message: We won’t back down. Will you rush a donation split between me and The Real Texas right now to help me stand firm and keep fighting? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2]

body:
Important message about Donald Trump’s latest attempt to sow chaos in Portland:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117204233/575696009/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjYxMzdmNS01M2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xX_9mJs3c8HXDpGgjqOmwMGVCzFSUTjGO4L_5OHsuCo=) Team, it’s Andrea. I wanted to reach out with an update on Donald Trump’s latest attempt to sow chaos and disorder — and deploy troops onto the streets of American cities. **FIRST:** Trump tried to federalize the National Guard and **ILLEGALLY** deploy troops onto the streets of Portland. **THEN:** A _TRUMP-APPOINTED_ Judge **BLOCKED** the deployment, ruling that Trump has NO authority to send the National Guard into Portland. **BUT NOW:** **Donald Trump is refusing to throw in the towel and is continuing to spread blatant lies, in a gross attempt to justify his authoritarian attacks on our communities. ** I want to be very clear: _**The military has no place on our streets, and if Trump wants to push the boundaries here, Oregonians will hold him accountable**_. **[Today, it’s more important than ever that we prove we’re UNITED against Trump’s attempts to weaponize the military against the American people, in Oregon and beyond. Together, we can make Trump’s latest undemocratic scheme BACKFIRE, by ushering in a wave of Democratic support — but I need supporters like you to have my back. Will you chip in $15 right away to help me send a message that we won’t stand for Trump’s authoritarian attacks on American cities →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117204235/575696010/1477919608?amount=15&refcode=email_101325_portland&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjYxMzdmNS01M2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xX_9mJs3c8HXDpGgjqOmwMGVCzFSUTjGO4L_5OHsuCo=)** | | **[RUSH A DONATION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117204238/575696014/1477919608?amount=15&refcode=email_101325_portland&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjYxMzdmNS01M2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xX_9mJs3c8HXDpGgjqOmwMGVCzFSUTjGO4L_5OHsuCo=)**
---
Let’s be clear about what’s going on:
Instead of sending resources to help Americans get through the Republican shutdown, Donald Trump STILL insists on attacking Portland, spreading lies about our people, and trying to justify his authoritarian scheme to send troops onto the streets of American cities.
Donald Trump might believe he’s a king who operates above the Constitution, **but Americans elect Presidents — _not kings._**
**I’m doing everything in my power to oppose Trump’s massive federal overreach and defend Oregon families from these attacks — but I need you on board.**
**[Will you join me in this fight, and show Trump and the Republican party that we’re UNITED against their attacks on our democracy? name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: The indigenous people of Arizona shaped the state we know today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Arizona's 22 sovereign nations have been here for thousands of years. Their contributions continue to shape our state's future. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117204305/575696305/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251013_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JhZDliNGItNTRhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tqb8jCHyyaaVTCYT1Lz062UA_RgyNo8JWnF6bzwwZlQ=)
---
Hi there — **Today is Indigenous Peoples' Day, and in Arizona, this recognition carries special weight.**

Long before Arizona became a state — before it was even a territory — indigenous communities thrived here since time immemorial. Indigenous peoples engineered sophisticated irrigation systems in what's now the Phoenix metro area, canals so advanced they became the foundation for our modern water infrastructure. The Ancestral Puebloans, Sinagua, and Mogollon peoples built thriving communities across the land we call home today.

**Our state is proudly home to 22 federally recognized tribes representing over 296,000 people.** More than a quarter of our state's land area is tribal land, including the Navajo Nation — the largest in the United States — and the Tohono O'odham Nation, the third largest.

Arizona's Indigenous peoples actively shape our state's identity, economy, and culture right now.

The Hopi, O'odham, Apache, Yavapai, Paiute, Pascua Yaqui, and so many others maintain their languages, traditions, and sovereignty despite centuries of forced assimilation, displacement, and systemic attempts to erase their existence. Their resilience defines Arizona's character as much as the desert landscape.

Today, these communities face real challenges — from inadequate water infrastructure and economic opportunity, to healthcare disparities that the COVID-19 pandemic made painfully clear. In the Navajo Nation alone, 36% of residents live below the poverty line, and 35% lack running water.

These aren't acceptable conditions for _anyone_ in 2025.

**Recognizing Indigenous Peoples' Day means committing to — and advocating for — tribal sovereignty, supporting Indigenous-led solutions to infrastructure gaps, and ensuring Arizona's first peoples have a voice in decisions affecting their communities and our shared future.** That includes making sure Arizona elects leaders that advocate for native communities — both on and off tribal lands.

This is what progress looks like: truth-telling, solidarity, and ensuring that Arizona works for everyone who calls it home.

Happy Indigenous Peoples' Day.
— Arizona Democratic Party | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117204306/575696306/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251013_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2JhZDliNGItNTRhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tqb8jCHyyaaVTCYT1Lz062UA_RgyNo8JWnF6bzwwZlQ=)
---

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll consider becoming a monthly donor to our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1001&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1002&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

There’s a lot of chaos in our politics right now — and some days, it feels
like the people trying to do the right things are outspent, outshouted,
and outmuscled by corporate PACs and billionaires.

But when I start to feel that frustration creep in, I remind myself of
something simple: Real, lasting change has never come from the people with
the most money. It comes from the people who stick around and are a part
of a movement bigger than themselves.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/515?c0=em-ms-aes-20251013-1-ak.B55cJP&amount=10&refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1004&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]Join our progressive movement by becoming a monthly donor to our
campaign.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/515?c0=em-ms-aes-20251013-1-ak.B55cJP&amount=10&refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1005&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]Donate monthly »

When you start a recurring donation, even $5 a month, it helps us plan for
the long haul — hiring organizers early and adding more events to the
calendar.

Recurring support keeps us focused on organizing, not chasing the next
check. It lets us fight for working people instead of currying favor with
corporate PACs.

Especially with our primary date potentially moving from August to May,
knowing our campaign can count on a steady stream of resources each month
makes a huge difference.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/515?c0=em-ms-aes-20251013-1-ak.B55cJP&amount=10&refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1006&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]If you’re able to, please start a monthly donation of any amount today.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/515?c0=em-ms-aes-20251013-1-ak.B55cJP&amount=10&refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1007&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]Donate monthly »

Thanks for standing with me in this fight. It means more than you know.

In solidarity,

Abdul

P.S. If a monthly contribution doesn’t work for you right now, I
understand. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251013-1-ak.5Wc1yt&amount=10&refcode=em20251013-1098&t=1008&akid=1100%2E251025%2EXClY4s ]A one-time gift of $10 keeps our momentum
going.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate
clean_body: [ ]Abdul for US Senate [ ]Abdul for US Senate Peter, There’s a lot of chaos in our politics right now — and some days, it feels like the people trying to do the right things are outspent, outshouted, and outmuscled by corporate PACs and billionaires. But when I start to feel that frustration creep in, I remind myself of something simple: Real, lasting change has never come from the people with the most money. It comes from the people who stick around and are a part of a movement bigger than themselves. [ ]Join our progressive movement by becoming a monthly donor to our campaign. [ ]Donate monthly » When you start a recurring donation, even $5 a month, it helps us plan for the long haul — hiring organizers early and adding more events to the calendar. Recurring support keeps us focused on organizing, not chasing the next check. It lets us fight for working people instead of currying favor with corporate PACs. Especially with our primary date potentially moving from August to May, knowing our campaign can count on a steady stream of resources each month makes a huge difference. [ ]If you’re able to, please start a monthly donation of any amount today. [ ]Donate monthly » Thanks for standing with me in this fight. It means more than you know. In solidarity, Abdul P.S. If a monthly contribution doesn’t work for you right now, I understand. [ ]A one-time gift of $10 keeps our momentum going.

Folks, it’s Jay Jones. I need to tell you something.
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up and it’s a must-reach. Falling short with only a few weeks left until Election Day would be devastating.
This means we need to make every effort to raise as much as we can to close the 2-to-1 fundraising gap with Trump-endorsed incumbent Jason Miyares. Because of this, you might receive an extra email or two from us.
I know these political emails can get tiring, but they’re also so important to helping our campaign stay on track to reach our goals and win this race.
So, I’ll keep this short. If you’re ready to make sure Virginians have an Attorney General who’ll stand strong against Trump’s corruption, will you chip in $15 or more right now to help us get a head start at reaching our goal? name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Breaking Huge SCOTUS win on gender ideology
body:
Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckT2O3DAMhU8jdx5Q4lieLVQsYhhIsUGqpDRkiaMR1vqBJM9cP3CyvkA6go98Dx_5-2P50H7z0f3QgZR5-qXUZS2kP310j91RNant9eVjio4WAWLoOfQcl1xSzWTawjurjJUoOlJ8lIDjMF6heyguwdy5lJIGeBN0B5Ckx3UFI9b1djedV4cfB4585AOOFxgHQJTmBiCBbiu7wp6tblQvJsVK5ambf5KPMR1ViheTQrepR2u5MnxnYmZi1va-kdPbJRXHxFz3nFNpTMwnVx_pVXubom50rOBc014MmWSJ4cQ5oHxDZELuLSz_NIbTSeyj-5ICWb8HhhMF7bevptEha-8iw6l-lkCt-TP4yD2nUmwUG8Pp53v_7df3_jxFV5TNL79tvsqRXcEd1n852__-56nEnwAAAP__xQOjkg)
**[BREAKING: Court Gives Green Light to EVERY State to Protect Children](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckT2O3DAMhU8jdx5Q4lieLVQsYhhIsUGqpDRkiaMR1vqBJM9cP3CyvkA6go98Dx_5-2P50H7z0f3QgZR5-qXUZS2kP310j91RNant9eVjio4WAWLoOfQcl1xSzWTawjurjJUoOlJ8lIDjMF6heyguwdy5lJIGeBN0B5Ckx3UFI9b1djedV4cfB4585AOOFxgHQJTmBiCBbiu7wp6tblQvJsVK5ambf5KPMR1ViheTQrepR2u5MnxnYmZi1va-kdPbJRXHxFz3nFNpTMwnVx_pVXubom50rOBc014MmWSJ4cQ5oHxDZELuLSz_NIbTSeyj-5ICWb8HhhMF7bevptEha-8iw6l-lkCt-TP4yD2nUmwUG8Pp53v_7df3_jxFV5TNL79tvsqRXcEd1n852__-56nEnwAAAP__xQOjkg)** Dear Fellow American,

Praise God! The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled, 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti_ that states can protect kids from harmful drugs and surgeries. Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

This is a landmark victory for every child in our country, as the ruling will allow EVERY state to implement similar laws to protect children from the harms of gender ideology.

This win moves us that much closer to finally ending the practice of experimenting on children.
[ DONATE](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckT2O3DAMhU8jdx5Q4lieLVQsYhhIsUGqpDRkiaMR1vqBJM9cP3CyvkA6go98Dx_5-2P50H7z0f3QgZR5-qXUZS2kP310j91RNant9eVjio4WAWLoOfQcl1xSzWTawjurjJUoOlJ8lIDjMF6heyguwdy5lJIGeBN0B5Ckx3UFI9b1djedV4cfB4585AOOFxgHQJTmBiCBbiu7wp6tblQvJsVK5ambf5KPMR1ViheTQrepR2u5MnxnYmZi1va-kdPbJRXHxFz3nFNpTMwnVx_pVXubom50rOBc014MmWSJ4cQ5oHxDZELuLSz_NIbTSeyj-5ICWb8HhhMF7bevptEha-8iw6l-lkCt-TP4yD2nUmwUG8Pp53v_7df3_jxFV5TNL79tvsqRXcEd1n852__-56nEnwAAAP__xQOjkg)
**Gender ideology is on the ropes.** Now we have to keep the momentum going and finish the job. Several cases and many clients are still waiting for justice from the lies of gender ideology, including:
* **Selina Soule** --she and several other female athletes have been standing up for fairness on and off the field for years. We've beaten back efforts to rewrite Title IX at the federal level, but many states, like Connecticut, continue to push policies that force girls to compete against male athletes.
* **Dan and Jennifer Mead** --their daughter's school secretly treated her as a boy, as part of the school's "social transition" policy. Many school districts around the country still have these policies in place.
* **Brian and Katy Wuoti** --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family.

[With your gift today,](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckT2O3DAMhU8jdx5Q4lieLVQsYhhIsUGqpDRkiaMR1vqBJM9cP3CyvkA6go98Dx_5-2P50H7z0f3QgZR5-qXUZS2kP310j91RNant9eVjio4WAWLoOfQcl1xSzWTawjurjJUoOlJ8lIDjMF6heyguwdy5lJIGeBN0B5Ckx3UFI9b1djedV4cfB4585AOOFxgHQJTmBiCBbiu7wp6tblQvJsVK5ambf5KPMR1ViheTQrepR2u5MnxnYmZi1va-kdPbJRXHxFz3nFNpTMwnVx_pVXubom50rOBc014MmWSJ4cQ5oHxDZELuLSz_NIbTSeyj-5ICWb8HhhMF7bevptEha-8iw6l-lkCt-TP4yD2nUmwUG8Pp53v_7df3_jxFV5TNL79tvsqRXcEd1n852__-56nEnwAAAP__xQOjkg) we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. **Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!**

Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms.

In Christ,

John Bursch
Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti._ Your gift today helps ADF clients who are still waiting for justice. [Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckT2O3DAMhU8jdx5Q4lieLVQsYhhIsUGqpDRkiaMR1vqBJM9cP3CyvkA6go98Dx_5-2P50H7z0f3QgZR5-qXUZS2kP310j91RNant9eVjio4WAWLoOfQcl1xSzWTawjurjJUoOlJ8lIDjMF6heyguwdy5lJIGeBN0B5Ckx3UFI9b1djedV4cfB4585AOOFxgHQJTmBiCBbiu7wp6tblQvJsVK5ambf5KPMR1ViheTQrepR2u5MnxnYmZi1va-kdPbJRXHxFz3nFNpTMwnVx_pVXubom50rOBc014MmWSJ4cQ5oHxDZELuLSz_NIbTSeyj-5ICWb8HhhMF7bevptEha-8iw6l-lkCt-TP4yD2nUmwUG8Pp53v_7df3_jxFV5TNL79tvsqRXcEd1n852__-56nEnwAAAP__xQOjkg)

Skrmetti that states can protect kids from harmful drugs and surgeries. Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures. This is a landmark victory for every child in our country, as the ruling will allow EVERY state to implement similar laws to protect children from the harms of gender ideology. This win moves us that much closer to finally ending the practice of experimenting on children. Gender ideology is on the ropes. Now we have to keep the momentum going and finish the job. Several cases and many clients are still waiting for justice from the lies of gender ideology, including: Selina Soule --she and several other female athletes have been standing up for fairness on and off the field for years. We've beaten back efforts to rewrite Title IX at the federal level, but many states, like Connecticut, continue to push policies that force girls to compete against male athletes. Dan and Jennifer Mead --their daughter's school secretly treated her as a boy, as part of the school's "social transition" policy. Many school districts around the country still have these policies in place. Brian and Katy Wuoti --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family. we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!** Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms. In Christ, John Bursch Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in United States v. Skrmetti. Your gift today helps ADF clients who are still waiting for justice. Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

We’re building something here in New Hampshire: **Momentum.**
Our campaign raised over $1.8 million last quarter thanks to the help of this grassroots team.
That’s with _zero_ dollars from corporate PACs, and 95% of our donations were $100 or less. It shows that our movement is powerful, and if we stand together, we can overcome anything that national Republicans and Donald Trump throw our way.

If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25755812.13301.1.3ca8108205fc65a3d3b7c6919ae3d96b)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25755812.13302.1.6e4a6a7aef1f697b454dce04b6f79769)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25755812.13303.1.e5adb1e3c7098a2f8d68f44215a26318). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25755812.13304.1.1e1fb4b14508632a1ca740d4ada06c3f) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25755812.13305.1.fe9e690252da0eab4ab8f14988a11d3d) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25755812.13306.1.c46d595587374726e2b14016d4bb5c0d) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

Knocking doors is the most impactful way to make sure every voice in our community is heard. Please sign up to block walk!

Every life saved through our crime-fighting efforts. Every family protected from fentanyl dealers. Every victim who finally got justice. **That's what's on the ballot.**

My opponent has disqualified himself from this office. **Jay Jones fantasized about killing political opponents, watching their children die, and said dead cops are a good thing.**

Virginia families deserve protection, not persecution and chaos.

**Early voting continues through November 1st.**
