name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 10/13/2025
body:
School unions gave $11K to Jeffco candidate who admitted to a sealed juvenile sexual offense
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**October 13, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
As we mark **Columbus Day** , we pause to reflect on the spirit of discovery that shaped our nation — a spirit of courage, faith, and perseverance that led explorers to venture into the unknown. May we continue to seek truth, chart new paths, and protect the freedoms that make this country worth exploring and defending.
Now, let's dive into this week's top story... a story that shocked Jefferson County.
This last week, Rocky Mountain Voice broke the news that [school board candidate Michael Yocum privately admitted to having a sealed juvenile sexual offense record](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—a fact he never disclosed publicly. We obtained verified recordings of Yocum acknowledging the incident and reviewed campaign finance records showing he received more than [$11,000 in contributions and in-kind support from major education unions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), including the Jefferson County Education Association (JCEA) and the Colorado Education Association’s Public Education Committee.
In conversations with voters after public forums, Yocum downplayed the admission, insisting “there’s nothing that would preclude me from running.” But under Colorado law, juvenile adjudications are sealed—meaning voters had no way to verify the details independently. The silence from JCEA only deepened concern, especially after [years of misconduct cases within the district](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Parents and taxpayers wanted answers.
**And then, this week — the pressure worked.**
Just today, the Jefferson County Education Association [officially withdrew its recommendation of Yocum](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), citing “newly learned information” about his sealed record. The decision came after days of outrage from parents, local officials, and community members demanding transparency.
But instead of taking responsibility, JCEA’s statement tried to spin the moment, **calling their critics “political extremists”** who were using “a complicated and traumatic event from over a decade ago to achieve their own political outcomes.”
Let’s call that what it is: **an excuse.**
Holding leaders accountable for honesty and integrity isn’t “extremism.” It’s citizenship. And the truth is simple — _the only reason this endorsement was pulled is because the people of Jefferson County refused to stay silent._
**This is what real journalism and grassroots action can do.** When facts are exposed, when communities engage, and when accountability is demanded — change happens.
At Rocky Mountain Voice, we’ll keep asking the hard questions, following the facts, and standing for transparency — no matter how uncomfortable it makes those in power.
Because truth still matters in Colorado.
In liberty and truth,
Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Colorado: Where Criminals Come to Stay and Play](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The FBI recently released detailed data on more than 14 million criminal offenses from calendar year 2024, reported to the Uniform Crime Reporting (UCR) Program by participating law enforcement agencies. More than 16,000 state, county, city, university, college, and tribal agencies, covering around 95.6% of the population of the United States, submitted data to the UCR Program through the National Incident-Based Reporting System and the Summary Reporting System.

**[Is Rep. Marshall’s narrow 2024 win now at risk in Douglas County?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rep. Bob Marshall (D-HD43) represents one of Colorado’s most politically mixed suburban districts, covering parts of Highlands Ranch and Littleton. The area is built around families, good schools, and a long-standing belief in local control and fiscal restraint.
**[Fix It or Fund It: Inside the $361 million standoff over Colorado’s unfunded mandates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado counties say they’re done footing the bill for laws they didn’t fund. Citing a 1991 statute and more than $361 million in unfunded mandates, the Fix It or Fund It coalition is asserting that if the state won’t pay, local governments won’t comply.

|
---
**STATE**
**[GOP Gubernatorial Candidates Clash Over Medicaid Cuts and Budget Deficit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Nine Republican candidates for next year’s gubernatorial election participated in a debate Thursday night hosted by the Denver Press Club, where they faced questions on issues like the budget, cost of living, and Medicaid from moderators Marianne Goodland and Ernest Luning of Colorado Politics.
__
**[Colorado’s HB25‐1250 shifts gun conversation into schools—what could go wrong with teachers filing ERPOs?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _A bill passed into law in the regular legislative session this year required, quoting the bill’s fiscal note from the first link below “The bill requires the Office of Gun Violence Prevention in the Department of Public Health and Environment (CDPHE) to post or link to certain materials on its website for local education providers, including school districts, boards of cooperative services, district charter schools, institute charter schools, approved facility schools, and the Colorado School for the Deaf and the Blind.”_

**[Why Ditching the Flat Tax Would Be Colorado’s Biggest Mistake](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The battle over Colorado’s future tax system has officially begun, and the stakes for families, businesses, and the state’s economy couldn’t be higher._
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Supreme Court case claims Colorado’s conversion therapy ban erases gay identity, silences counselors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A controversial Supreme Court case challenging a ban on so-called conversion therapy, as it pertains to treating transgender children, is attracting unlikely allies.
**[Lawsuit Claims VA Diverted Medical Resources from Veterans to Aid Illegal Immigrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Veterans Affairs Department is facing a lawsuit after failing to disclose information related to the department’s alleged improper use of medical resources during the Biden administration to benefit illegal immigrants.

**[NIH-funded study buried findings of elevated COVID vaccine risks on children](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) NIH-funded study of "long COVID" and reinfection hides findings on risks stratified by vaccination status deep in a supplement, contradicting researchers' conclusions and media narrative that vaccines are the answer.

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[“This is too important to improvise”: D49 superintendent says sports lawsuit seeks clarity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Superintendent Peter Hilts says protecting girls' athletic opportunity—and preventing boys from lifelong regret—is only part of the story. It's also about fixing incoherent policies and standing in the gap as adults.

**[Carrying the mission forward: October 11 Legacy Rally to honor Charlie Kirk in Grand Junction](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) One month after the assassination of Charlie Kirk, his message of faith and freedom is rallying new ground. On Saturday night, Turning Point USA will gather national speakers, local pastors and community leaders at the Mesa County Fairgrounds—marking both remembrance and renewed resolve.
__
**[Some thoughts worth considering before city folk vote on the “Vibrant Denver” bond](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL WHITCOMB, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _The Denver Mayor and City Council are pushing the borrowing of $950 million—not including interest costs of up to $1 billion over the life of the loan—for a total cost approaching $2 billion. I and other interested residents are urging Denver not to take on any new debt, including this proposed bond issue, at this time. Here are a few reasons why._

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Wheat Ridge Brewery Targeted After Hosting Conservative Discussion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In a shocking turn of events, a Wheat Ridge brewpub actually (you might want to sit down for this one) recently allowed a group of customers meeting informally to discuss conservative politics to come inside to buy food and drinks. Among the participants was Barbara Kirkmeyer, a state senator and Republican candidate for governor. Scandalous!_
__
**[More Than Colorado: How Friendship and Faith Are Expanding the Rocky Mountain Voice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Let me tell you about a longtime friend of mine—and now a dear friend of Rocky Mountain Voice—Joe Cherry, CEO and Founder of Exectras in Houston, Texas. As I write this, I’m sitting in his remarkable home in Houston, Texas._ __

**[When the prosecutor is also the judge: Colorado’s due process problem under Griswold’s watch](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _If you break one of our state regulatory agencies’ copious rules, the process for our state’s administrative hearings bears little resemblance to a real trial. I recently did some looking into the state’s administrative hearings process, and was disappointed in what I found._
__

**[The sword is passed: Honoring Charlie Kirk’s bold stand for truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _As we conclude this series on The Sword of the Spirit, my heart feels both heavy and hopeful. Heavy, because we mourn the loss of a strong, confident voice for truth and a dear friend of Rocky Mountain Voice—Charlie Kirk. Hopeful, because his legacy shows us the trail we are called to follow, with no exceptions, and in my opinion, there is no better way to close this powerful series._
__
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
📖**DID YOU KNOW?** **Colorado was the first state to officially recognize Columbus Day as a holiday on April 1, 1907.** This isn’t surprising considering Colorado even has a major city named after the Italian explorer. After Colorado, New York soon followed in 1909. And then, in 1934, President Franklin D. Roosevelt declared Columbus Day a national holiday.

Dear everyone,
We only have a couple weeks left. The California Democratic Party is working day and night to help pass Prop 50 this November because we know this may be our last chance to put a check on Donald Trump’s unrelenting abuses of power. Everything is on the line this November, not just for Californians, but ALL Americans.
Why is Proposition 50 so important? It’s because of our overarching core mission to retake control of the U.S. House of Representatives.
Donald Trump’s second term has been a disaster for Californians and all Americans. He has sent the military in to occupy cities, his chaotic tariff policies have rattled our economy, and healthcare plus food assistance has been ripped away from families.
We absolutely must put a “check” on this rollercoaster. And that means taking back the U.S. House Majority.
But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies aren’t going to make it easy. That’s why they turned to red states like Texas to make impromptu changes in their Congressional maps to eliminate blue seats.
Here in California, we are aiming to pass Proposition 50 — which will temporarily adjust our maps to reduce the net loss of blue seats across the nation.
That keeps us in the game for control of the U.S. House.
Your donation today is crucial, because going into 2025, nobody expected there to be a massive ballot initiative like Prop 50. That has created an unbudgeted strain on resources and reduced our ability to plan our U.S. House strategy. Will you please pitch in $ or more to directly fund organizing happening on the ground RIGHT NOW that will ultimately ensure we flip the U.S. House seats needed to take back our House Majority and stop Donald Trump in his tracks? # Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* Trump calls for calm over China Tariffs
* Open AI just signed another huge deal and stocks soar
* $300M deal to power data centers opens up new opportunities
* Black Rock's ETF's lead the investor's charge in to AI and Fintech
* Central Bankers on edge over AI as IMF meeting starts
* After Friday's Crypto Mega Crash, signs of life emerge
* Citibank steams ahead with 2026 Crypto plans

### **Today 's markets + assets:**
* **✅ DOW: 46057.95 (⬆️ 1.27%)**
* **✅ S&P: 6654.97 (⬆️ 1.56%)**
* **✅ NASDAQ: 22666.09 (⬆️ 2.08%)**
* **⚠ ️⬇️CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 19.25 (⬇️ 11.13%)**
* **✅ Gold: $4125.3 (⬆️ 3.12%)**
* **✅ Silver: $50.22 (⬆️ 6.28%)**
* **🔴 Bitcoin: $114,630 (⬇️ 0.25%)**

* * *
* * *
# Trump calls for calm over 100% China Tariffs and Markets rebound
**[President Donald Trump urged calm](https://substack.com/redirect/40defff5-065d-48e9-ad95-aab856aadc44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Sunday after threatening 100% tariffs on Chinese imports in retaliation for Beijing's rare earth export curbs, posting on Truth Social that "it will all be fine" as China's Commerce Ministry vowed swift countermeasures, jeopardizing a fragile trade truce.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40defff5-065d-48e9-ad95-aab856aadc44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump Eases Trade War Fears:** Posted on Truth Social assuring Americans China's economic woes are temporary, emphasizing U.S. desire to aid rather than harm Beijing amid Xi Jinping's "bad moment."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40defff5-065d-48e9-ad95-aab856aadc44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump 's Post:** _" Don't worry about China, it will all be fine! Highly respected President Xi just had a bad moment. He doesn't want Depression for his country, and neither do I. The U.S.A. wants to help China, not hurt it!!! President DJT"_
* **Beijing Vows Firm Retaliation:** Commerce Ministry warned U.S. threats undermine dialogue, pledging "resolute measures" if tariffs proceed while approving civilian rare earth licenses.
* **Tariffs Escalate to 100 Percent:** Proposal doubles current 55% average levy on Chinese goods, set for potential Nov. 1 rollout, triggered by China's dominance in vital minerals for tech and defense.
* **Vance Defends U.S. Leverage:** On Fox News, vice president called China's supply chain control a "national emergency," predicting Trump holds "far more cards" in any aggressive standoff.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/119678bc-c48c-4f15-a693-72be848a553c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/119678bc-c48c-4f15-a693-72be848a553c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/119678bc-c48c-4f15-a693-72be848a553c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/119678bc-c48c-4f15-a693-72be848a553c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# **OpenAI announces ANOTHER blockbuster deal sending stocks soaring**
OpenAI announced a **[blockbuster partnership with Broadcom](https://substack.com/redirect/c5140f3d-98eb-40ca-a364-bd6a459ef8fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Sunday to co-design 10 gigawatts of custom AI accelerators. The announcement sent Broadcom's shares surging 12% and adding to OpenAI's multi-vendor push with Nvidia and AMD amid explosive demand for frontier models like ChatGPT.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/449b7836-33e3-4090-bbe0-db5588dfa149?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Broadcom Shares Skyrocket**
Partnership revelation propelled Broadcom's stock up 12% premarket, capping a 40% yearly gain after doubling in 2024, fueled by $10 billion undisclosed OpenAI deal last month.
* **AI-Optimized Chip Design**
OpenAI leveraged its models to slash chip area massively, enhancing human-optimized components for superior efficiency in compute, memory, and Ethernet networking tailored to inference workloads.
* **Rapid Deployment Horizon**
Racks of custom accelerators slated for late-2026 rollout, expanding OpenAI's current 2-gigawatt capacity to 33 gigawatts total via recent Nvidia, Oracle, and AMD pacts.
* **Efficiency Fuels Superintelligence**
Custom chips promise cheaper, faster AI models, empowering OpenAI's roadmap to superintelligence while diversifying from Nvidia to control costs and destiny in the generative boom.

* * *
* * *
# $300m dollar deal signed to power AI data centers by 2030
Bloom Energy shares rocketed 17% to $28.50 Monday after inking a $300 million deal with Brookfield Renewable t**[o deploy 100 MW of solid oxide fuel cells](https://substack.com/redirect/415ccd78-7f67-48d2-8231-e035e507d3bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for powering AI data centers, targeting up to 1 GW expansion.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/415ccd78-7f67-48d2-8231-e035e507d3bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Deal Targets AI Power Crunch** : The initial 100 MW deployment addresses data centers' massive 100 MW+ needs, strained by AI's 24/7 demands which are projected to consume 8% of U.S. electricity by 2030.
* **Fuel Cells Boost Efficiency** : Solid oxide tech delivers up to 65% efficiency using natural gas or hydrogen, enabling on-site, low-emission generation without grid or fossil fuel reliance.
* **Executives Hail Milestone** : Bloom CEO Greg Cameron calls it a "significant milestone" for clean AI power; Brookfield's Connor Teskey praises resilient, low-carbon solutions for energy security.
* **Expansion Fuels Revenue Growth** : Potential scaling to 1 GW unlocks further revenue, positioning Bloom as key player in decarbonizing AI infrastructure amid booming data center builds.

* * *
* * *
# Black Rock's ETFs are the hot new target for investors into AI and Fintech
BlackRock's top **[equity ETFs are betting big](https://substack.com/redirect/69a7fc97-05be-4ecf-b26c-0abb2bccec56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on artificial intelligence and blockchain, with investors ditching broad tech funds for targeted funds like the AI-focused iShares BAI, which is up 36% since launch, amid surging enthusiasm for AI Tech's disruptive potential.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69a7fc97-05be-4ecf-b26c-0abb2bccec56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **AI ETFs Surge Dramatically** : Investors are flocking to BlackRock's iShares A.I. Innovation ETF (BAI), featuring Nvidia and Microsoft as top holdings, capturing the full spectrum of value of the AI ecosystem from chips to models.
* **Blockchain Bets Gain Momentum** : The Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHA) has skyrocketed 42% in 12 weeks, positioning blockchain as a game-changer for stablecoins and asset tokenization beyond mere crypto speculation.
* **Regulatory Tailwinds Accelerate Growth** : The new GENIUS Act boosts stablecoin confidence, with experts eyeing policy shifts under the Trump administration as fuel to fintech and crypto innovations.
* **Amplify 's BLOK Leads Charge**: Actively managed blockchain fund BLOK delivers 89% yearly gains, spotlighting diverse use cases from payments to real estate tokenization for broader market impact.

* * *
* * *
# Central Bankers are jittery over the AI Bubble as the IMF convenes in D.C.
Central bankers descending on Washington for IMF meetings are gripped by dread over a **[brewing stock market bubble fueled by AI hype](https://substack.com/redirect/2f4e048e-8020-4c6f-b877-00dc11025842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , evoking the dot-com crash's chaos, as President Trump's fresh China tariff threats already sent stocks tumbling Friday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2f4e048e-8020-4c6f-b877-00dc11025842?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Echoes Dot-Com Disaster** : Current AI stock valuations mirror late-1990s internet frenzy, where IMF's mild 2000 warning preceded a brutal selloff and Fed's emergency rate slash.
* **Global Warnings Escalate** : The Bank of England has already flagged "sharp correction" risks related to AI; ECB policymakers have been briefed on potential sudden price drops; and Australia's central bank has also highlighted market vulnerabilities this month.
* **IMF Report Looms Large** : Tuesday's Global Financial Stability Report--a product unthinkable in 2000--will dissect equity dangers, fueling debates at G7/G20 sessions amid trade and debt storms.
* **Emerging Economies Vulnerable** : If the bubble were to burst it could tighten global finance, slashing growth and hammering developing nations in an already fragile world order.

* * *
* * *
# Crypto's biggest crash ever happened on Friday, Risky bets get liquidated WHOLESALE
In a vicious plunge **[the cryptocurrency market shed billions](https://substack.com/redirect/930b9e84-7211-44a8-ba46-28d84efeb3ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in value through cascading liquidations on Friday that in some cases continued over the weekend. Bitcoin dipped below $110,000 and Ethereum tumbled over 20%--yet experts spot early rebound signs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/930b9e84-7211-44a8-ba46-28d84efeb3ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Leverage Fuels Massive Losses** : Margin accounts and those trading on leveraged positions - with up to 100x leveraged exposure in some cases - triggered chain-reaction liquidations, amplifying crypto's 24/7 volatility far beyond traditional stocks. The result wiped out hundreds to millions of dollars for individual traders and totaling billions industry-wide.
* **Expert Eyes Quick Rebound** : Forensic analyst Joshua Duckett notes the market's shift from"rebound-to-stable" after the initial knee-jerk drop.
* **Costs Still Being Assessed** : The fall out from the crash is still being assessed as information comes to light across different exchanges. Unofficial initial estimates put the losses at more than $19 Billion.
* **The Human Cost:** A 32-year-old Ukrainian crypto influencer and trader, died of an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound inside his Lamborghini in Kyiv on Oct. 11, hours after voicing depression over **[crippling financial losses](https://substack.com/redirect/70245b13-dda2-4af6-86fe-fb4914f0da8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** amid a global crypto market crash. Konstantin "Kostya Kudo" Galich, Co-founder of Cryptology Key academy, Galich mentored thousands as a prominent digital asset strategist in Ukraine and and around the world, blending trading expertise with online influence.
* **Invest Wisely, Limit Risks** : Amid the turmoil, Joshua Duckett urges traders to follow core rules--never risk more than you can afford to lose and thoroughly research assets--for navigating crypto's high-stakes swings.

* * *
* * *
# Citigroup is full steam ahead on Crypto despite Friday's cataclysmic crash
Citigroup **[announced plans Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/24629e43-09ef-458a-bbf5-fae60d29cd37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to launch a cryptocurrency custody service in 2026, seizing on a Trump-era regulatory thaw to hold digital assets like Bitcoin for clients, while probing stablecoin issuance to streamline global payments in underserved markets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24629e43-09ef-458a-bbf5-fae60d29cd37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Custody Launch Targeted:** Citi's crypto custody service, developed over the last two-to-three years, aims for a full 2026 rollout, offering secure storage for native cryptocurrencies to asset managers and institutional clients.
**Stablecoin Probes Underway:** The bank is also in early-stage exploration of issuing stablecoins, eyeing their utility for 24/7 cross-border transactions in regions with underdeveloped banking infrastructure.
**Hybrid Tech Strategy Emerges:** Citi weighs in-house built solutions for tailored custody needs against lightweight third-party partnerships, building on its existing Citi Token Services for blockchain-based money movement.
**Rivals Heat Up Competition:** JPMorgan and Bank of America are also advancing stablecoin efforts amid clearer U.S. rules like the GENIUS Act, though JPMorgan so far has shunned direct crypto custody due to security concerns.
* * *

Highly respected President Xi just had a bad moment. He doesn't want Depression for his country, and neither do I. The U.S.A. wants to help China, not hurt it!!! President DJT" Beijing Vows Firm Retaliation: Commerce Ministry warned U.S. threats undermine dialogue, pledging "resolute measures" if tariffs proceed while approving civilian rare earth licenses. Tariffs Escalate to 100 Percent: Proposal doubles current 55% average levy on Chinese goods, set for potential Nov. 1 rollout, triggered by China's dominance in vital minerals for tech and defense. Vance Defends U.S. Leverage: On Fox News, vice president called China's supply chain control a "national emergency," predicting Trump holds "far more cards" in any aggressive standoff. Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits. We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide. | | ---|---|--- OpenAI announces ANOTHER blockbuster deal sending stocks soaring OpenAI announced a on Sunday to co-design 10 gigawatts of custom AI accelerators. The announcement sent Broadcom's shares surging 12% and adding to OpenAI's multi-vendor push with Nvidia and AMD amid explosive demand for frontier models like ChatGPT. Broadcom Shares Skyrocket Partnership revelation propelled Broadcom's stock up 12% premarket, capping a 40% yearly gain after doubling in 2024, fueled by $10 billion undisclosed OpenAI deal last month. AI-Optimized Chip Design OpenAI leveraged its models to slash chip area massively, enhancing human-optimized components for superior efficiency in compute, memory, and Ethernet networking tailored to inference workloads. Rapid Deployment Horizon Racks of custom accelerators slated for late-2026 rollout, expanding OpenAI's current 2-gigawatt capacity to 33 gigawatts total via recent Nvidia, Oracle, and AMD pacts. Efficiency Fuels Superintelligence Custom chips promise cheaper, faster AI models, empowering OpenAI's roadmap to superintelligence while diversifying from Nvidia to control costs and destiny in the generative boom. $300m dollar deal signed to power AI data centers by 2030 Bloom Energy shares rocketed 17% to $28.50 Monday after inking a $300 million deal with Brookfield Renewable t for powering AI data centers, targeting up to 1 GW expansion. | | ---|---|--- Deal Targets AI Power Crunch : The initial 100 MW deployment addresses data centers' massive 100 MW+ needs, strained by AI's 24/7 demands which are projected to consume 8% of U.S. electricity by 2030. Fuel Cells Boost Efficiency : Solid oxide tech delivers up to 65% efficiency using natural gas or hydrogen, enabling on-site, low-emission generation without grid or fossil fuel reliance. Executives Hail Milestone : Bloom CEO Greg Cameron calls it a "significant milestone" for clean AI power; Brookfield's Connor Teskey praises resilient, low-carbon solutions for energy security. Expansion Fuels Revenue Growth : Potential scaling to 1 GW unlocks further revenue, positioning Bloom as key player in decarbonizing AI infrastructure amid booming data center builds. Black Rock's ETFs are the hot new target for investors into AI and Fintech BlackRock's top on artificial intelligence and blockchain, with investors ditching broad tech funds for targeted funds like the AI-focused iShares BAI, which is up 36% since launch, amid surging enthusiasm for AI Tech's disruptive potential. | | ---|---|--- AI ETFs Surge Dramatically : Investors are flocking to BlackRock's iShares A.I. Innovation ETF (BAI), featuring Nvidia and Microsoft as top holdings, capturing the full spectrum of value of the AI ecosystem from chips to models. Blockchain Bets Gain Momentum : The Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHA) has skyrocketed 42% in 12 weeks, positioning blockchain as a game-changer for stablecoins and asset tokenization beyond mere crypto speculation. Regulatory Tailwinds Accelerate Growth : The new GENIUS Act boosts stablecoin confidence, with experts eyeing policy shifts under the Trump administration as fuel to fintech and crypto innovations. Amplify 's BLOK Leads Charge: Actively managed blockchain fund BLOK delivers 89% yearly gains, spotlighting diverse use cases from payments to real estate tokenization for broader market impact. Central Bankers are jittery over the AI Bubble as the IMF convenes in D.C. Central bankers descending on Washington for IMF meetings are gripped by dread over a , evoking the dot-com crash's chaos, as President Trump's fresh China tariff threats already sent stocks tumbling Friday. | | ---|---|--- Echoes Dot-Com Disaster : Current AI stock valuations mirror late-1990s internet frenzy, where IMF's mild 2000 warning preceded a brutal selloff and Fed's emergency rate slash. Global Warnings Escalate : The Bank of England has already flagged "sharp correction" risks related to AI; ECB policymakers have been briefed on potential sudden price drops; and Australia's central bank has also highlighted market vulnerabilities this month. IMF Report Looms Large : Tuesday's Global Financial Stability Report--a product unthinkable in 2000--will dissect equity dangers, fueling debates at G7/G20 sessions amid trade and debt storms. Emerging Economies Vulnerable : If the bubble were to burst it could tighten global finance, slashing growth and hammering developing nations in an already fragile world order. Crypto's biggest crash ever happened on Friday, Risky bets get liquidated WHOLESALE In a vicious plunge in value through cascading liquidations on Friday that in some cases continued over the weekend. Bitcoin dipped below $110,000 and Ethereum tumbled over 20%--yet experts spot early rebound signs. | | ---|---|--- Leverage Fuels Massive Losses : Margin accounts and those trading on leveraged positions - with up to 100x leveraged exposure in some cases - triggered chain-reaction liquidations, amplifying crypto's 24/7 volatility far beyond traditional stocks. The result wiped out hundreds to millions of dollars for individual traders and totaling billions industry-wide. Expert Eyes Quick Rebound : Forensic analyst Joshua Duckett notes the market's shift from"rebound-to-stable" after the initial knee-jerk drop. Costs Still Being Assessed : The fall out from the crash is still being assessed as information comes to light across different exchanges. Unofficial initial estimates put the losses at more than $19 Billion. The Human Cost: A 32-year-old Ukrainian crypto influencer and trader, died of an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound inside his Lamborghini in Kyiv on Oct. 11, hours after voicing depression over amid a global crypto market crash. Konstantin "Kostya Kudo" Galich, Co-founder of Cryptology Key academy, Galich mentored thousands as a prominent digital asset strategist in Ukraine and and around the world, blending trading expertise with online influence. Invest Wisely, Limit Risks : Amid the turmoil, Joshua Duckett urges traders to follow core rules--never risk more than you can afford to lose and thoroughly research assets--for navigating crypto's high-stakes swings. Citigroup is full steam ahead on Crypto despite Friday's cataclysmic crash Citigroup to launch a cryptocurrency custody service in 2026, seizing on a Trump-era regulatory thaw to hold digital assets like Bitcoin for clients, while probing stablecoin issuance to streamline global payments in underserved markets. | | ---|---|--- Custody Launch Targeted: Citi's crypto custody service, developed over the last two-to-three years, aims for a full 2026 rollout, offering secure storage for native cryptocurrencies to asset managers and institutional clients. Stablecoin Probes Underway: The bank is also in early-stage exploration of issuing stablecoins, eyeing their utility for 24/7 cross-border transactions in regions with underdeveloped banking infrastructure. Hybrid Tech Strategy Emerges: Citi weighs in-house built solutions for tailored custody needs against lightweight third-party partnerships, building on its existing Citi Token Services for blockchain-based money movement. Rivals Heat Up Competition: JPMorgan and Bank of America are also advancing stablecoin efforts amid clearer U.S. rules like the GENIUS Act, though JPMorgan so far has shunned direct crypto custody due to security concerns. Let’s continue building a Minnesota that honors everyone who makes up our great state.

Hi Peter,
Today is Indigenous Peoples’ Day — a chance for us to honor and celebrate the 11 sovereign Tribal Nations and robust urban Native communities that call the land of Minnesota home.
I was proud to officially make Indigenous Peoples’ Day a state holiday here in Minnesota in 2023. It’s a reminder of the many contributions Indigenous communities make to our shared history, culture, and economy.
**Indigenous People are our neighbors, friends, and loved ones.**
But we still have work to do to keep Minnesota moving forward. There’s more we can do to strengthen our connection with Tribal communities and make sure our economy works for everyone, no matter where you live.
Let’s continue building a Minnesota that honors everyone who makes up our great state.
Thank you,
Tim Walz

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117207078/575705934/654264341?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDIyYzBiZi01YWE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBjlldhRVaobf8-BOg-dJU_HAdeOPsVjU-LycHcAu20=) Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more. name: Haley S.
subject: we need to be honest
disclaimer_text: paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance
body:
this isn't an accident

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6745?t=2&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)
---
null,

I’m going to be totally honest with you about what’s happening right now. There’s been a lot of spin coming out of the White House, but you deserve the truth. Here it is: **Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Washington are the reason the federal government is shut down.**
It’s not an accident. This crisis is 100% manufactured – and regular people, including Michiganders, are paying the price.

If you’re sick of these political games and want leaders in Washington to fight for YOU, **_[chip in $5 to help fuel our grassroots campaign in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6746?t=3&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)_**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6747?t=4&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)
---
I’m asking for your support because this shutdown is the latest example of why the Senate _must_ provide a real check on Trump’s chaos.

Here’s how we got here: Months ago, Donald Trump handed the keys to the federal government to his billionaire donor Elon Musk and his DOGE clowns.
Since then, we’ve seen deep, harmful cuts to critical services – from rural health care to infrastructure to clean water protections.

Then came the GOP’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” – a massive tax giveaway to billionaires, paid for by kicking millions of Americans off their health insurance. They slashed Medicaid. And they did it in the name of “efficiency,” pretending it was good fiscal policy. It wasn’t. _**It was cruelty with a calculator.**_ And now they’re targeting subsidies that help working families afford basic care.
**Because Republicans refuse to reverse those health care cuts or renew the health insurance subsidies set to expire soon, the government is shut down and health care costs are still going up.**
This isn’t some abstract budget fight. This is real, and for me, it’s personal.

In my district alone, more than 31,000 people will have to pay more for their health care – in some cases hundreds of dollars more – if Republicans succeed in letting these subsidies expire. That’s 31,000 hardworking folks who will be facing impossible choices – all so billionaires can buy another mansion or jet or whatever.
**That’s why I’m not budging – I can’t support any deal that slashes health care and does nothing to cut costs for Michiganders.** My priorities have always been lower costs, affordable health care, a strong workforce, and a government that works for Michigan.

**Because if it doesn’t work for Michigan, it doesn’t work for me.**
I didn’t come to Congress to play political games. I didn’t come to stand by while the people I love get ripped off. I came to Congress to get things done – and to protect the working people who make our state, and our country, great.
So if you’re angry, you’re not alone. I am too.

If you’re frustrated, you have every right to be.

If you’re scared, I understand.
**Here’s my promise to you: I’m not backing down.** I’ll keep showing up. I’ll keep pushing for a deal that restores health care access, reverses the cuts, and puts people – not politics – first.

My Stevens doggedness is in overdrive. I promise to fight as hard as I can.
But I need you with me. [**Will you chip in $5 now to help me keep fighting for working families, win in Michigan, and flip the Senate for Democrats so we can provide a real check on Trump’s chaos agenda?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6746?t=5&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6746?t=6&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)

Thanks for having my back.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6750?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6745?t=11&akid=1079%2E49239%2EyAUfoN)

Thank you,

name: Mamdani Election Team via Our Revolution
subject: Mamdani vs Super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1011&refcode=email-20251013_v&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Anti-Mamdani super PACs have joined forces, working together with one goal
– stopping Zohran Mamdani from becoming Mayor of NYC. Oil industry heir
and director of Chevron John Hess has donated $1 million alone.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20251013&t=1061&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]Headline: Chevron director pumps $1 Million into pro-Cuomo Super PAC

Thanks to all that cash, they’re flooding NYC neighborhoods with ads and
Cuomo-branded paid canvassers, blitzing voters with glossy attack ads and
flyers.

We know these tactics work. Which is why in the primary, Our Revolution
knocked on doors, flipped undecided voters, and helped deliver a stunning
victory for progressive change. Now the billionaire-backed establishment
is trying to copy that playbook, hoping their money can buy what we’re
building.

If we’re going to win, we have to out-organize them in every ZIP code in
NYC. That means urgently raising $100,000 to fund three critical voter
contacts for every person on our list. Political scientists are clear: it
takes hearing something THREE TIMES before it truly clicks. With new
anti-Mamdani ads dropping every day, we cannot afford to fall behind.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251013nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]Will you donate $27 – or whatever you can – right now to help us ramp up
three phone banks each week and turn out more organizers on the streets to
drown out anti-Mamdani super PACs?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The anti-Mamdani super PACs are trying EVERYTHING – using scare tactics to
try to convince owners of co-ops and condos to vote against him because of
his commitment to green energy, even suggesting it will force them out of
their homes.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20251013&t=1060&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]Headline: Anti-Mamdani super PAC targets co-op, condo residents to
oppose 'green' candidate

But we’re not afraid of the opposition’s deep pockets because our engine
runs on real grassroots organizing. We’re having real conversations with
voters to move them from “undecided” to “YES” – but that means local teams
leading volunteer canvassers, not paid operatives sneaking attack ads onto
doorsteps.

But here’s the truth: these anti-Mamdani mega-PACs can outspend us at any
moment. If we don’t hit our $100,000 goal, we won’t be able to reach every
voter three times – with authentic Our Revolution voices – before Election
Day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251013nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9561%2E5885482%2EHfw8bV ]Now is the moment to show that grassroots organizing can overcome
billionaire spending. Please donate now – $27, $50, or whatever you can –
to fuel our teams and make sure that when voters open their doors or
answer their phones, it’s our organizers out there fighting for the
working class, not Cuomo’s paid shills fighting for the status quo.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

body:
Our federal government is trying to deploy National Guard troops in Portland under the pretense of “protecting” our city... |
#
---
Peter, Oregon – and the entire country – is facing challenges unlike anything we’ve seen before. Our federal government is trying to deploy National Guard troops in Portland under the pretense of “protecting” our biggest city. But what they actually want to do is bully people who are exercising their free speech rights in order to generate headlines for cable TV news and give fodder to right-wing social media influencers. President Trump is dividing our country, spouting dangerous rhetoric to try to turn people against each other. name: Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair
subject: Here’s the truth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This shutdown of the federal government is owned by Republicans.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117207476/575707521/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM1_251013_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDlhYmIzNS01ZWE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-AV55nqUT33QUHi3Boi9qED-O2oPeUfDAP9JUuqL50=) Team,

Republicans control Washington, D.C. at every level, yet they’re still trying to pin the shutdown on Democrats.

The truth is Republicans walked away while Democrats are willing to work for you.

This shutdown is reckless, threatening paychecks, raising healthcare costs, and sabotaging the economy.

[**_The best way to hold Republicans accountable for this dangerous shutdown is by defeating them at the ballot box next year. name: Turning Point USA
subject: Tomorrow: America honors Charlie Kirk at the White House
body:
Charlie spent his 31 years serving his country, family, and God. Now, our nation will honor him for that service as President Donald J. Trump awards him America’s highest civilian honor: the Presidential Medal of Freedom.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVW15b9cf-HjW31913m4h3TtgW6P_DFt5DCYcHN7Y8_2g3m2nnW69sMD-6lZ3pRW3VQ_q99bv66VW4PCFlG2R8kjVW5vTz1l4TgY0GV-xG662JXNCKW40kgNG2sCNpxW4tjYx-66C2rxW30N6tB72KcwgW90mkvZ18J3g1W2XGTr27xXjttW65HH8X2q24LNW6GQkqW3TzHgqW5JCtsQ39GgJSW5rn7Ml6tkGz8W6vC5RM8ZZjP9W51plWv6DzMvJN2pwF8KrnxljW3JR-zz51VxycVZtZg27-GHVKW8RVJbl1Vw0SzW5dfl_S65Gxcpf2Mz09b04)
---
Dear Peter, Tomorrow, America remembers the life, impact, and lasting legacy of Charlie Kirk. This “ _National Day of Remembrance for Charlie Kirk_ ” is set on what would have been Charlie’s 32nd birthday. But September 10 robbed him and his family of that—and America of one of the greatest defenders of freedom, truth, and conservatism this nation has ever known. His life of courage, drive, and unwavering commitment to American values has left a permanent mark on our history. Charlie championed liberty. His vision built a movement. His death inspired a revival. And his example will continue to inspire for generations to come. Charlie spent his 31 years serving his country, family, and God. Now, our nation will honor him for that service as President Donald J. Trump awards him America’s highest civilian honor: the Presidential Medal of Freedom. Tomorrow, Erika Kirk will attend the White House ceremony to receive this award on her husband’s behalf. The Ceremony will be livestreamed on the Turning Point USA [Youtube](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVW15b9cf-HjW31913m4h3TtgW6P_DFt5DCYcHN7Y8_2T3m2nnW7lCdLW6lZ3lvW5cdm-Z7sn_sSW3xjgfY15x9_MW3D5nJL2hs0BFW3mWH1R5bGpW3W8vY8281GFNB2W59RnGt5DJ6W4W3kTgVx8YlZn8W42RM6G5T28S5N3nRMHG25w-ZW4LTMZb31XdM9W1yTlPh13yjSqW8cXbQM3P6DFFW2s0x7X1hNZBMN4F-lQXcDSQyW5Y6sTc4k0r-FN8XRJq-wpHpbW2HpLSR2b4zw5W2xwH7f46MDSwW2CDWdw5fw2_fW7NZjjh5phN77W4XD1hN25C2sfW4k5PJZ3X_g7LW1pkJSB4PqmzfW4Z5Nxh6lT5D9f66SbL604) and [Rumble](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVW15b9cf-HjW31913m4h3TtgW6P_DFt5DCYcHN7Y8_2z3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3lwW2r3Xxy7gTlB7W82KR7m6X1mYqVT8P111hXpbbW5bllNP46smrSVv1xTg78l6FnW6w-wp23WyVrRW7sktmD8jrz_CVz4C_34K67h4W3RRY3X1qww0BW2-gBs61dL2WgW8cDQ5Z1llNlPW1kwqjp8tYkfjW3jm0lH6wHzk1W117NBr6VyrZQW9dvWH64G08HtW53gTLt4wpBB_W252Rjz21WfmRW1fwXtd7LNJdDVx_61v5RbWnMW2Pvh8j7ty5R7W17Dq7y5rxnCrW2LMJTL4kDMt6f5G5YlH04) channels at 4 p.m. ET. Please set aside a moment from your evening to join millions of other Americans in remembrance of Charlie as he is officially recognized as a hero for faith, family, and freedom. clean_body: Charlie spent his 31 years serving his country, family, and God. Now, our nation will honor him for that service as President Donald J. Trump awards him America’s highest civilian honor: the Presidential Medal of Freedom. | Dear Peter, Tomorrow, America remembers the life, impact, and lasting legacy of Charlie Kirk. This “ National Day of Remembrance for Charlie Kirk ” is set on what would have been Charlie’s 32nd birthday. But September 10 robbed him and his family of that—and America of one of the greatest defenders of freedom, truth, and conservatism this nation has ever known. His life of courage, drive, and unwavering commitment to American values has left a permanent mark on our history. Charlie championed liberty. His vision built a movement. His death inspired a revival. And his example will continue to inspire for generations to come. Charlie spent his 31 years serving his country, family, and God. Now, our nation will honor him for that service as President Donald J. Trump awards him America’s highest civilian honor: the Presidential Medal of Freedom. Tomorrow, Erika Kirk will attend the White House ceremony to receive this award on her husband’s behalf. The Ceremony will be livestreamed on the Turning Point USA and channels at 4 p.m. ET. Please set aside a moment from your evening to join millions of other Americans in remembrance of Charlie as he is officially recognized as a hero for faith, family, and freedom. We will never forget him. And Turning Point USA will make certain that his voice remains alive for every future generation. For Charlie, The Turning Point USA Family | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

name: Donald John Trump

body:

| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

**I was never supposed to be President.**
Friend,
I was never supposed to survive the bullet of an assassin, **BUT I DID.**
I was never supposed to be President of the United States again, **BUT I AM.**
I was never supposed to Make America Great Again, **BUT I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
The great behemoth known as the Democrat Party threw everything at me: Hoaxes, Witch Hunts, Impeachments, Election Interference, Raids, Arrests, and so much more!
But the steady compass of Faith has guided my hands through it all.
NOW, the government is completely shut down, and they think **MAGA IS DONE.**
_We can’t take our foot off the gas!_
I was saved for this one reason: to Make America Great Again.
I was made for this, **BUT MAGA IS POWERED BY YOU.**
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

May God Bless you,

Donald J. Trump

President of the United States

Peter,

Zimmerman, MN, was something else.

Liberals rolled in to protest our GOP event — yelling, waving signs, the usual George Soros-funded chaos. **That’s “tolerant,” right?**

But when two Black men — myself included — stood up to counter-protest? **Suddenly, we’re _angry, crazy, dangerous._**

They call this “White privilege”? Please.

**What they really can’t handle is a Black man in a MAGA hat with a bullhorn telling the truth.**

**It’s like they have an allergic reaction.**

They expect us to stay silent while they push their communist agenda. **[Not anymore.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=4eb4cd682a7346c8948b50cfc0190fbf&_e=VX52b-fz2sevSC9vhWCwus15EjPXA1AGIndwcNXPN6rs-fiWBe3cf_XwpPptDBrQV29gm9I8LPzN6REBszhoh7Fs36vHN9nyBaybAgXQ5Ql1SxkGvjXB_qbzMBB_Co_Gpmv5q0Xi_cvBg_Z5fEuZtw8ZtmUzv7l1TRlgxwZFRzPJccFi4whqpLPZQ3ztgj33QL65XEHW2ULhyWQA7hu4E18nw2vGe57S3eFgve64-WzJOipZ4yPN2vf35F8JHCb5WbVjQevyJwi0q5GLTfY-7iYo2t47cBfwtEml14WQZ_sUc1UVY5BT-ZwC8LEZqE0M5zAdNHdb5Q5rC3cpIcXHNOevVcDH8n7I2I-xDo-xQMpOACR_jgLwRdde7SKBnbKhMDJY2oEJOsmda-jZZ-i5ZiTwoBo6bXz-OjadXIO405P_rHmJss4_JFneuiSu6Q6ONR0VCfcbIjzCCPIHqg_VPBhjpHEIR6CD8lN57--G9MsgPbnmg3XLktumqX-wG515IHvHFjx_9COzLJ_HKY-3APJWnuT7KD70X0eYL5eMw8w%3D)** **I’m running for Senate to be a voice the establishment can’t control — and the Radical Left can’t ignore.**

But if we’re going to take this fight all the way to Washington, I need your support. **[Make a contribution today — let’s crank up the volume.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=4eb4cd682a7346c8948b50cfc0190fbf&_e=VX52b-fz2sevSC9vhWCwus15EjPXA1AGIndwcNXPN6rs-fiWBe3cf_XwpPptDBrQV29gm9I8LPzN6REBszhoh7Fs36vHN9nyBaybAgXQ5Ql1SxkGvjXB_qbzMBB_Co_G0QaGKU9DWdh68ufE4mSAQcAU__qFNBhXzbIyN5hevh3wBII43dANb5mpL5EX_4IkByD07RNixM6OBjZGRylmldX8KvrXcMAta6pfdST9ryDtLIsJseBg-jAxi1KnisCEla4VMOTE_SZutbarGVaOCDYwSs_7zKGbU-H4lQJb_rkP0tKiT-yFCvykoWvDI7NmyDWfznOqRzzRIUH5vnGHCD1BFApsoQ4LOA4gT2PK_1ptP0lkxZjxBvQkW1aNXy-46e-KzbHJ7i4FmbCeDT0ZS5NzWzsZnKlneCKJXIkwI3h7KQ_aehsGbVFmPdzZQZRqy1HUd6HepozLUd8l5ZY0VywzGWnUuicNEWilYbhnb4VAeoNZLb5jA7LHSXGCu0KAwW8Dd0YF35lPnUC1L7gaU0TSGq-Poq3hahuR_lFpbQIv1xy6B33Bxfte9F2Y6RKC)**

This is **Smash Mouth Populism** — not country club politics.

Let’s go.
**Royce White**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=4eb4cd682a7346c8948b50cfc0190fbf&_e=VX52b-fz2sevSC9vhWCwus15EjPXA1AGIndwcNXPN6rs-fiWBe3cf_XwpPptDBrQV29gm9I8LPzN6REBszhoh7Fs36vHN9nyBaybAgXQ5Ql1SxkGvjXB_qbzMBB_Co_G0QaGKU9DWdh68ufE4mSAQcAU__qFNBhXzbIyN5hevh3wBII43dANb5mpL5EX_4IkoPs04qsF1c4pfet4gbpU9rJtwEYDJU95b4aNZmRkgrI7r6lCENEVJj2lKmmXq1YBplJYGdVzRM8lpJUYxBs1Viop6O9IunGZXJOmwnqCru1QAszZthQJid6evftWhspf3a4liXgl-9Sp7AM0pYKwrKb37WYPR4FpZubXEpZRbLV_JtGLJZxQN6gEKHiJ9HQ6zGWjm7gchPa886tXemK7ekpNJu0mQKZROwLzlXE6sGk9yUzrz9yItQRXH2h7ioyR00cBR7K5twSX8jcVRXmcXRs0G3WdPMO_iIDCMCl3CTpPfgdDSu0ohCwTOruZpvz56zeuyv54JljlLYEoA6vtV2Tt4BM4k5CtkLlbvRxUDASwsS7GitHqeQvffJdejKvk)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=4eb4cd682a7346c8948b50cfc0190fbf&_e=VX52b-fz2sevSC9vhWCwus15EjPXA1AGIndwcNXPN6rs-fiWBe3cf_XwpPptDBrQV29gm9I8LPzN6REBszhoh7Fs36vHN9nyBaybAgXQ5Ql1SxkGvjXB_qbzMBB_Co_G0QaGKU9DWdh68ufE4mSAQcAU__qFNBhXzbIyN5hevh3wBII43dANb5mpL5EX_4IkSGbBAX6_bmdSJ2K1LUx_5dUgM62FCuVNk2eBp27sCO6ubo_63ehY2ac9fN8MVay-qG0KB-L7b5pU10evSaJxfZlVekEzuteFZ1G-aoi8m7XcFCz3imx57tAh6W6NWV7ZTHT2Kk_OFK2xJhGcvj1ewDIfr5sRA8uRcK5aLfm2iZwzXuIqQ4-reP98zRZzqknlrXNANU6-ECoEdYnaVqUsJybv57NIs0my9nxKknySXsUvQGOFfTOAMyp2X952znvP7srZs6OAsmDzLUoHmHyI1HBAmD9pbdFxmkKIciw0K6OjbvKW2iqAtgtlLe8OW-Bc3e-LApWKD3odB02kbhGNpYpfYDPeU5CyuTEPnRZNh20Rf4lKmZWmPpa9auCkeVbe)

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

You would never get this with Kamala Harris...I'm so grateful for President Trump's leadership.

But we must do more, Fellow American. I am leaving Congress to run for Texas's Attorney General, the top law enforcement official.

You would never get this with Kamala Harris...I'm so grateful for President Trump's leadership. Peter,

I’m sending this note to a special group of people.

**Millions of Californians will vote for me.**

Hundreds of thousands follow me on social media.

But the person who ultimately keeps everything going is **you** , the grassroots donor.

[**THANK YOU** for supporting my campaign.](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/1QR3IY7btbx67lCPi0dWYl9fbVu4hWYcM9j4UjCSa7K333_72yRCxYSH66GWuqZ3O-ws1nvjzWCjy1zo85_vhLSmhEkcYdDPaWw9oCLSHl9A-L44ILX8XJhA10R4bqouJFwDb9NqpEwkyU8coh_Yn0E2eyu16K7UOsM_47IhfAmrmBnwuswFT9wbJCCTod4MNs0X38SXnIJCGnKIU3JcU7FCO7Lzy0hwGHXeE3LhomLewhXIW2YxphIzZeQRzeb1avoD2jxXI66RiePj4qvn-8z9cMoZxeVz9liAWSDI1bbLbyBu3Rapdouy-DzaSwTw7lzeI6iqeJzVE0rF_Wj-k96YB1qsrODYS_HIfpl5dflxbEqC7YRlhBL1MGNngQwtA7mWgYrbH2yEK0ljNbnbtFf8aZH9YVYJS6vz8aE4AhMzvpj_4F9YDqxyf4sGj1DdwsxRyksGORrCEPPGkamVaAvtdmib-GGUTAaEUpe6wOx25X7KREiN1MRITx1LpUOe3eRAxs2tQeUgQ9XwTuy6r4OYfsa1dHKgbyk71wxPZdpNr0qVKPbAdWKRjKD_lN4osninq_ssLnWFXgmhkOqT_7c/bc8oQq69S7i85b3QNB2S3CerZVjX1aGE/13)

You stepped up **early** : before the establishment took us seriously, before the media was shocked that we raised over $1.6 million in just a few months, more than any Republican, more than nearly every Democrat. Before polls showed us leading every Republican and 8 of 9 Democrats.

I know that you carefully consider which campaigns to support. So your generosity humbles me and reaffirms my commitment to fight for a **safe, free, and prosperous** California.

[](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/8QWRvhh2mONyB2J0E7ynlYf9WO3rwV9m4sQaFu7-cZMLhJahg8F8LkzIsDJojo2Hvj-aB2KNoDfVTBF2dCLlbxcxshxxUWIfinH8l4lxsQblmBkK-hfcHcYB6NbuqxNCzWogTXTsd-vCMY00JAUstI6KL6D5HCTEJLg4lrBHUo4pTS3om8hzt36htUjmoIFNcruqLeNZZfHd7XITowQHSIIHaB06KaRl8sOUbntNJ83DJmZfB12_-as5f6HCVubCV3OsK6S6rJcHtJtoLvEB_xF57JXrEAOJg1znOxGYCtP_vXxc8uhdZNHSNgI0UgZ6I7oFMb9wl30kbMmien3v7vptwEzI8ZjrMsGciroQZ1NSpP-aYWr8ks0NHqDKWgaXErhTcgtUdQeeGqSP-3wh8azjiCuwRzRUM9a0WZSJqhxpV53v79XCkYa6G-ymzA2mEtMTWHj2TanHmj-K4aeYXvHsDz6pp0Qm9EMk1VgvyG3yqPFZlllpze1a74MfS2k5c7XjEP6AXXFFoIn8A0h6isv1qiA7qLfak3XkYCwVwthcCsnGgyT4znSUsIDwjWsh7mLJLV0tB6HCD07--bm9EJg/ob1PkVpksAF5vWXMZAN-cnnWGzFXHOtv/13)

[Become a monthly donor.](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/KLp1pKgblu2XjqOKLSuS2nT7wsNVcVs2BPyEdwYO8pb4fUOuVesjVA1-OKgAe9chgD_q8lx4-0hJWpIHZgb-rzVo99I7HDu2GxUMuv9KMiy65ViNwYWVJfAIQ3Ye3BDIlVXHHaFGAsOIsUCOdmii6MI_p63V1vm-pfgu6jLqNYDUGLx_SiuZWRy1WdD0RPE8oOxf8bDLLNmgU02co9CojYJ1cqC6oeQGehGfsim66jqNtC3_YS4pEWeFbHXYP6TgBTWaMRc9WlJu0dpzGZn400jmhebzoRFu4ePXgGzQeUeIUZJEmz-NBWQRTLDxlXZ6-u4MQZbDIw6emV2HVJ_QpsoeiyOj5CfrnghL767ryt5Ut9620puJYoKJYZQ_goVLYZD7wfSaZ69l3m5SVJ2MLLPaqyhK2XKWpmt-A6cppdYWPV5DeOk4G3veT4TphS4psPQln2OfYTXFR-rx661XqBqLrAKGPSqU0md4Dlsl-bY7B5iaGHBXXZRd5fxJHWriePG2Vpj8K61E2a_uygf4wgIQujXGNUgHCvIX-HbgssM7LevWmCatNqlfw0f-P1Zu94S5BgjPY2jyKQa-t3__Gqw/gbmumn8CVOM94pG7Yduc5JxzSBiw4HjW/13) In 7 months, we have the June primary. It won’t happen overnight. But they say the way to eat an elephant is one bite at a time (if the media sees this, they’ll say Republicans eat elephants).

We need a group of **committed** supporters who can go the distance with us. However much you can afford to donate monthly, I thank you from the bottom of my heart:

clean_body: I’m looking for folks who can go the distance with us. Peter, I’m sending this note to a special group of people. Millions of Californians will vote for me. Hundreds of thousands follow me on social media. But the person who ultimately keeps everything going is you , the grassroots donor. You stepped up early : before the establishment took us seriously, before the media was shocked that we raised over $1.6 million in just a few months, more than any Republican, more than nearly every Democrat. Before polls showed us leading every Republican and 8 of 9 Democrats. I know that you carefully consider which campaigns to support. So your generosity humbles me and reaffirms my commitment to fight for a safe, free, and prosperous California. Now I have an important ask, and I hope you’ll hear me out: could you take the next step to strengthen our campaign? In 7 months, we have the June primary. Do you think you can donate once a month for 7 months? It’s not a forever commitment. And you can change or cancel anytime. Why monthly? Because it helps us plan, budget, and stay steady. We have a lean team. Big business and public sector unions will never support us. We rely on YOU to fuel this entire operation: Yard signs, digital ads, voter contact, even gasoline — it all depends on folks like you who have skin in the game. We’ve raised over $1.6 million and are leading the pack. But this is a marathon, and we need to raise TEN MILLION DOLLARS. It won’t happen overnight. But they say the way to eat an elephant is one bite at a time (if the media sees this, they’ll say Republicans eat elephants). We need a group of committed supporters who can go the distance with us. However much you can afford to donate monthly, I thank you from the bottom of my heart: Thanks for being part of this from the beginning. — Chad Sheriff Chad Bianco Republican Candidate for California Governor | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC #1479095 3649 Mission Inn Ave., 2nd Floor Rotunda, Riverside, CA 92501 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t432mc&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t432mc&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t432mc&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t432mc&__onlt=h)

---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team
---

My opponent Winsome Earle-Sears repeated those words three times during our debate.
That was her response when I stated plainly that _she opposes marriage equality_ and that _she supports being able to fire someone for being gay._
**_"That's not discrimination."_**
It is blatant discrimination, and so let me be clear: I've always defended the rights of all Virginians, and I always will.
But this race is coming down to the wire, and we cannot afford to take anything for granted with so many of our fundamental freedoms at stake. So, if you're in a position to give, I hope I can earn a contribution from you today.

clean_body: Let me be clear: I've always defended your rights, and I always will. = "That's not discrimination." My opponent Winsome Earle-Sears repeated those words three times during our debate. That was her response when I stated plainly that she opposes marriage equality and that she supports being able to fire someone for being gay. "That's not discrimination." It is blatant discrimination, and so let me be clear: I've always defended the rights of all Virginians, and I always will. But this race is coming down to the wire, and we cannot afford to take anything for granted with so many of our fundamental freedoms at stake. So, if you're in a position to give, I hope I can earn a contribution from you today. = = = = = = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
You don't know me, but I'm emailing you today with a humbling final plea for your help.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**These emails aren't working anymore.**
I guess I had too high of hopes, and I was wrong.
I was praying there'd be a bunch of Patriots like you who would have stepped up to help - but it hasn't happened.
Peter, this is Troy Downing. You don't know me, but I'm emailing you today with a humbling final plea for your help.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & proud dad.
**[And I'm also the conservative Republican running for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
**My plan is really simple:****_-Tell the truth
_**** _
_****_-Put America first_**** _
_****_-Have a backbone_** But that's exactly why Radical Democrats will smear me & bring my run to an end.
So, I'm just going to come out & say it: [Will you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._EZh4liFkT75I7zyg)[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)It might not seem like a small contribution will matter but trust me - it's the only thing that will save my campaign. I'm not looking for anything big, just a few bucks if you can.

If I can win this, it'll be an absolutely humiliating defeat for the radical Left.
[What do you say, Peter - will you help a combat vet like me beat the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-qv41fc00A)Your support would mean the world to me.

Thank you & God bless,
Troy DowningConservative Veteran| |

name: JB Pritzker
subject: It’s been months of Trump 2.0
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We’ve seen more than enough to call this a failure.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96475?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA)
Peter, it’s Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.
I’m writing to you today because **[I hope you’ll split a donation between my friend Chris Pappas’s campaign for Senate and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96475?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA)**
Look... **It’s been months of Trump 2.0,** and we’ve seen more than enough to call this a failure.
Our small businesses don’t deserve to be bankrupted by unsustainable tariffs. Our citizens don’t deserve to lose health care because Republicans want to hand tax cuts to billionaires.
National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority. After all, the Granite State just elected a Republican governor — so it’s clear: _this isn't a safe blue seat, folks._
Electing Chris Pappas and keeping this seat blue is step one to taking back the Senate from Republicans. **[So if you can, please split $10 between Chris’s campaign and State Democrats Committee today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96475?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96476?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96476?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96476?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96476?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96476?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96476?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96475?refcode=em20251013-9569&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9569%2E614464%2EtxmvrA)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

We’re in the home stretch of the 2025 election in Virginia, and we’re not exaggerating to say that democracy hangs in the balance.
To understand why this election is so critical, look no further than Texas, Missouri, Indiana and Utah. In those states, the GOP controls a majority in the state legislatures. That means that instead of listening to the overwhelming majority of voters who want fair maps, these politicians can try and slice and dice districts to suit their extreme agendas.
**That’s why the NDRC has endorsed a slate of Democracy Defenders in Virginia to ensure that the Virginia House of Delegates has a pro-democracy majority come 2026. We’re fighting for a backstop in a key state that we simply can’t afford to see go backward.**
[**Will you chip in to ensure we cross the finish line of this election strong? Your donation will be put to work electing Democracy Defenders, organizing volunteers, educating voters, and fighting back against the gerrymandering attempts sweeping states across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117209969/575716883/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StateLegislatures_email_20251013-NDRC-Tier1-StateLegislatures_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251013-NDRC-Tier1-StateLegislatures_&utm_campaign=StateLegislatures&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxOTVkNGQzLTY2YTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=90Z1HuUhKSOwlWh-DXhQgieb7LVeedFqQK925yf4xNk=)

It’s a moment to send a resounding message that Americans reject their redistricting rampage — and that the will of the people can still prevail, despite their attempts to silence us.
[**With 22 days to go, help us finish strong in this homestretch so we can elect a pro-democracy majority in Virginia this November and beyond in 2026.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117209980/575716896/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_StateLegislatures_email_20251013-NDRC-Tier1-StateLegislatures_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251013-NDRC-Tier1-StateLegislatures_&utm_campaign=StateLegislatures&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxOTVkNGQzLTY2YTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=90Z1HuUhKSOwlWh-DXhQgieb7LVeedFqQK925yf4xNk=)

Brianna Shamsuddoha
