clean_body: This is a moment to send a resounding message to gerrymandering politicians that our voices still matter. | | 22 days until Election Day Fight for democracy in these critical final weeks of the election. | = We’re in the home stretch of the 2025 election in Virginia, and we’re not exaggerating to say that democracy hangs in the balance. To understand why this election is so critical, look no further than Texas, Missouri, Indiana and Utah. In those states, the GOP controls a majority in the state legislatures. That means that instead of listening to the overwhelming majority of voters who want fair maps, these politicians can try and slice and dice districts to suit their extreme agendas. That’s why the NDRC has endorsed a slate of Democracy Defenders in Virginia to ensure that the Virginia House of Delegates has a pro-democracy majority come 2026. We’re fighting for a backstop in a key state that we simply can’t afford to see go backward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This election is also the first major electoral test for Trump and his Republican allies. It’s a moment to send a resounding message that Americans reject their redistricting rampage — and that the will of the people can still prevail, despite their attempts to silence us. = Thank you for fighting alongside us, Brianna Shamsuddoha Director of Mobilization, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117210230/575717952/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGViNzM4Mi02N2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTZvhLZO3-pFWzStXmmXXVZO_Jf90HF-qhZVhKRggXs=)
Team — Attorney General Pam Bondi appeared at her first oversight hearing after nine months of her stewardship of the Justice Department. It was urgent — after all, hundreds of career prosecutors have quit because of the politicization of the Justice Department and the fear that they might have to take unethical actions at the direction of Trump and Bondi. We’ve seen the DOJ cover up the corruption of the administration and its friends — like the WH Border Czar taking $50,000 in cash from undercover FBI agents. Or the corruption case against the Mayor of NYC. Or the Epstein files. And we’ve seen the department prosecute the president’s enemies at the president’s urging — like James Comey — even though career prosecutors said the case lacked evidence. Team, it’s safe to say Pam Bondi was not too pleased with my line of questioning. Don’t just take it from me, look at some of the headlines from the hearing: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117210231/575717953/874902976?refcode=em-10.13.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGViNzM4Mi02N2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTZvhLZO3-pFWzStXmmXXVZO_Jf90HF-qhZVhKRggXs=) Team, the Department of Justice has become Trump’s personal sword to go after his ever-growing list of political enemies, including me. And his shield to cover up corruption and hide wrongdoing. And Pam Bondi has enabled this behavior. Instead of going after Tom Homan, Trump’s border czar, for taking the 50 thousand in cash, the DOJ shut down the investigation. When I asked Attorney General Bondi about this, she deflected responsibility. Said she didn’t know or wouldn’t comment about the case. She said that I should be **fired.** _Team, she even said I should apologize to Donald Trump for leading his first impeachment trial._ _Not gonna happen._ The Department of Justice should be pursuing accountability, cracking down on corruption, and defending the Constitution. But under this administration, the DOJ is a tool for attacking enemies and covering up wrongdoing. I will continue to use my position on the Judiciary Committee to conduct hard oversight and demand concrete answers. I will call out corruption and speak out against any and every attempt to weaponize our legal system against Trump’s political opponents. I will not give in, and not back down. [**Please, help me and DASS PAC stand up to this corruption — pitch in to our work demanding accountability.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117210232/575717954/874902976?refcode=em-10.13.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGViNzM4Mi02N2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTZvhLZO3-pFWzStXmmXXVZO_Jf90HF-qhZVhKRggXs=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117210233/575717955/874902976?refcode=em-10.13.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGViNzM4Mi02N2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CTZvhLZO3-pFWzStXmmXXVZO_Jf90HF-qhZVhKRggXs=)**

Good afternoon!

**_[If you can afford it, we’re humbly asking you to split a $10 contribution between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117210323/575718105/32293070?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.13_Jon-Ossoff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzFiZTdlZi02N2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQEz6m8kE-7Fd_jllAgwfs9zLYd0yup8orusmwaLmhM=)_**

Sorry to be so direct, but Jon is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won. **He is without a doubt MAGA’s number one target.**

The latest polls show this race statistically tied. And experts at the Cook Political Report have officially named this race a “Toss-Up.”

National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.

So we’re asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to respond to the onslaught of right-wing money flooding into Georgia and set the record straight.

**Because the truth is we either respond now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**

**_[Please, split a donation of $10 between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan today. | For 20 years, I was a firefighter with the Bethlehem Fire Department. I know some of the hardest-working folks in Pennsylvania live right here in this district — and I know that right now, they’re struggling. The cost of living is going up, folks are struggling to make ends meet, and no one in Washington seems to give a damn. Washington doesn’t do enough, and too often hurts us. In fact, Ryan Mackenzie just helped pass Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill.” He screwed over working families, slashed Medicaid, and cut SNAP — all to give his rich friends a big tax break. This is exactly what’s wrong with our politics: the people at the top get everything, and the rest of us get left behind. I’m running to change that. I want to represent the people who keep our towns running — the firefighters, the nurses, the teachers, the steelworkers, the small business owners, and every single working family in Pennsylvania. I want to fight the fires of corruption and fight the system that burns working folks. [If you believe that’s how Washington should work, then I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today. If I’m going to help change the system, I can’t do it alone:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7aa315d8-9e8c-4f37-8b7c-325bb0d7be75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. And here's the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse.She's more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous. They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota. They both see Republicans not as opposition of ideas, but as enemies to be silenced and crushed. And if they get their way, they'll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE. We must show the country that these midterm elections are a referendum on the rise in political violence on the Left, and that this rhetoric from them has CONSEQUENCES. Thanks for joining me in this fight. Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Dear Peter,
---
**JUST ANNOUNCED —** I am partnering with my good friend Rob McCoy (Charlie Kirk’s Pastor) on a month-long, cross-country tour titled _“The Courageous Christianity Tour | Remembering Charlie Kirk.”_ Charlie Kirk’s legacy is built on his worldview—one centered solely on the unwavering truth of the Gospel. We honor Charlie by doing what he loved most: seeing people come to know Jesus.
---

---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=dd3803ecaca746f0ac326afd32e0fa9e&_e=jUlyCOACk1GqY673aF6FzS3ShVLdkQFCCg4g8fBE8Saf4rAlPZuLh62wuK2VbD6-JGWEtKF4Klrq26Mop_gp4slU7dPymau5R_Uqy_2m1Ei8_dq7GEBEUXujSTF0dh7RaSd8tQ7LDWOCbj6Hzzp6CGc2TgxKuuUHE7ygCAGZq8PmFMrY_LtlXOMs5RsmyAMzqyaGDTGOw0175Ul548tnE2qVMUIJvw2uU2AE1-D-0RuKGAcoNZgAPl09zKrrLIQYnR93lxyz2GUK0dFruPQc3Pe_E8xEXOoadVGvWXwbAy8o1BPKYIrDuaEMa0RZ3dW2C1Rh_rHamk5rBcvPhbu8j5HvTFKZcsElSphD1lir57U0LFR2zcGikxgiXObA6oCVucGv1GHm48kfTxns1C59lBY3t9vjrjRLtxzySCeObmu-x_x_0pETimc6VIyNL6r_SJwmJAWj7H0K6l-D0N2e37kWQ-cdf436GVb8A6VM-_M%3D)

Rather than shrinking back, now is the time for the Church to rise up with boldness like never before! From the earliest days of the church, **the blood of the martyrs is the seed of the church.** **The harvest is plentiful, but the workers are few.** Join us in the work of the harvest! name: Brianna Titone
subject: Standing with Indigenous communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer
body:
Dear Peter, Today we honor Indigenous Peoples’ Day, a time to recognize the history, cultures, and resilience of Indigenous communities here in Colorado and across the nation. | | | [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/ySbVRpWveEBDOt_ZmIz-d_16dQCiz3yaMigfQBzgPcwmvUqfRWjkPgAuVEx2u5mEfL25iS7IGPSUEiAL1JybzAhui3uYwN4UgA2zbbwt4m1R26f0J9CzuevWbjqGATs0uIZ56O7YTHgPSdCMghxc18WepRy3XzrEuOFS1vxp9oSgObGromR3-Hi61jqoPbV8ZPWBZRHg5Xqgt2YwjFcaG-Bk4ikRIuAXRfxVCGVD3w4jvaFb_7fusAtyUlQc6t2KqOYp3n3BniWcSY2NhueCeqKF4c-f07lfhpYu_hmAOqagoDMj9R53HmX0AagZFZhVJrE23ks5T3AVTJEvk7WGGl_Gi1TEb5CbSbhuFSEOFxMhSxBdunmO3cJVKXhnEQYhrnl0ro8/pWHRL6Ee9_JhhprN1Y0j4ovRTOLngHtD/13) Dear Peter, Today we honor Indigenous Peoples’ Day, a time to recognize the history, cultures, and resilience of Indigenous communities here in Colorado and across the nation. This day is not only about reflection, but about action. It’s about acknowledging the harm done by centuries of injustice and committing ourselves to building a future rooted in respect, equity, and inclusion. **The indigenous community’s traditions, knowledge, and stewardship of the land continue to shape our state in profound ways.** We must honor that legacy by ensuring Indigenous voices are represented and respected at every level of government. My campaign for State Treasurer is about building a Colorado that works for everyone — one that protects our shared resources, invests in communities, and ensures opportunity and security for future generations. That work must include standing with Indigenous peoples and addressing inequities that persist to this day. On this Indigenous Peoples’ Day, I invite you to join me in both reflection and commitment — to learn, to honor, and to continue striving for justice. In solidarity, Brianna Follow Brianna Online: [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/oEKkxYp38V-ttrsS8eynl7lyJMnv8BV1HD5Ah1gP6HKN1DU_XZlibGYuXOw_cW6EwQmiUL94r1cLjoCu07QM0NN7sC8nIzDays08bX52CSLP7A-shw4AG0mNz892xYq75qy7i5Wb9TZIK6ildFRYwS4cwIE1qFsqZTC1YrkngL7OqbgoZeIIYFZl2lsFvfosPrQy5NPWO-w2Z0l0ShHw0fcE1Ik4RwtJ6k8LNimKcnYcUJKY-pxa8V-3SdFva2YtvHT6fnv84-sATf5Gp29Ag6J8U7uj9yCnGa_Qd0eVS-ogK9mYrcEso1E-KjXGyXmEazJ5jfOCWUEoyFB6gSKYbfwJSrvyXmZVfgLy7KflGqq55D8Y-a29KVgZe-syIeqME18WNkrfET4baR_9S_YDn6HIw-JPJDlU5ZZp8XvVxzxuecBuiA/g5UP7LdDzIyzRh7kPSz8-IgZSPjH63Sv/13) clean_body: Dear Peter, Today we honor Indigenous Peoples’ Day, a time to recognize the history, cultures, and resilience of Indigenous communities here in Colorado and across the nation. | | | Dear Peter, Today we honor Indigenous Peoples’ Day, a time to recognize the history, cultures, and resilience of Indigenous communities here in Colorado and across the nation. This day is not only about reflection, but about action. It’s about acknowledging the harm done by centuries of injustice and committing ourselves to building a future rooted in respect, equity, and inclusion. The indigenous community’s traditions, knowledge, and stewardship of the land continue to shape our state in profound ways. We must honor that legacy by ensuring Indigenous voices are represented and respected at every level of government. My campaign for State Treasurer is about building a Colorado that works for everyone — one that protects our shared resources, invests in communities, and ensures opportunity and security for future generations. That work must include standing with Indigenous peoples and addressing inequities that persist to this day. On this Indigenous Peoples’ Day, I invite you to join me in both reflection and commitment — to learn, to honor, and to continue striving for justice. In solidarity, Brianna Follow Brianna Online: **** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| | | |
---
| | Democrats Normalize Violence
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| | It's been a dark turn of events since the passing of Charlie Kirk, as we have witnessed Democrat leadership in Virginia accept and, in some instances, amplify the violent tendencies within their party. At multiple campaign stops, Gubernatorial Candidate Abigail Spanberger encouraged her supporters to "let your rage fuel you"... Within days of that making headlines, two sitting Republican Delegates, Del. Kim Taylor and Del. Geary Higgins, received credible death threats, with one even directed towards their children.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Not even a week later, it was revealed that their candidate for Attorney General, Jay Jones, texted a colleague about his hatred for former House Speaker Todd Gilbert. "Gilbert gets two bullets to the head" "I will go to their funerals to pisson their graves"
---
| |
---
| | He even went so far as to wish Todd's children, who he called "little facists", were killed so that Speaker Gilbert would be taught a political lesson.
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/3aPc-Ws_s/c?w=71xPffH6DhUmeJy3mrrW2_Rwr8-7xzSw3CqmhjEkP5o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92aXJnaW5pYW1lcmN1cnkuY29tLzIwMjUvMDEvMjkvY2FyLXRheC1jcmVkaXQtaGl0cy1kZWFkLWVuZC1iZWZvcmUtc2VuYXRlLXBhbmVsLyIsInIiOiJjYThmOWNkMS1lNTA4LTQyZmYtOWE2NC1lNWYxN2U2NzI1NDciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| |
---
| | Since its release, the response from the left has been telling. Democrats have united on continuing their support and endorsement of Jay Jones. They offered their pat remarks condemning political violence, but ultimately still believe Mr. Jones is suitable to be Virginia's number one law enforcement official. Their response leaves many conservatives to believe that Democrats no longer view political violence as disqualifying or unacceptable as a means to achieve their end state. How can Virginians trust an administration fueled by rage and accepting of violence? Of course, we cannot allow this, and we still have time to make sure it never happens. But, TURNING OUT THE VOTE IS CRITICAL THIS YEAR!! In this newsletter, I want to give you the facts to share via email, social media, and person to person in order to galvanize your arguments and do your part to get out the vote. The following information came directly from Jay Jones' voting record from his short time in the House of Delegates. His position serves as astounding evidence to illustrate how Jay Jones is in no way fit to be Virginia's top law enforcement official. Soft Jay Jones's Record as a Legislator Soft on Violent Criminals and Drug Traffickers ○ Jay Jones helped write legislation that could have allowed ALL of Virginia’s convicted felons (violent and nonviolent) to be released from prison early. HB1532 - 2020 ○ Jay Jones voted to allow some murderers and rapists to be eligible for parole consideration. HB33 - 2020 ○ Jay Jones voted against mandatory jail sentences for convicted repeat domestic abusers. HB2042 - 2019 ○ Jay Jones voted against mandatory jail sentences for convicted repeat drug dealers who sell drugs on school grounds. HB 2331 - 2021 ○ Jay Jones voted to allow individuals charged with murder, armed robbery, domestic assaults, and other felonies (including individuals who had previously been convicted multiple times of similar crimes) to be released from jail before standing trial without having to post money or bail. They were released only on their promise that they would show up for trial. SB 1266 -2021 ○ Jay Jones voted against making it a felony murder to sell Fentanyl, which causes someone's death. HB 2528 - 2019 Soft Record on Police● In 2020, Jones voted to empower localities to create civilian law enforcement review boards. Thenew law also permits civilian review boards the authority to issue subpoenas and make binding disciplinary decisions. ○ CBS – 6 WTVR, Oct. 29, 2020: “House Bill 5055 and Senate Bill 5035, sponsored by Leader Herring and Senator Hashmi, respectively, which empower localities to createcivilian law enforcement review boards. These new laws also permit civilian review boards the authority to issue subpoenas and make binding disciplinary decisions.” ○ Virginia General Assembly, 2020 Special Session 1: On Feb. 3, 2021, Jones voted for H.B.5055, a bill related to law-enforcement civilian oversight bodies. (Agreed to 53-35). In 2020, Jay Jones was Chief Co-patron on H.B. 5013Which “provides that sovereign immunity or any other immunities or limitations on liability or damages shall not apply to such actions and that qualified immunity is not a defense to liability for such deprivation of rights.” Soft on Sex Offenders●Jay Jones voted to allow some murderers and rapists to be eligible for parole consideration. HB33 - 2020 Jay Jones voted against making it a felony for physical therapists who sexually assault their patients. SB42 - 2020 Jay Jones voted against making it illegal for individuals, including registered sex offenders, to use a drone to intimidate, harass, spy, or follow someone. HB638 - 2018 As you can see, Jay Jones has worked to let criminals out of prison early, weaken law enforcement agencies,opposed tougher sentences for repeat drug dealers, and pushed for no cash bail, which allows violent criminals to roam our streets and harm innocent Virginians. Jay Jones is not a public defender.He's a public safety threat. PLEASE VOTE EARLY AND SEND A CLEAR MESSAGE!

name: Everything just changed
subject: Breaking: Monumental Intervention in 2025 PA Supreme Court race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The cavalry has arrived. Democrats are surging and a MAGA victory is no longer inevitable. Rush everything into the breach—GO GO GO.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSNI3uo89ikD4RcKC5UGHrg49ocu4bzl-30b3qHxuhNlLUtdAPPbiVy6NnW_mYIBETrUf1_307IDjqR3FRwHzU01xN36kQAzHb9ljAty8EhERs0v78IeqPwQ2-0czpru9mb8ibu_iyYhGse21bZo5QwCVkZixinG-vc_9cISvJET2B3fYPbniZOT4yJhryNWNEtPZCbYqWTloGK3NHblA3MtzJT73KnwaRX3Urm3nistt5op2TDwPQ==&c=s8DO02YhENi4ymdpflzwGFZZnZsfRjX0OVtb0UJnbSaxy7SKIGE4yg==&ch=oaKiW0voCH_JGRNFKNGalPYyMtsBCVjIO8wSumx1QV5inSTQ6ueOnQ==)
---
| Peter,
The 2025 high stakes Pennsylvania Supreme Court election is escalating out of control and the stakes couldn't be higher. If MAGA seizes this court they become the arbiter of all elections in PA-- they win, we lose this key swing state in 2026 and 2028
In September the GOP launched a devastating surprise attack that changed the calculus of this race. Over just a few days they dumped millions into PA rapidly seizing the lead and putting Democrats on their backfoot.
In response, Defend our Courts, the organization helping to lead the defense of the PA Supreme Court, sent out a desperate call to the Democratic movement warning that if these calls went unheeded we would lose this court.
Our calls just got answered:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSNI3uo89ikD4RcKC5UGHrg49ocu4bzl-30b3qHxuhNlLUtdAPPbiVy6NnW_mYIBETrUf1_307IDjqR3FRwHzU01xN36kQAzHb9ljAty8EhERs0v78IeqPwQ2-0czpru9mb8ibu_iyYhGse21bZo5QwCVkZixinG-vc_9cISvJET2B3fYPbniZOT4yJhryNWNEtPZCbYqWTloGK3NHblA3MtzJT73KnwXkjdsdcVsxm62f_JbvUQPA==&c=s8DO02YhENi4ymdpflzwGFZZnZsfRjX0OVtb0UJnbSaxy7SKIGE4yg==&ch=oaKiW0voCH_JGRNFKNGalPYyMtsBCVjIO8wSumx1QV5inSTQ6ueOnQ==)
---

The cavalry has arrived.
For months it seemed like those fighting on the ground in Pennsylvania were on our own but thanks to people like you who drew attention to this race from early on we have awoken the sleeping giant of the national Democratic movement.
An avalanche of Democratic support is now flooding into Pennsylvania. Pennsylvania's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro released a blockbuster ad yesterday, the DNC and DLCC are both pledging six figure spends, and the ACLU just injected 500k to support Democrats in the race.
We are still losing in the polls and an uphill fight for Democrats awaits but we have finally made a breakthrough and we need to throw everything into this race.
[Everything we have needs to be rushed into the breach. Small dollar donations will add up. If you've been waiting to donate now is the time. Can you rush a donation of whatever you've got so we can put it to work in the field immediately?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sSNI3uo89ikD4RcKC5UGHrg49ocu4bzl-30b3qHxuhNlLUtdAPPbiVy6NnW_mYIBETrUf1_307IDjqR3FRwHzU01xN36kQAzHb9ljAty8EhERs0v78IeqPwQ2-0czpru9mb8ibu_iyYhGse21bZo5QwCVkZixinG-vc_9cISvJET2B3fYPbniZOT4yJhryNWNEtPZCbYqWTloGK3NHblA3MtzJT73KnwXxVuup4iJMhOl9bEH9Eyvg==&c=s8DO02YhENi4ymdpflzwGFZZnZsfRjX0OVtb0UJnbSaxy7SKIGE4yg==&ch=oaKiW0voCH_JGRNFKNGalPYyMtsBCVjIO8wSumx1QV5inSTQ6ueOnQ==)

| Peter,
The 2025 high stakes Pennsylvania Supreme Court election is escalating out of control and the stakes couldn't be higher. If MAGA seizes this court they become the arbiter of all elections in PA-- they win, we lose this key swing state in 2026 and 2028
In September the GOP launched a devastating surprise attack that changed the calculus of this race. Over just a few days they dumped millions into PA rapidly seizing the lead and putting Democrats on their backfoot.
In response, Defend our Courts, the organization helping to lead the defense of the PA Supreme Court, sent out a desperate call to the Democratic movement warning that if these calls went unheeded we would lose this court.
Our calls just got answered:

An avalanche of Democratic support is now flooding into Pennsylvania. Pennsylvania's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro released a blockbuster ad yesterday, the DNC and DLCC are both pledging six figure spends, and the ACLU just injected 500k to support Democrats in the race.
We are still losing in the polls and an uphill fight for Democrats awaits but we have finally made a breakthrough and we need to throw everything into this race.

clean_body: The cavalry has arrived. Democrats are surging and a MAGA victory is no longer inevitable. Rush everything into the breach—GO GO GO. | | | | | == | Peter, The 2025 high stakes Pennsylvania Supreme Court election is escalating out of control and the stakes couldn't be higher. If MAGA seizes this court they become the arbiter of all elections in PA-- they win, we lose this key swing state in 2026 and 2028 In September the GOP launched a devastating surprise attack that changed the calculus of this race. Over just a few days they dumped millions into PA rapidly seizing the lead and putting Democrats on their backfoot. In response, Defend our Courts, the organization helping to lead the defense of the PA Supreme Court, sent out a desperate call to the Democratic movement warning that if these calls went unheeded we would lose this court. Our calls just got answered: | | == The cavalry has arrived. For months it seemed like those fighting on the ground in Pennsylvania were on our own but thanks to people like you who drew attention to this race from early on we have awoken the sleeping giant of the national Democratic movement. An avalanche of Democratic support is now flooding into Pennsylvania. Pennsylvania's Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro released a blockbuster ad yesterday, the DNC and DLCC are both pledging six figure spends, and the ACLU just injected 500k to support Democrats in the race. We are still losing in the polls and an uphill fight for Democrats awaits but we have finally made a breakthrough and we need to throw everything into this race. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The comeback is real and we are surging. GO GO GO. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

clean_body: | | | When anti-LGBTQ+ Republicans attack ... We fight back. Friend — The Florida Department of Transportation just bulldozed the rainbow crosswalk on Ocean Drive — a symbol of safety and pride for Miami’s LGBTQ+ community. called it “removing ideological symbols.” We call it what it is: erasure. This is part of a nationwide campaign by anti-LGBTQ Republicans to silence us — from banning books and drag shows to literally scraping Pride off the streets. Just last month they tried to do the same thing in front of the Pulse nightclub in Orlando. At Cedar Key Progress, we’re fighting back by electing pro-equality Democrats who will defend LGBTQ+ rights and representation — from Miami Beach to every corner of Florida. But we can’t do it without you. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Trump can’t have our voter registration data
body:
Private data belongs to Oregonians, not Donald Trump. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117211998/575723707/-569431239?refcode=251013em-collab-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdmMjgwMy03MWE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lBHjq61gkS6_0KBd1GKtVz6dVJxZ9Z9iWI-ZP8yAUE=)
---
| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
When President Trump’s Department of Justice demanded Oregon’s complete voter-registration data, including driver’s license numbers and parts of Social Security numbers. **I had one response:****No way! **
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117211999/575723708/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdmMjgwMy03MWE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lBHjq61gkS6_0KBd1GKtVz6dVJxZ9Z9iWI-ZP8yAUE=&emci=5dbe35c2-57a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2c7f2803-71a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
Oregon already provides the public voter information that’s required by law. **But private data belongs to Oregonians, not President Trump. Not to any President! ** My job is to protect both your right to vote and your right to privacy. So for me, this isn’t about politics — _it’s about principle. _ If we allow sensitive voter information to be handed over once, we open the door to misuse and distrust in our elections. **That’s not how Oregon does things.** **[Now I need to know where you stand: Do you support Oregon’s decision to protect voter privacy and reject federal overreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117212000/575723709/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdmMjgwMy03MWE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lBHjq61gkS6_0KBd1GKtVz6dVJxZ9Z9iWI-ZP8yAUE=&emci=5dbe35c2-57a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2c7f2803-71a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117212001/575723710/-1348697765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzdmMjgwMy03MWE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lBHjq61gkS6_0KBd1GKtVz6dVJxZ9Z9iWI-ZP8yAUE=&emci=5dbe35c2-57a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2c7f2803-71a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
We’ve built one of the most secure and transparent election systems in the country by earning voters’ trust. **Let’s keep it that way.** Thank you, Tobias Read Secretary of State, Oregon

name: DrKimSchrier.com
subject: Kim just teamed up with her Republican colleague to help protect working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This really shouldn't be a controversial take, Peter. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117212294/575724688/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzExYzIxYS03M2E4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkacWy-AV8XWWENfCBY_B5Kltb5FCspKNrPymgcRgcY=&emci=4a1dcbc1-02a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8311c21a-73a8-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

When families in Washington’s 8th District reach out to Kim, there’s one issue that comes up time and again: **Child care costs are out of control.**

For too many families across our district, it's becoming an impossible choice— _go to work, or stay home because you can't afford child care._ **That's not how it should be.**

Kim knows that affordable, high-quality child care is essential for working families and for our economy. Parents need the freedom to build their careers without sacrificing their children's care, and kids deserve safe, supportive places to learn and grow.

That’s why Kim teamed up with her Republican colleagues to introduce the Child Care for Working Families Act, _a bipartisan bill that would:_

✅ **Cap child-care costs** so working families never pay more than a reasonable share of their income

✅ **Invest in child-care providers and early-education workers** so they can earn fair wages and keep classrooms staffed

✅ **Expand access in rural and underserved areas,** where child-care deserts make it nearly impossible for parents to find quality options

✅ **Support economic growth** by helping parents stay in the workforce and reducing the burden on small businesses

Kim isn't afraid to reach across the aisle when it means getting real results for families here in Washington and across the country. This is exactly the kind of common-sense leadership we need more of in Congress, and now, she's counting on your support.

clean_body: This really shouldn't be a controversial take, Peter. Peter, When families in Washington’s 8th District reach out to Kim, there’s one issue that comes up time and again: Child care costs are out of control. For too many families across our district, it's becoming an impossible choice— go to work, or stay home because you can't afford child care. That's not how it should be. Kim knows that affordable, high-quality child care is essential for working families and for our economy. Parents need the freedom to build their careers without sacrificing their children's care, and kids deserve safe, supportive places to learn and grow. That’s why Kim teamed up with her Republican colleagues to introduce the Child Care for Working Families Act, a bipartisan bill that would: ✅ Cap child-care costs so working families never pay more than a reasonable share of their income ✅ Invest in child-care providers and early-education workers so they can earn fair wages and keep classrooms staffed ✅ Expand access in rural and underserved areas, where child-care deserts make it nearly impossible for parents to find quality options ✅ Support economic growth by helping parents stay in the workforce and reducing the burden on small businesses Kim isn't afraid to reach across the aisle when it means getting real results for families here in Washington and across the country. This is exactly the kind of common-sense leadership we need more of in Congress, and now, she's counting on your support. Thank you, DrKimSchrier.com Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

On purpose! We know they want to punish their political enemies, but this is unprecedented. We must take back the majority in the House. Because when Democrats lead, we put people first. We fight to protect healthcare and bring premiums down. Right now, our campaign is up against a flood of MAGA dark money, and this mid-month deadline is a major test of our grassroots strength. We need to raise another $2,000 by midnight tonight to show we have the momentum to keep fighting. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. In solidarity, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Folks,
Here’s a preview of what could happen in our race:

Right now in Pennsylvania, a state Supreme Court race is shattering spending records.
Millions of dollars are flooding in to try to reshape their courts and roll back people’s rights.
**This should serve as a warning for Wisconsin.**
Our far-right opponent is backed by the same dark-money groups that poured millions into our state during the last judicial election — the ones who tried to buy a seat on our court.
It’s all but certain they’ll spend _big_ to try and tear down Judge Chris Taylor. And when that happens, we need to be ready.
The only way we go toe-to-toe with them is through grassroots power — people like you chipping in what you can to emails like this one.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Republicans couldn’t beat me at the ballot box. So now they’re trying to change the rules.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I need you to read this, Peter.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251013-9553&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9553%2E614464%2EOum0hN)
**[Peter, this is Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district. Extreme Republicans in the state legislature are traveling to Washington this month to speak directly with Donald Trump. His orders? Gerrymandering me out of office. Please, can you chip in a split donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to make sure Trump doesn’t turn Kansas into a one-party state?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251013-9553&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9553%2E614464%2EOum0hN)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251013-9553&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9553%2E614464%2EOum0hN)**
There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition.
I’m proud to be part of the first category, Peter. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most.
But today, far too many politicians belong to the _other_ category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump.
And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to.
**But Peter, I’m not going down without a fight.**
**[I don’t care how many Republican politicians stand in my way. Whether it’s dozens of Republican politicians or the President himself, I won’t stop working to make sure Kansans’ voices are heard — but I need you by my side. clean_body: I need you to read this, Peter. There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition. I’m proud to be part of the first category, Peter. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most. But today, far too many politicians belong to the other category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump. And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to. But Peter, I’m not going down without a fight. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117212758/575726513/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwMjFlMmQtNzZhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WZsgmMRcUvCkyTqMWnm4nxR_JEkQBY0XEzA-id8UsAY=) The Trump administration is continuing to make life harder for Oregon families. _**OPB: “Trump administration cuts funding to Oregon disability programs”**_ In September, the administration canceled funding for the Central Oregon Disability Support Network, which has provided essential support to families in rural Oregon raising children with disabilities for decades. This loss of funding means less access to opportunities for kids, and less support for parents. **Oregon families deserve better.** [_**That’s why I’m demanding this funding be restored and fighting to ensure every child has the chance to succeed. If you’re with me, please chip in now to help me keep fighting for Oregon families in the House →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117212759/575726514/1565084121?refcode=email_101325_cuts&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwMjFlMmQtNzZhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WZsgmMRcUvCkyTqMWnm4nxR_JEkQBY0XEzA-id8UsAY=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117212760/575726515/1565084121?refcode=email_101325_cuts&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQwMjFlMmQtNzZhOC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WZsgmMRcUvCkyTqMWnm4nxR_JEkQBY0XEzA-id8UsAY=)

One of the reasons I first ran for Congress was because I want to build a better future for the next generation.
That’s why I’ve worked hard to protect our education system and introduced legislation to fully fund special education and ensure all children have access to high-quality public education.
Now, with the Trump administration cutting funding for a program over 4,000 families in Oregon rely on, I’m fighting back for our kids’ futures. I’m leading the charge to demand the Trump administration restore this critical funding and provide Oregon kids and their families with the support they need and rightfully deserve.
[_**I’m dedicated to building a better, brighter future for Oregonians — and I need your support. clean_body: = The Trump administration is continuing to make life harder for Oregon families. OPB: “Trump administration cuts funding to Oregon disability programs” In September, the administration canceled funding for the Central Oregon Disability Support Network, which has provided essential support to families in rural Oregon raising children with disabilities for decades. This loss of funding means less access to opportunities for kids, and less support for parents. Oregon families deserve better. = | | = One of the reasons I first ran for Congress was because I want to build a better future for the next generation. That’s why I’ve worked hard to protect our education system and introduced legislation to fully fund special education and ensure all children have access to high-quality public education. Now, with the Trump administration cutting funding for a program over 4,000 families in Oregon rely on, I’m fighting back for our kids’ futures. I’m leading the charge to demand the Trump administration restore this critical funding and provide Oregon kids and their families with the support they need and rightfully deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. subject: Just checking in 👋

body:
| | | Hey, Peter — just checking in. 👋 Since our supporter survey last month, we’ve seen WFP victories on the federal and local level — but we’ve also seen attacks on free speech, Trump sending the National Guard into our cities including Portland and Chicago, and the first government shutdown in almost 7 years. It’s been a difficult time for many of us, so we wanted to ask: How are _you_ feeling today? **We put together a quick survey for you to let us know what your headspace is like, how this healthcare fight impacts you, whether there are any issues you’d like to hear us talk about more often, and what you’d like our movement to prioritize heading into next year’s midterm elections.** **[Click here to take the October WFP Supporter Survey now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRLTAEZUKeleZcv7NmusqEaVpdQZb__UZfC2hvzu8B17nKkUYqLa-4LRo9cGHQyc7LnFlOwjM8z1jQXgPlXK18QcCl0mU6c5j0zmBeb-rL_C_vYIT_vsYE1A_LZtHChgLV3t6C-YWdTT5ghk5xJsN3Ax5RvvI-cveOWcCBz6QHK0N96KtaXA9ixnP112aJC4ZHLUNPPHguX7qmn_jA197shYezDYYu_JR7Babd4usqo337-BiweJ0JbE39U6gC21pawucnYYO_TolDYmqNsv34Ti/4kp/BScdCqseTum72E07YeoyxQ/h0/h001.cQ3Ek515pQT2CFWTG6CVEhGwDGjPRAVfIFOcE_P66Xg)** **[Take the October WFP Supporter Survey](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRLTAEZUKeleZcv7NmusqEaVpdQZb__UZfC2hvzu8B17nKkUYqLa-4LRo9cGHQyc7LnFlOwjM8z1jQXgPlXK18QcE5J3_HocMUKj_yUsAspvLqsH1qM2TctB5FgsHWM9LIoB2BTvSX28A8TqaFZZ9faSIsZXf9Vh9iujhOMJlFUT6M5kye65L2DmluAUNoz4OFZLzFsC8j90yXIFawR1A-VeWJCgkMBr515LAhVJFDNJD3HAW6VX1LqqSVyaTF_BRSeKBgqfc0D4Ko29QIUwkPHz/4kp/BScdCqseTum72E07YeoyxQ/h1/h001.C6WbwezUo3WI2i7k6a8MdxVQ8Xd_kJFjl3_qiu0a_wQ)** Every day, our team is hard at work fighting for a better future for us all. And of course that takes resources, and it takes showing up together in community. **But we don’t want you to forget one of the most important things that drives our movement: the input of supporters like you.** Your feedback guides our decisions. That’s why we read every single survey response, every month, and report back to our leadership on what you have to say. Can we count on you to make your voice heard this month? **[Take 5 minutes to take the October WFP Supporter Survey clean_body: | | | Hey, Peter — just checking in. 👋 Since our supporter survey last month, we’ve seen WFP victories on the federal and local level — but we’ve also seen attacks on free speech, Trump sending the National Guard into our cities including Portland and Chicago, and the first government shutdown in almost 7 years. It’s been a difficult time for many of us, so we wanted to ask: How are you feeling today? We put together a quick survey for you to let us know what your headspace is like, how this healthcare fight impacts you, whether there are any issues you’d like to hear us talk about more often, and what you’d like our movement to prioritize heading into next year’s midterm elections. Every day, our team is hard at work fighting for a better future for us all. And of course that takes resources, and it takes showing up together in community. But we don’t want you to forget one of the most important things that drives our movement: the input of supporters like you. Your feedback guides our decisions. That’s why we read every single survey response, every month, and report back to our leadership on what you have to say. Can we count on you to make your voice heard this month? In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Every restriction erodes our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Every chip here, every little slice there, every restriction passed on our fundamental right to vote erodes our democracy . At a time when every level of government seems pushed and strained to stretch the limits of legality, we can't afford bills like this passing in North Carolina or anywhere else.
We need your help to stop opponents of voting rights from testing more limits on our rights. RUSH $15 or more right now to defend our elections and stop them before they can bring this up for a vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101325_3&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101325_3&amount=25]
Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and most stark example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates.
This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting.
The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program.
Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. It's just another example of what they'll export around the country if they get away with it here.
This troubling bill has the potential to impact us all, no matter what state we live in. Please pitch in $15 or whatever you can today to help us stop voter suppression in North Carolina and across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101325_3&amount=15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101325_3&amount=35]
Wondering how this impacts you? It's as simple as this: Rep. Allison Dahle, a top defender of voting rights on North Carolina’s House Elections committee, said, “ I think North Carolina has become a testing ground. It’s become a place where they say, ‘let’s see if it works.’ ”
For decades, the voter suppression movement has taken bills that pass in one state and exported them across the country. The leaders at a sprawling, dark money conservative think-tank have taken credit for it, caught on camera bragging about writing the legislation at their headquarters. For example -- the sweeping suppression bill passed in Georgia in March of 2021 was adapted and passed in states like Texas, Florida, and beyond in the months afterward.
It's all just the latest extreme anti-democracy tactic pioneered by North Carolina vote suppressors over the last decade or so. In 2016, a court found that the state’s voter suppression law targeted Black voters with “surgical precision.” They drew multiple gerrymandered maps, and stripped the new governor of several election-related powers before he took office. After the 2024 election, they waged a months-long campaign, ultimately unsuccessful, to overturn a Supreme Court race by having over 65,000 valid votes thrown out after the vote-counting, and two recounts, had been completed. It's not going to end until we stop them.
We have to fight back every time they try to chip away at our fundamental right to vote. Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to stop this bill and suppression bills like it nationwide? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=101325_3&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101325_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101325_3&amount=20]

clean_body: Every chip here, every little slice there, every restriction passed on our fundamental right to vote erodes our democracy . At a time when every level of government seems pushed and strained to stretch the limits of legality, we can't afford bills like this passing in North Carolina or anywhere else. We need your help to stop opponents of voting rights from testing more limits on our rights. RUSH $15 or more right now to defend our elections and stop them before they can bring this up for a vote >> [] Voter Action Project [] NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [] Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and most stark example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates. This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting. The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program. Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. It's just another example of what they'll export around the country if they get away with it here. This troubling bill has the potential to impact us all, no matter what state we live in. Please pitch in $15 or whatever you can today to help us stop voter suppression in North Carolina and across the country >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Wondering how this impacts you? It's as simple as this: Rep. Allison Dahle, a top defender of voting rights on North Carolina’s House Elections committee, said, “ I think North Carolina has become a testing ground. It’s become a place where they say, ‘let’s see if it works.’ ” For decades, the voter suppression movement has taken bills that pass in one state and exported them across the country. The leaders at a sprawling, dark money conservative think-tank have taken credit for it, caught on camera bragging about writing the legislation at their headquarters. For example -- the sweeping suppression bill passed in Georgia in March of 2021 was adapted and passed in states like Texas, Florida, and beyond in the months afterward. It's all just the latest extreme anti-democracy tactic pioneered by North Carolina vote suppressors over the last decade or so. In 2016, a court found that the state’s voter suppression law targeted Black voters with “surgical precision.” They drew multiple gerrymandered maps, and stripped the new governor of several election-related powers before he took office. After the 2024 election, they waged a months-long campaign, ultimately unsuccessful, to overturn a Supreme Court race by having over 65,000 valid votes thrown out after the vote-counting, and two recounts, had been completed. It's not going to end until we stop them. We have to fight back every time they try to chip away at our fundamental right to vote. Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to stop this bill and suppression bills like it nationwide? >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. name: Scott Presler
subject: Sponsors needed for Ballot Chasers in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
We have under 3 weeks left to chase ballots

| | | | |
---
Friend, right now Early Vote Action ballot chasers are blanketing the state getting Republican voters to request mail-in ballots and chasing down outstanding mail-in ballots.
Polling in the New Jersey’s governor’s race has started to show what I’ve been seeing for a long time.**The race is officially tied.**

The polling for Republican nominee Jack Ciattarelli continued to improve this week and we are truly in the midst of a tectonic shift in New Jersey... All that’s left now is to do the hard work between now and Election Day to turn out every Republican voter in the state.

That’s where my team and I come in. My grassroots team is on the ground right now registering voters, chasing mail-in ballots, and preparing to launch our massive get out the early vote program.
****
**And if you take a look at these numbers,****__you know we’re making an impact_._**
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkTL/?__vbtrk=MzI2NzkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2NzkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, that’s where you come in.
**We need your help to make the difference.** By sponsoring an Early Vote Action ballot chaser, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025.
**_[Every new voter we register, every mail-in ballot we chase down, and every Republican we get to the polls brings us one vote closer to victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkTL/?__vbtrk=MzI2NzkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2NzkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Patriot, I’m counting on you to deliver the resources we need to win again, you know I’ll be on the ground doing the hard work with the grassroots either way, but with your support our impact will be felt by far more voters.
**_[So, please, if you haven’t already, consider sponsoring a ballot chaser on my grassroots action team and help us bring home victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bkTL/?__vbtrk=MzI2NzkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI2NzkzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_In Liberty,_
**Scott Presler**

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: People deserve a fighter in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
National Republicans continue to show that they are willing to keep the government shut down — threatening people’s jobs and livelihoods — so they can gut our healthcare and give billionaires another tax break.
Premiums are going to skyrocket, and these politicians simply don’t care. They control the House, the Senate, and the White House — and they refuse to negotiate.
It’s because Republican politicians are so used to Democrats in Washington rolling over for nothing. They’re betting it will happen again in this fight.
This is why taking back the Senate majority isn’t enough. We need to take back the majority by electing leaders like James who will fight relentlessly for working people. Leaders who won’t bend, and who won’t fold.

subject: Making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to make sure you saw this message — it’s really important.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213852/575730066/-240735101?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=) We need to make sure you saw this message — it’s really important. As Sharice spells out below, this gerrymandering battle isn’t about Democrats versus Republicans. It isn’t even about Sharice versus Donald Trump either. **This battle is about uniting _every_ Kansan — Republican and Democrat, urban and rural alike — who believes the federal government doesn’t need even more power over our lives.** [_**Take a moment to read Sharice’s full note below, then pitch in a few dollars to make sure Kansas Democrats aren’t silenced in the next election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213853/575730067/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101325_important&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213854/575730068/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101325_important&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=)
---
-Sharice for Congress HQ
–––––– Begin Forwarded Message ––––––
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213855/575730069/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101325_important&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=)
[_**Hey there, this is Sharice. I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but this is a pivotal moment in the battle to keep KS-03 out of Donald Trump’s hands, and our entire campaign is treating it like one. If you’re with me, and you’re able to give, I’d be so grateful to have your support today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213856/575730070/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101325_important&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=)
Let’s be real: The last few weeks have been wild and overwhelming for everyone here at Campaign HQ. And yet, the fight is only getting started.
In just a few days, Republicans in the Kansas legislature will travel to the White House to take marching orders directly from Donald Trump — and right after that, things will happen fast:
Kansas GOP leadership will call for a special legislative session. Republican politicians will work as quickly, and quietly, as possible to gerrymander this seat. The public outcry will intensify.
**That third part is the key to winning this fight.**
Sustained public outcry is the most effective tool we have right now. After all, we all know these extreme politicians aren’t going to do the right thing just because it’s the right thing.
But if we put enough pressure on these extreme politicians — enough for them to _truly_ feel the outrage, the anger, and the momentum on our side — they’ll understand just how many political consequences will come with Donald Trump’s gerrymander.
**And that’s exactly why _your_ support, _your_ voice, and _your_ protests make a difference.**
To be completely candid, I can’t persuade these extreme politicians to back off Trump’s gerrymander on my own. But when thousands of Kansans — Democrat, Republican, and unaffiliated alike — are willing to stand up and speak out, things change. That’s why I need your help:
[**_We have the people on our side, and we all feel that. But _keeping_ that momentum in the weeks to come will require an enormous amount of resolve, perseverance, and yes, grassroots support. If you could pitch in today and help our team keep pushing back, it would go a long, long way right now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213857/575730071/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_101325_important&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117213858/575730072/-1213029538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=email_101325_important&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWIwMWJmYS03OGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vWq0ikJZ5EJVAgszREOoSQU5b-TjazlPpLP4sdfeSU=)

clean_body: We need to make sure you saw this message — it’s really important. = We need to make sure you saw this message — it’s really important. As Sharice spells out below, this gerrymandering battle isn’t about Democrats versus Republicans. It isn’t even about Sharice versus Donald Trump either. This battle is about uniting every Kansan — Republican and Democrat, urban and rural alike — who believes the federal government doesn’t need even more power over our lives. = | | = -Sharice for Congress HQ –––––– Begin Forwarded Message –––––– = = Let’s be real: The last few weeks have been wild and overwhelming for everyone here at Campaign HQ. And yet, the fight is only getting started. In just a few days, Republicans in the Kansas legislature will travel to the White House to take marching orders directly from Donald Trump — and right after that, things will happen fast: Kansas GOP leadership will call for a special legislative session. Republican politicians will work as quickly, and quietly, as possible to gerrymander this seat. The public outcry will intensify. That third part is the key to winning this fight. Sustained public outcry is the most effective tool we have right now. After all, we all know these extreme politicians aren’t going to do the right thing just because it’s the right thing. But if we put enough pressure on these extreme politicians — enough for them to truly feel the outrage, the anger, and the momentum on our side — they’ll understand just how many political consequences will come with Donald Trump’s gerrymander. And that’s exactly why your support, your voice, and your protests make a difference. To be completely candid, I can’t persuade these extreme politicians to back off Trump’s gerrymander on my own. But when thousands of Kansans — Democrat, Republican, and unaffiliated alike — are willing to stand up and speak out, things change. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Christopher Columbus Wakes Up in 2025, Gets Canceled Before He Even Finds Parking
body:
A cautionary tale of WOKISM and Presentism

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=4fafbbb1a1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **“By discovering America, Columbus set in motion the development of our civilization... and he proved that the human spirit can stretch beyond any horizon.”** \- Ronald Reagan
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
**SATIRE OP-ED | Christopher Columbus Wakes Up in 2025, Gets Canceled Before He Even Finds Parking**
_By Dominic Rapini - American Businessman, Political Commentator, and proud American of Italian Descent_
In what can only be described as the most historically inconvenient miracle since Moses parted the Red Sea during rush hour, **Christopher Columbus has mysteriously reappeared in 2025** —bearded, confused, and wearing tights made of wool.
His first act? Attempting to “discover” America for the second time.
Unfortunately, he landed in Toronto.
“Behold, a vast and bountiful new land!” Columbus shouted, stepping out of a rented Toyota Corolla and planting a flag made from a Chick-fil-A napkin. “I shall call it... Columbusia!” He was immediately ticketed by a Canadian meter maid for parking in a bike lane and misgendering a fire hydrant.
**✦ The New World Meets the Old Man**
Columbus, still working under the assumption that the world is best navigated by celestial objects and faith in God, quickly found himself disoriented by smartphones, self-checkout lanes, and gluten-free communion wafers. Upon being handed an iPad, he asked, “Does this flatter the Earth or confirm it is round?”
His arrival was swiftly picked up by the U.S. media—**CNN described him as a “known colonizer,” MSNBC labeled him a “historical oppressor** with a nautical fetish,” and NPR praised his “emotional vulnerability” but warned listeners not to confuse him with the progressive kind of explorer, like Greta Thunberg.
Meanwhile, liberal activists on X (formerly known as “Ye Olde Twitter”) launched the trending hashtag: **#CancelColumbus.**
Within 12 hours, he was banned from Uber, DoorDash, Venmo, and two Renaissance Fairs.
**✦ Columbus Meets President Trump and VP Harris**
A confused but delighted Columbus was then invited to Mar-a-Lago, where President Trump shook his hand and declared him**“a total legend,** really a pioneer, big boats, huge vision—honestly, he’s the original MAGA.”
Columbus nodded politely, asked where the Queen was, and inquired if the “beautiful walls” Trump spoke of were designed to keep out the Turks or the Carthaginians.
Meanwhile,**Vice President Kamala Harris released a statement c** elebrating Columbus Day by saying:
_**“Exploration is when you explore. And when you explore, you find things, and what you find is what you discovered, and what you discover is something you didn’t know until you explored it.”**_
Columbus was reportedly “deeply moved” by **her “commitment to the metaphysical art of saying absolutely nothing while saying a great many things.”**
**✦ Indigenous Tribes Offer Crypto for Peace Treaty**
Upon finally meeting with leaders of a Native American tribal council in Arizona, Columbus removed his plumed hat, bowed solemnly, and offered shiny beads and Spanish doubloons.
The tribal chief responded, **“Cool, but do you accept Ethereum?”**
A ceremonial peace treaty was signed—digitally—on a Ledger Nano wallet, with full blockchain verification. “It’s like wampum,” Columbus muttered, “but with math.”
**✦ Historical Presentism: The Real Villain**
Immediately following his return, Columbus was booked for a segment on The View. He made it halfway through the green room before being assaulted by a drum circle, three sociology majors from Oberlin, and a former statue activist who tried to tape a BLM sticker to his forehead.
“Don’t you know what you did in 1492?!” screamed one protester.
“I wasn’t even born in this century,” Columbus protested. “I still don’t know what a TikTok is!”
Alas, the mob wasn’t interested in nuance. He was banned from Airbnb for being a “problematic historical presence,” and Snopes rated his life as “Mostly False.”
**✦ Executive Order #1492-B: Trump Saves History (Again)**
In a surprise press conference from his gold-plated golf cart, President Trump signed Executive Order #1492-B:**The Great Columbus Restoration Act,** declaring that all Columbus statues must be returned, Columbus Day must be federally celebrated, and all references to “Indigenous People’s Day” be replaced with “Intrepid Italian Explorer Appreciation Time.”
**“America needs explorers,” Trump said. “Not influencers.”**
Fox News called it “the greatest act of historical preservation since Indiana Jones punched a Nazi.” MSNBC called it “dangerous.” NPR offered a soft banjo arrangement in protest.
**✦ The Legacy Lives On**
So, what does it all mean? Columbus, once revered as a symbol of Western expansion and the man who—through grit, navigational genius, and blind optimism—connected two worlds, has become the scapegoat of an insecure age **allergic to excellence.**
Was he perfect? No. He sailed without GPS, judged the circumference of the Earth incorrectly, and probably thought TikTok was a maritime disease. But he was a man of vision. A man of courage. And unlike today’s critics—he actually did something.
**As Michael Knowles quipped, judging Columbus based on the smear campaign of a political rival is like saying, “We know everything about Trump now, thanks to Hillary’s tweets.” Historians agree:** Columbus was held to the highest standard of his time. **Presentism** —the woke art of applying 21st-century moral codes to 15th-century realities—is intellectual malpractice.

**Bring back the statues. Bring back the truth. And remember: without Columbus, none of us would be here to argue about Columbus.**
**#PoliticalCartoon #Satire #ColumbusDay #Trump #OPED #HistoryTwist**

# Some on the left are actually giving Trump credit for peace deal
Media figures across the political spectrum, including MSNBC's Jon Meacham and CNN's Abby Phillip, **[praised President Donald Trump for securing the Israel-Hamas peace deal,](https://substack.com/redirect/5285b0c1-bf86-4a0d-bbf8-ed18621c6a35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with former CNN journalist Chris Cillizza calling those who won't give Trump credit "blind."

* **Biden administration officials acknowledge Trump 's role:** Former National Security Adviser Jake Sullivan credited Trump and his team for their "determination and really hard work," stating that achieving the peace deal "takes a village" and praising the difficult work involved.
* **Criticism of Obama 's omission:** CNN's Abby Phillip called out former President Barack Obama for writing about the peace deal without specifically mentioning or crediting Trump, arguing it should be "no problem" to acknowledge Trump's responsibility for ending the bloodshed.
* **Democratic leaders commend the president:** Key Democrats including Hillary Clinton and Kamala Harris praised Trump and his administration for the deal, with Clinton specifically commending Trump and Arab leaders for their commitment to the 20-point peace plan.
