# Families reunite with freed Hamas hostages
All 20 living hostages held by Hamas since October 7, 2023, **[were released on Monday and reunited with their families](https://substack.com/redirect/d30f289c-09d4-4a41-8c10-5360d0445837?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/545132f3-a1ec-47b4-af35-5a604405ff43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Nationwide celebrations in Israel:** Crowds gathered in Hostages Square in Tel Aviv, waving Israeli and U.S. flags and cheering as they watched footage of the hostages returning home on big screens, with people across Israel celebrating as military helicopters flew the freed hostages to hospitals for treatment.
* **[Families begin healing process:](https://substack.com/redirect/9de5d768-8864-407d-a566-d5ffbd2eeab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Released hostages, including Evyatar David who was seen emaciated in a Hamas video, and their families expressed relief and gratitude while acknowledging the long road to physical and psychological recovery ahead after two years of captivity.
* **Waiting for deceased hostages ' remains:** While all living hostages have been returned, families of the 28 deceased hostages are still waiting, with Hamas releasing only four bodies on Monday, as the peace deal also included Israel freeing approximately 2,000 Palestinian prisoners and detainees.

Peter,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Peter, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:

**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Peter...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.

He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Peter, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Peter, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?

clean_body: | | | Peter,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Peter, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Peter...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... It 's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.Again, Peter, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, " What can I do?"As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Peter, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won 't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here 's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Peter, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also...Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...Please send them this link: Peter, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...Thank you. We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Peter, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, we 're grateful.But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Peter.God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

body:
Peter, we’re SPOOKED!

DESPITE:
→ The GOP trying to force healthcare cuts via a shutdown!
→ The California special election in just a few weeks!
→ Social Security, mail-in voting, and our democracy are at risk!

name: NO KINGS! NO MORE TRUMP! (via VPP)
subject: [3rd Attempt] October 18th: You’re invited >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need to know if you’ll join us in this fight.
| | Friend, last week we came to you with an URGENT call to action to PLEDGE TO ATTEND YOUR local NO KINGS PROTEST ON OCTOBER 18TH!

This is CRITICAL to our fight — **Donald Trump is taking us closer and closer to authoritarian rule every day.**

_But we STILL haven’t received your pledge to attend your local protest:_

[**We can’t afford for Democrats to sit this one out, so we’re bumping this email and hoping you’ll reply by tonight’s midnight deadline! We need 1,000 supporters to sign on IMMEDIATELY:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T) | [SECOND ATTEMPT: I WILL ATTEND MY LOCAL “NO KINGS” PROTEST ON OCTOBER 18TH AGAINST KING TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
---
**\- - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - -**
**_THIS IS HUGE, FOLKS >>>>_**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
We need to make sure that Democrats in your city are showing up to say “NO KINGS IN AMERICA!” — [**_so we need to know if YOU will be protesting on October 18th »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
[I WILL ATTEND MY LOCAL “NO KINGS” PROTEST ON OCTOBER 18TH AGAINST KING TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
---
Folks, Trump is TERRIFIED of our grassroots power. **He knows that if we ALL show up, his MAGA agenda is COOKED!**

That’s why we need EVERY Democrat in your city to step up — _including you!_

[**Please, friend: Will you pledge to show up to your local No Kings Protest on October 18th? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
[I WILL ATTEND MY LOCAL “NO KINGS” PROTEST ON OCTOBER 18TH AGAINST KING TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251013_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
---
Counting on you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21468%2E878179%2E5YrK6T)
---

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Congresswoman Lauren Boebert Endorses David Flippo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Conservatives from all across the country are joining together to defeat Steven Horsford! Will you join us? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f3c43a6d2573/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340849?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=32c7e90a19&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | I proudly announce that **United States Congresswoman Lauren Boebert** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04.** Congresswoman Boebert has been a passionate advocate for Colorado’s 4th Congressional District and a staunch supporter of President Trump since her election in 2021. As a fierce fighter for President Trump’s “America First” agenda, she has fought to secure our border, protect our Second Amendment, defend energy, and fight the radical left in Washington every day! I am proud to have a fierce fighter for freedom like Congresswoman Boebert joining our team!
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=21449501ce&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| [DONATE TO HELP ME AND CONGRESSWOMAN BOEBERT FLIP IT RED!](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7016f9a8cb&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TO HELP ME AND CONGRESSWOMAN BOEBERT FLIP IT RED!")
---
| Our campaign is resonating with Republicans all across the country, because they understand what a disaster Steven Horsford is for Nevada! I am a proud “America First” Patriot, and **Representatives like Congresswoman Boebert know that I will have President Trump’s back in Congress!** In Washington, I will work closely with her to **ensure we deliver on President Trump’s agenda and BIG wins for the American people!**

** I am matching every single dollar that is being donated, so your donation will have 2X the impact! Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=03065980ea&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE")
---
| For God and Country,
Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.)
_Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c17ed183fe&e=273c9a71fb)**_

| | Did you hear that? Donald Trump actually said, "A lot of good can come from shutdowns." He must have forgotten that the last time Republicans forced a shutdown, it cost our economy $11 billion — and countless families lost paychecks, services, and stability. Republicans shut down the government to attack your health care. They refuse to come to the table with Democrats to fix the Trump health care crisis — _the one they caused with their Big Ugly Betrayal budget that kicked 15 million Americans off their health care and skyrocketed premiums for 20 million more. The same bill that gave tax breaks to corporations and billionaires._ And now, Trump and his MAGA allies seem committed to extending the shutdown, all while Americans' health care premiums more than double. When Trump says "good can come" from a shutdown, he's not talking about what's good for you, or for your family, or for our country. He's talking about what's good for himself and his billionaire buddies. **This is what the Republican agenda looks like: families lose, billionaires win.** Democrats are standing up to this chaos. We're fighting to protect health care, lower costs, and keep government working for you. But we need grassroots power to fight back and hold the line. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) [ **Listen, you need to see this →→→ ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=3&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) | [ [**REMARKABLE: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is FIGHTING BACK against Trump’s far-right Supreme Court after they ruled to limit the power of federal judges in favor of Donald Trump.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=5&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)

[**Look, we NEED to let Justice Jackson know that we AGREE and couldn’t be more proud of her! Sign our petition now to stand with Justice Jackson >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=6&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69362?t=4&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=7&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)
---
[]()
[ **Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is calling OUT Trump’s Supreme Court: **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=8&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=9&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)
* * *
Donald Trump is acting like a [**DICTATOR**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=10&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) and Brett Kavanaugh, Amy Coney Barrett, and Neil Gorsuch are empowering him every step of the way.

Over and over again he pushes the boundaries of the law and then [**DEFIES**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=11&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq) the rulings of judges simply because he doesn't agree with them. [**It’s totally illegal, and Donald Trump shouldn’t be above the law.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=12&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)

[**The stakes are high, team. If we don’t fight back against these authoritarian tactics RIGHT NOW, our democracy will be at serious risk of collapse. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=13&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)
[ **If you agree with Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, add your name to our petition now to stand with her and fight back against Donald Trump and his authoritarian power grabs → ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=14&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69485?t=15&akid=23502%2E4449941%2E97KRFq)
---
If we fail to act now, we could lose everything.

In this together,

Fight for Reform

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I never planned this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I need you with me.
I never planned on running for office again.
But I see what’s happening in Washington -- and I can’t stay on the sidelines.
**I’m jumping in this fight: I’m running for Senate in 2026.**
_Why?_ Because Ohioans are working harder than ever, and they’re still falling behind.
_Why?_ Because wages are flat.
_Why?_ Because costs are rising.
_Why?_ Because the people in power are only looking out for their rich friends and corporate interests.
No one is fighting for Ohio workers and families in the Senate. But with your support, we can change that.
We can build a country where workers share in the wealth they create, where hard work pays off, and where everyone who works hard can afford a decent life.
This won’t be easy -- and with Ohio being one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, we know there are many fights ahead. But if we stand together, we will win.
[**I need you with me: Will you chip in $5 split with Chris Pappas right now to help me flip Ohio’s Senate seat and stand up for workers across the country?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251013_2_brown.Rwrfxk&refcode=em20251013-2&t=1&akid=2869%2E582294%2E29OG8E)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251013_2_brown.Rwrfxk&amount=5&refcode=em20251013-2&t=20&akid=2869%2E582294%2E29OG8E)**
In solidarity,
Sherrod
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251013-2&t=21&refcode2=2869_582294_29OG8E&akid=2869%2E582294%2E29OG8E)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=22&akid=2869%2E582294%2E29OG8E)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=23&akid=2869%2E582294%2E29OG8E)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2869%2E582294%2E29OG8E)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: Trump's latest Social Security scheme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10362%2E434096%2EGajeHN)
| | |
---
Derek, I had to reach out to make sure you heard about the latest Social Security news.
Trump has already closed offices, cut staff, and made it harder for seniors to get help over the phone.

**Now,** The Washington Post**just reported that Trump and his team are pushing a plan to make it harder for older Americans to qualify for disability benefits, which could result in hundreds of thousands of people losing benefits.
**
Trump’s goal is simple: break Social Security, run it dry, and sell it for scrap.

Not on my watch. Just a few days before this news broke, I reintroduced the **Billionaires Income Tax Act** to make the ultrawealthy pay their fair share in taxes.

That’s money we can use to keep our promise to seniors and protect Social Security for the next generation.

Because here's the deal: Working Pennsylvanians are facing high and rising prices while the ultrawealthy and megacorporations game the system to pay next to nothing in taxes. This bill is about basic fairness – if you have billions, you shouldn’t pay less in taxes than your secretary.
This is just one of the ways I’m standing up to these Social Security cuts – but I can’t keep up the pressure alone. I need your help to call out Trump’s schemes and spread the word.
**[So my team and I are racing to hit our mid-month fundraising deadline Wednesday at midnight to sound the alarm. Can you chip in $5 right now to help us hit our $20,000 goal and tell Trump to keep his HANDS OFF Social Security?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51775?t=2&akid=10362%2E434096%2EGajeHN) **🙏
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51781?t=3&akid=10362%2E434096%2EGajeHN)
---

---

---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51775?t=6&akid=10362%2E434096%2EGajeHN)
---
Thanks yinz,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk280-fr-fl-footer&t=7&refcode2=10362_434096_GajeHN&akid=10362%2E434096%2EGajeHN)**

I need your help to call out Trump’s schemes and spread the word. 🙏 If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thanks yinz, John ❤️ | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Republican billionaires are trying to hijack our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
You can’t make this up
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117215481/575736103/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmNkYzM5MC04NGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRwkRRgVSJKvRnOidMFgr7EDY1NTlH_NI4rU1AoKPfs=)
Hi, it's Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia, writing to you with an important update:
After Texas Republicans launched an unprecedented attack on our democracy by erasing five Democratic districts from its congressional map, California stepped up to fight back.
That’s why, this November, voters are going to the polls to decide whether we should draw a new map of our own to counter Trump’s power grab.
**But now the Republican son of a billionaire thinks he knows better — and is personally investing his fortune into making sure that Trump gets away with gerrymandering the Republican Party into another term in power:**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117215482/575736104/789508428?refcode=251013_RG_billionaire-son&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmNkYzM5MC04NGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRwkRRgVSJKvRnOidMFgr7EDY1NTlH_NI4rU1AoKPfs=)**
**_I refuse to stay silent while conservative billionaires try to hijack our democracy and impose their will on the American people._**
That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to support California’s fight, hold Donald Trump accountable, and make sure that this billionaire’s efforts to stymie our resistance utterly fail. And you can bet that ultra-wealthy Republicans will be coming after my seat, too.
**But I can’t get the job done alone.** He’s personally writing $30 MILLION checks — so I need all hands on deck to fight back, match his war chest, and make sure we have what we need to win.
**[That’s where you come in. Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more right now to help ensure that California keeps the fight alive even in the face of billionaire attacks? We need all the help we can get at this pivotal moment.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117215483/575736105/789508428?refcode=251013_RG_billionaire-son&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmNkYzM5MC04NGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRwkRRgVSJKvRnOidMFgr7EDY1NTlH_NI4rU1AoKPfs=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117215484/575736106/-309737922?refcode=251013_RG_billionaire-son&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmNkYzM5MC04NGE4LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRwkRRgVSJKvRnOidMFgr7EDY1NTlH_NI4rU1AoKPfs=)
Thank you
Robert Garcia

#### **🔥[Indigenous People's DAY Celebration! Last Day To Take Advantage Of Our 25% Off Paid Subscriptions Sale FOREVER!](https://substack.com/redirect/fda2b59a-3789-4c72-8fe6-ff1e53591074?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)🔥**
[Give Me 25% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/fda2b59a-3789-4c72-8fe6-ff1e53591074?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c77064-7ca5-4c09-bb4d-cb2d641cffc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
J.D. Vance is to authenticity what Velveeta is to cheese, or Trump's hair is to...hair.
His recent "performance" on ABC--in which he tried to pick a fight with George Stephanopoulos to impress Trump--was less interview than audition for "The Biggest Bootlicker."
[Performative outrage is all Republicans have left with their lack of a policy agenda and corrupted core](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c77064-7ca5-4c09-bb4d-cb2d641cffc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's a simple formula.
You go on corporate media, whose journalists must invite you on knowing you're going to lie about everything. Why?
Because they're owned by monopolistic merdes who don't even try to do their jobs.
They're now just there to make money, for "shareholder values" and to find mergers hiding in pre-war closets [[ed note: support independent media!](https://substack.com/redirect/fda2b59a-3789-4c72-8fe6-ff1e53591074?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)]--like Mike Johnson...at certain bars.
Attack the host as left wing. Deny what he he/she says even if there's video, audio or photographic evidence. Claim a conspiracy against right-wing troglodytes such as yourself.
And always--always--play _poow wittle victim_ _getting ve-wy, ve-wy ang-wee at da mean man askin qwest-yuns._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17cf2210-2ae5-4192-ab86-7039976a4929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yes, it's television of, by and for addled toddlers, [a stupid waste of everyone's time and insult to our system of governance. But, then again, so is the existence of the Republican Party](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c77064-7ca5-4c09-bb4d-cb2d641cffc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since at least 2010.
Of those who try this little dance on tv, there are those who truly need mental health assistance--you know, _perpetually angry at tree branches for whispering indignities about them just out of earshot_.
The rest of the scrum, full of more sh*t than a port-o-potty convention, but at least capable of pulling off some of the serial lying. And then there's JD, a guy who can't convincingly order donuts.
Fails at basic communication efforts with other mammals.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/78622fad-4f34-4fd1-9ead-9425e8bf0010?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Gets doors slammed in his face in Greenland, is so profusely protested he has to _run away from the hills_ while on a skiing vacation and whose name Donald Trump couldn't even remember when he first announced his support for him.
Here's to Vice President JD Mandel!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17cf2210-2ae5-4192-ab86-7039976a4929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
JD Vance is what we'd call, back in my school days, a "loser." An asshole.
My kids and their friends have their own Gen Z versions, a "sweat" or a "try-hard." The kid always trying to impress other kids, who are all scouting for back doors the minute they get stuck in a _Dave & Buster's_ or high school dance with him.
And the adult, or adult-ish, in JD's case, who nobody likes, nobody wants to be around and [everyone knows is as fake as a manufacturing job created by this administration](https://substack.com/redirect/17cf2210-2ae5-4192-ab86-7039976a4929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The JD Vances always had girlfriends in Canada or the Niagara Falls area in high school. In college always talked about scoring the winning touchdown for "the team," til you discovered they washed the team's towels.
As an adult, constantly lying.
[Taking credit for scoring the big client when they collated copies of the presentation. ](https://substack.com/redirect/17cf2210-2ae5-4192-ab86-7039976a4929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Or in JD's case, claiming in a book they were from a place they weren't, grew up in circumstances they didn't and the real tell you're a deeply insecure little dweeb with the self-assurance of a shell-less turtle:
You change your name, four times? Five? Seriously, who the f*k does that? Can this person possibly have a solid sense of self?
Ever wonder why these Vance-baby memes were so popular? Could they have been communicating something actually real about the person parodied in them?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c77064-7ca5-4c09-bb4d-cb2d641cffc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ID2KkFKuPEIGSnEU3HUemxLGxZu_xiOErDcvSx_Q1SA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=176073445)
So James Donald Bowman became James David Hamel who became J.D. Hamel who became J.D. Vance who became JD Vance. Yes, this toolshed went to all the trouble to change his name one last time because he couldn't live with two periods.
I don't know about you, but if this doesn't scream really cool human, well then I've lost my touch in knowing what is true charm.
So back to our interview where JD (not J.D., you insensitive bastard!) practically had flop sweat pooling into un-natural hot springs. Bowman Hamel Vance tried to channel righteous outrage at Stephanopoulos, but ended up sounding like a kid reading cue cards in a bad high school play.
Every gesture, every sneer, every clumsy insult where he tried soooo hard to sound authentic. But came across as dimwitted drone dripping with calculation. Sad and insincere.
[Why his answers were almost as tragic as war-ravaged as Portland!](https://substack.com/redirect/5167944d-b59c-4ef0-ade3-2b785e53c73a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This was supposed to a JD tough-guy moment--put that damn "liberal media" in its place, right? Instead, it was like watching a mediocre TikToker try to do De Niro.
Vance puffed himself up, attacked the host, repeated MAGA TPs like an underpaid extra, and looked about as natural as Trump in a Speedo.
**[Ed note: Pause. Ewwwww. Continue.]**
You could tell Vance he didn't believe a word exiting his fraudulent talk-hole. He was just thinking & praying--as Republicans do for tragedies--that the boss watching from Mar-a-Lago would toss him a participation trophy for approximating Lara Trump's singing.
The problem is, Trump has one genius. Yes, otherwise he's a brain-wounded wombat, but he's always been a performer--or conman--because he instinctively can read a room and tell what everyone wants.
And Trump knows they don't want Vance. He can smell the desperation Vance wears like a cheap eau de toilette.
And so could George Stephanopoulos. Who in a Boss move that should be standard practice, cut JD's feed, cut to commercial and cut the schmuck off the rest of his show.
(Now we see if ABC, Marvel, Hulu, ESPN, Disney or whoever runs the f*king joint kicks George off for journalism..or pays Trump another bribe--inspirational!)
Dayum! Ya got played, JD. You looked weak! Kinda dorky. _The boss isn 't gonna like that._
A guy who once called Trump "an idiot" and "America's Hitler." _Who said he hoped Trump would lose to Hillary on an NPR show I was on with him in 2016_ , now bends over backward to prove his Trump-love.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5167944d-b59c-4ef0-ade3-2b785e53c73a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And in doing so, he's become the most transparent phony in American politics ([and, wow, the competition's stiff)](https://substack.com/redirect/8c51578e-1124-43c4-84a5-91e9caead497?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
He's like what you'd get if you ordered a 3D-printed "Generic MAGA" then hit "add beard for gravitas" add add eyeliner for...well, you explain that one, JD.
But one thing it couldn't give him--like when Vincent Price dies before gifting Edward Scissorhands real, human hands--was any heart. Or, at least any understanding of how to show emotion to human organisms that surround him.
Every time Vance opens his mouth, you can practically hear the _ka-ching_ of his political ambition cashing checks his dignity can't cover.
It's like karaoke conservatism--and he's singing the National Anthem Roseanne Barr-level off-key.
The irony is that the man who wrote _Hillbilly Elegy_ to posture as the truth-teller from the heartland,[ has turned into the most hollow Beltway puppet of them all. Vance isn't channeling working-class anger. ](https://substack.com/redirect/47117495-ebb0-47e6-8d78-c76ea460a2b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Give Me 25% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/a0618804-b5bf-478b-abd0-f5591d48289e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
He's miming it--badly--because he's a low-self-esteem liar who needs to Trump-fluff.
It's like there's been a high-stakes, James Bond casino table where right-wing chuckleheads have been upping the ante of the last two decades.
Who can part with the most pride? Who can show-off the most shamelessness?
That lack of shame got us Trump. And now it gifted us the multi-named, _always trying to get into the fraternity that doesn 't want him by saying his great uncle was a member_, eternally locker-bound kid in junior high, JD Vance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c77064-7ca5-4c09-bb4d-cb2d641cffc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I mean, folks, did JD take this picture at Incels-R-Us?
The kind of social parasite all too happy to play the part, no matter how see-through he is. Because at least people are saying (one of his) name(s), he tells himself as he looks--with disdain--in the mirror each morning.
But, a few things here. [One this is something Democrats can and must use to their advantage. ](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c77064-7ca5-4c09-bb4d-cb2d641cffc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But if the Trump's purple blotches and cankled ankle-weights went out on a date with actuarial tables, they'd find out there's a good chance nature has a a plan for Trump in a that great money-laundered condo in the sky.
Likely at some point in the near future.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17cf2210-2ae5-4192-ab86-7039976a4929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And what happens when the MAGA audience looks at the emperor's court jester who's never been funny...or clever, or the slightest bit interesting.
And the emperor has left the gold-encrusted building?
Then JD's another sellout doing bad dinner theater for the world's worst dead-dictator. And still be the last kid picked for kickball at recess.
His usefulness to the fascists he helped backstop--with only couch-charisma left to offer--will be gone. And he'll find himself part of a rudderless, splintering criminal enterprise, with lots of angry, purposely-riled up Nazis, and no Trump to protect him.
He may want to ask Mike Pence how that almost worked out for him.

clean_body: Watch now (4 mins) | So bad at lying he makes Ted Cruz seem legit. Kisses so much Trump arse his lips are chapped worse than Lindsey's | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | So bad at lying he makes Ted Cruz seem legit. Kisses so much Trump arse his lips are chapped worse than Lindsey's | | | Oct 13 | | | | | | | | | | | | 🔥🔥 | | ---|---|--- J.D. Vance is to authenticity what Velveeta is to cheese, or Trump's hair is to...hair. His recent "performance" on ABC--in which he tried to pick a fight with George Stephanopoulos to impress Trump--was less interview than audition for "The Biggest Bootlicker." . It's a simple formula. You go on corporate media, whose journalists must invite you on knowing you're going to lie about everything. Why? Because they're owned by monopolistic merdes who don't even try to do their jobs. They're now just there to make money, for "shareholder values" and to find mergers hiding in pre-war closets Mike Johnson...at certain bars. Attack the host as left wing. Deny what he he/she says even if there's video, audio or photographic evidence. Claim a conspiracy against right-wing troglodytes such as yourself. And always--always--play poow wittle victim getting ve-wy, ve-wy ang-wee at da mean man askin qwest-yuns. | | ---|---|--- Yes, it's television of, by and for addled toddlers, since at least 2010. Of those who try this little dance on tv, there are those who truly need mental health assistance--you know, perpetually angry at tree branches for whispering indignities about them just out of earshot. The rest of the scrum, full of more sht than a port-o-potty convention, but at least capable of pulling off some of the serial lying. And then there's JD, a guy who can't convincingly order donuts. Fails at basic communication efforts with other mammals. Gets doors slammed in his face in Greenland, is so profusely protested he has to run away from the hills while on a skiing vacation and whose name Donald Trump couldn't even remember when he first announced his support for him. Here's to Vice President JD Mandel! | | ---|---|--- JD Vance is what we'd call, back in my school days, a "loser." An asshole. My kids and their friends have their own Gen Z versions, a "sweat" or a "try-hard." The kid always trying to impress other kids, who are all scouting for back doors the minute they get stuck in a Dave & Buster's or high school dance with him. And the adult, or adult-ish, in JD's case, who nobody likes, nobody wants to be around and . The JD Vances always had girlfriends in Canada or the Niagara Falls area in high school. In college always talked about scoring the winning touchdown for "the team," til you discovered they washed the team's towels. As an adult, constantly lying. Or in JD's case, claiming in a book they were from a place they weren't, grew up in circumstances they didn't and the real tell you're a deeply insecure little dweeb with the self-assurance of a shell-less turtle: You change your name, four times? Five? Seriously, who the fk does that? Can this person possibly have a solid sense of self? Ever wonder why these Vance-baby memes were so popular? Could they have been communicating something actually real about the person parodied in them? | | ---|---|--- So James Donald Bowman became James David Hamel who became J.D. Hamel who became J.D. Vance who became JD Vance. Yes, this toolshed went to all the trouble to change his name one last time because he couldn't live with two periods. I don't know about you, but if this doesn't scream really cool human, well then I've lost my touch in knowing what is true charm. So back to our interview where JD (not J.D., you insensitive bastard!) practically had flop sweat pooling into un-natural hot springs. Bowman Hamel Vance tried to channel righteous outrage at Stephanopoulos, but ended up sounding like a kid reading cue cards in a bad high school play. Every gesture, every sneer, every clumsy insult where he tried soooo hard to sound authentic. But came across as dimwitted drone dripping with calculation. Sad and insincere. This was supposed to a JD tough-guy moment--put that damn "liberal media" in its place, right? Instead, it was like watching a mediocre TikToker try to do De Niro. Vance puffed himself up, attacked the host, repeated MAGA TPs like an underpaid extra, and looked about as natural as Trump in a Speedo. [Ed note: Pause. Ewwwww. Continue.] You could tell Vance he didn't believe a word exiting his fraudulent talk-hole. He was just thinking & praying--as Republicans do for tragedies--that the boss watching from Mar-a-Lago would toss him a participation trophy for approximating Lara Trump's singing. The problem is, Trump has one genius. Yes, otherwise he's a brain-wounded wombat, but he's always been a performer--or conman--because he instinctively can read a room and tell what everyone wants. And Trump knows they don't want Vance. He can smell the desperation Vance wears like a cheap eau de toilette. And so could George Stephanopoulos. Who in a Boss move that should be standard practice, cut JD's feed, cut to commercial and cut the schmuck off the rest of his show. (Now we see if ABC, Marvel, Hulu, ESPN, Disney or whoever runs the fking joint kicks George off for journalism..or pays Trump another bribe--inspirational!) Dayum! Ya got played, JD. You looked weak! Kinda dorky. The boss isn 't gonna like that. A guy who once called Trump "an idiot" and "America's Hitler." subject: News about Virginia and New Jersey:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
We just got two new polls out of Virginia and New Jersey, and they’re a wake-up call for Democrats everywhere.
Both Democrats Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill have led nearly every poll in their gubernatorial races, but new data shows both races tightening — fast. One poll even shows New Jersey’s race dead even.
Republicans are already celebrating, and Ted Cruz called it a “massive shift in momentum.” Conservative PACs are pouring in money to close the gap before early voting ends.
That’s why GOTV PAC is stepping into fund rapid-response voter outreach in both states. These are low-turnout off-year elections, and the side that shows up wins. Period.
Will you chip in $10, $25, or $50 today so we can boost turnout and help Democrats hold the line in Virginia and New Jersey? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10132025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

clean_body: Your 2025 voter record is still incomplete. Fix it before it’s too late. | I'll shoot straight with you, Fellow American. We're building for 2026, and we need to bolster our conservative America First majority in the Senate, and my father, President Donald J. Trump, is counting on us to deliver. But I just got some troubling news: Our 2025 NRSC voter records are still incomplete in critical to protecting our Senate majority. We can't afford to leave any data on the table while the radical left is mounting a comeback for their complete and total socialist takeover of the federal government. I'm asking you personally, Fellow American: Nothing keeps me up at night more than the thought of Chuck Schumer and Democrats running the Senate again. Let's make sure that doesn't happen by completing your profile in the next 30 minutes. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: All On The Line
subject: The word “fairness”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We’re mobilizing volunteers in Ohio to hold lawmakers accountable and be too loud to ignore.
|
---

Peter.
_**“The word ‘fairness’ is not in the Constitution, correct?”**_
That’s what Ohio’s Joint Redistricting Committee Chair said during a recent meeting.
Really.
Right now, politicians in Ohio are trying to ram through a new congressional map that will even further gerrymander the state — cherry-picking their voters and disenfranchising millions of people.
Now, they’re saying the quiet part out loud and outright admitting that they’re not trying to be fair when it comes to who gets a voice in our democracy. **But statements like this only strengthen our commitment to fairness — and inspire us to fight back with more resolve.**
[**We’re mobilizing volunteers in states like Ohio to hold lawmakers accountable for the cynical, anti-democracy power grabs happening across this country. Will you make a donation to power that work today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117216222/575738862/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHLegal_email_20251013-AOTL-Tier1-OHLegal_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251013-AOTL-Tier1-OHLegal_&utm_campaign=OHLegal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNmU4NTViLTg4YTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eUjNLA0HE5yR-Bq6jtkI0do4hfJdVTnYRT-EC-PhQd4=)

Voters in Ohio haven’t been subtle about what they want. In 2018, Ohioans overwhelmingly approved a bipartisan process for drawing district lines that would end gerrymandering altogether — enshrining a fairer, more transparent process in the state constitution.
Extreme lawmakers have spent the intervening years ignoring that mandate and the courts, passing a gerrymander along party lines in 2022. Now, they want to abuse their power to force through a map that would take away opportunities for both parties to compete.
That’s bad for Ohioans and bad for democracy. And it’s why we’re fighting to send a clear message to lawmakers and stop this extremism from spreading.
[**You have the power to help us reach voters, organize volunteers, and build power in states from Ohio to Indiana to Texas.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117216242/575738887/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHLegal_email_20251013-AOTL-Tier1-OHLegal_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251013-AOTL-Tier1-OHLegal_&utm_campaign=OHLegal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNmU4NTViLTg4YTgtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eUjNLA0HE5yR-Bq6jtkI0do4hfJdVTnYRT-EC-PhQd4=)
Thank you,
All On The Line

clean_body: We’re mobilizing volunteers in Ohio to hold lawmakers accountable and be too loud to ignore. | Peter. “The word ‘fairness’ is not in the Constitution, correct?” That’s what Ohio’s Joint Redistricting Committee Chair said during a recent meeting. Really. Right now, politicians in Ohio are trying to ram through a new congressional map that will even further gerrymander the state — cherry-picking their voters and disenfranchising millions of people. Now, they’re saying the quiet part out loud and outright admitting that they’re not trying to be fair when it comes to who gets a voice in our democracy. But statements like this only strengthen our commitment to fairness — and inspire us to fight back with more resolve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Voters in Ohio haven’t been subtle about what they want. In 2018, Ohioans overwhelmingly approved a bipartisan process for drawing district lines that would end gerrymandering altogether — enshrining a fairer, more transparent process in the state constitution. Extreme lawmakers have spent the intervening years ignoring that mandate and the courts, passing a gerrymander along party lines in 2022. Now, they want to abuse their power to force through a map that would take away opportunities for both parties to compete. That’s bad for Ohioans and bad for democracy. And it’s why we’re fighting to send a clear message to lawmakers and stop this extremism from spreading. = Thank you, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Hey folks,
I just went live with Minnesota's Lieutenant Governor--and U.S. Senate candidate--Peggy Flanagan, and this one is a must-watch. We covered ICE's escalation in cities like Chicago, Columbus Day gaslighting, and how faith and organizing show up in real life. If you care about dignity, democracy, and actually improving people's lives, don't miss this.
* **[00:01:37]** Peggy on how Paul Wellstone pulled her into politics--and why that grassroots legacy still drives her.
* **[00:13:39]** We break down ICE's masked raids in Chicago, the fear they're sowing at schools and churches, and what Democrats have to say and do now.
* **[00:26:26]** Faith, values, and politics: reframing what "pro-life" really means--opposing cruelty at the border and the death penalty alike.
* **[00:29:10]** Indigenous Peoples Day > Columbus Day: Peggy on Native visibility today, not nostalgia--and why Trump's Columbus trolling misses the point.
* **[00:45:19]** The bigger vision: Medicare for All, a real housing ladder (from homelessness to first-time homebuyers), and a wage floor that reflects reality.

**[If this conversation hits you like it hit me--if you want a politics that's courageous, clear, and rooted in everyday life--become a paid subscriber today.](https://substack.com/redirect/4cf15b6e-2f67-42c9-a1f1-8aaa96aef1d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

clean_body: Watch now (55 mins) | Mike Nellis Live -- Every Weekday at 5pm ET | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | Mike Nellis Live -- Every Weekday at 5pm ET | | and | Oct 13 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Hey folks, I just went live with Minnesota's Lieutenant Governor--and U.S. Senate candidate--Peggy Flanagan, and this one is a must-watch. We covered ICE's escalation in cities like Chicago, Columbus Day gaslighting, and how faith and organizing show up in real life. If you care about dignity, democracy, and actually improving people's lives, don't miss this. [00:01:37] Peggy on how Paul Wellstone pulled her into politics--and why that grassroots legacy still drives her. [00:13:39] We break down ICE's masked raids in Chicago, the fear they're sowing at schools and churches, and what Democrats have to say and do now. [00:26:26] Faith, values, and politics: reframing what "pro-life" really means--opposing cruelty at the border and the death penalty alike. [00:29:10] Indigenous Peoples Day > Columbus Day: Peggy on Native visibility today, not nostalgia--and why Trump's Columbus trolling misses the point. [00:45:19] The bigger vision: Medicare for All, a real housing ladder (from homelessness to first-time homebuyers), and a wage floor that reflects reality. ** With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| , organizer, mama with auntie vibes Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: GO TO MCCALL'S: Union Boss Trying to Destroy Them
body:
Teachers union head sent email trying to deceive teachers into boycotting beloved NM family business | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fa4787d9bf&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | The head of the Albuquerque Teachers Union just tried to destroy one of New Mexico's most beloved family businesses [using deliberate deception](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5b09f7b745&e=567664f14c). Meanwhile, did Katie Porter’s California Governor dreams die this week? Plus, new FBI data confirms New Mexico is the most violent state in America.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b6e315bcbb&e=567664f14c)
| |
🚨 **ELLEN BERNSTEIN TARGETS MCCALL'S PUMPKIN PATCH**
Ellen Bernstein sent an email to APS teachers with subject line "McCall's Prison Patch" - designed to launch a boycott of McCall's Pumpkin Patch.
Her tactic: Create false connection between Kevin McCall's family business and ICE detention operations. The truth? Kevin serves on Torrance County Commission that oversees the detention center contract. That's it. That's his entire "crime."
She attacked "economic gain" - translation: she wants to destroy jobs for hundreds of families who work at the facility. Not everyone gets to collect six figures from the teachers union while the state ranks LAST in education, Ellen.
Mark's message: "You get a choice. Be on the good side. Be on the McCall side because they're good people. Don't let people like Ellen Bernstein win."
**GO TO MCCALL'S PUMPKIN PATCH. Support this amazing family.**
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fd474da578&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
💀 **KATIE PORTER'S 48-HOUR COLLAPSE**
California Congresswoman Katie Porter led betting markets to be Governor at 40%. Then she walked out of a CBS interview when asked a follow-up question: "I don't want to have an unhappy experience with you."
Then video surfaced of her screaming at a staffer: "Get out of my shot! Stay out of my shot!"
Additional revelations: Court-ordered anger management classes during divorce, and pattern of abusing staff.
The result: Betting markets collapsed from 40% to 16% in just 2 DAYS. Google searches spiked 10,000% - all negative.
🚨 **NEW MEXICO: #1 MOST VIOLENT STATE IN AMERICA**
FBI just released new crime data: **New Mexico ranks #1 most violent state in the entire country.**
What do Albuquerque voters care about?
* 53% say crime is their top issue
* 47% say homelessness
* Everything else: Not even close

Darren White's new campaign ad focuses on exactly those two issues. Smart politics.
After 8 years of Tim Keller, we're the most violent state in America and he's still running on "good ideas." Unbelievable.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0fb6991fab&e=567664f14c)
---
| | We also cover JD Vance destroying George Stephanopoulos (who literally cut his mic), Spanberger refusing to drop Jay Jones endorsement, New Jersey Governor's race tightening, and beautiful drone footage from Angel Fire fall colors.
---
|

## Commonsense Corner:
---
The D.C. circus has real consequences—and this Schumer Shutdown proves it. While Democrats play politics, our troops are left wondering whether they’ll get paid this week. Did you see those photos of service members lined up at food banks? It’s a disgrace, and folks on the Left ought to be ashamed. Fortunately, President Trump and Pete Hegseth are stepping up where Senate Democrats have failed—working on a [plan](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/6zHLw5IwNWUDXVJ-zdZw4z_KE0KqYhP-ruBbhVhlh8GZwcYbGwRp6Fx-8R6qyfCbW28oOHKzyJWCcF020eDE87LvyaVDf-y66mAZhNSaTvruw7WXcQmVhdm9r0tIfJsa8m-X_Rv6a-7bdUJ6CmfJHp5JtrXV5mZoMjAFSNEJ54XFu8wBPCgom8EPTmjhYawvR67c0Do6IUwBt54RgCltlM14lsLw3DwQEOrvyQY159bU1ieA9SDzh1y9x7P0TcnJXSdEmqccam2WI2QS20Ez59w63xSW_GX5km95_vapWOtP9gGMZxgDKB2l5TGTFrJYC0EsanlFwIm74Fukr4-gvGYKlAj7L517SjoqX6uxzLc4Nm5Gzf7wJet8Aixo_Dd7NJTfi-PLCLxbiZsvKI5e9lLckXu0K-LlJNq0_3gU2JjiTUMx_Q/HZuGk8hKlzHw8n9NTg2GDNotoeGUDYb-/13) to pull some unused funding to make sure our brave men and women in uniform get the pay they’ve earned. Democrats will [howl](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/nyu-ntCnPXWahWM4y7i3SbUaJsiZ61FI1qJ3hcQQVD1tVmwuP4xVRJM9EU1XXPKWTxXKju5XZzqqAYR7VqQnFufsRRllWfVGhi-N-V6819AeG2aNn_jWDTG6MvcyfBIHbZ6nKt6ktxDRpovQG1WennNTqVk82SqaOhqhA-SIbG2TSGxQouoWO534egcbMw8SLqmjJ5GGG9HO0vLPzlxDAWYB42fxO5_M4QMf_lsIciVNtC6YVAm2cfcQcYZyucfd6q6gF_1hB5uy0p26et7TV8T8kCFrUyF2mGjs6m_vQHx3wct_1_2LzYCPVAWeCooUirLM702ZN86WIqi79QgPaLi_pw5cTTDzjFPkgogqtTTR4qATpkxlG76dzQddCyU27e2LQQfI0cDG1lXmlmqqSpdO7rmA2CMER0EiVkAf6GbMSTgFJQ/0oNCBc3FuyIwd3K0TJS_RM3lGWwThliL/13) about that too, because they think it violates this, that, and the other. _Translation: They’re all on a major power trip. _ When real leaders see a problem, they act. That’s the kind of leadership America deserves. Thank you, President Trump, for standing up for our troops when Washington Democrats won’t.
---
|
---

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: The D.C. circus has real consequences—and this Schumer Shutdown proves it. While Democrats play politics, our troops are left wondering whether they’ll get paid this week. Did you see those photos of service members lined up at food banks? It’s a disgrace, and folks on the Left ought to be ashamed. Fortunately, President Trump and Pete Hegseth are stepping up where Senate Democrats have failed—working on a to pull some unused funding to make sure our brave men and women in uniform get the pay they’ve earned. Democrats will about that too, because they think it violates this, that, and the other. Translation: They’re all on a major power trip. When real leaders see a problem, they act. That’s the kind of leadership America deserves. Thank you, President Trump, for standing up for our troops when Washington Democrats won’t. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Amid all the mudslinging and finger-pointing (especially in the media), who do you believe is primarily to blame for the ongoing shutdown? Last Week’s Poll Results | In Case You Missed It: Tim Visits The Tucker Carlson Show "New Underwater UFO Sightings and the Non-Human Tech the Government Is Hiding | Rep. Tim Burchett" | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress
